authors_text: Kun Wei,Yike Zhang,Sining Sun,Lei Xie,Long Ma
title: Conversational Speech Recognition By Learning Conversation-level Characteristics
title_zh: 通过学习对话级别特征进行对话语音识别
abstract: Conversational automatic speech recognition (ASR) is a task to recognize conversational speech including multiple speakers. Unlike sentence-level ASR, conversational ASR can naturally take advantages from specific characteristics of conversation, such as role preference and topical coherence. This paper proposes a conversational ASR model which explicitly learns conversation-level characteristics under the prevalent end-to-end neural framework. The highlights of the proposed model are twofold. First, a latent variational module (LVM) is attached to a conformer-based encoder-decoder ASR backbone to learn role preference and topical coherence. Second, a topic model is specifically adopted to bias the outputs of the decoder to words in the predicted topics. Experiments on two Mandarin conversational ASR tasks show that the proposed model achieves a maximum 12% relative character error rate (CER) reduction.
summary: Conversational automatic speech recognition (ASR) is a task to recognize conversational speech including multiple speakers. Unlike sentence-level ASR, conversational ASR can naturally take advantages from specific characteristics of conversation, such as role preference and topical coherence. This paper proposes a conversational ASR model which explicitly learns conversation-level characteristics under the prevalent end-to-end neural framework. The highlights of the proposed model are twofold. First, a latent variational module (LVM) is attached to a conformer-based encoder-decoder ASR backbone to learn role preference and topical coherence. Second, a topic model is specifically adopted to bias the outputs of the decoder to words in the predicted topics. Experiments on two Mandarin conversational ASR tasks show that the proposed model achieves a maximum 12% relative character error rate (CER) reduction.
abstract_zh: 会话自动语音识别（ASR）是识别包括多个说话者的会话语音的任务。与句子级 ASR 不同，会话 ASR 可以自然地利用会话的特定特征，例如角色偏好和主题连贯性。本文提出了一种会话 ASR 模型，该模型在流行的端到端神经框架下显式地学习会话级特征。所提出的模型的亮点是双重的。首先，将潜在变体模块 (LVM) 连接到基于构象异构体的编码器-解码器 ASR 主干，以学习角色偏好和主题连贯性。其次，专门采用主题模型来将解码器的输出偏置到预测主题中的单词。对两个普通话会话 ASR 任务的实验表明，所提出的模型最多可实现 12% 的相对字符错误率 (CER) 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对话级特征学习的会话语音识别模型，通过捕捉角色偏好和主题连贯性提升多说话人场景下的识别效果。
AI.motivation: 传统句子级ASR难以处理多说话人对话场景，而对话中存在角色分配规律和主题连贯性等潜在特征可被利用。
AI.method: 在Conformer编码器-解码器框架中引入潜在变分模块（LVM）学习对话特征，并采用主题模型引导解码器输出与预测主题相关的词汇。
AI.result: 在两个中文会话ASR任务中实现最高12%的相对字符错误率（CER）降低。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模对话级特征，所提模型有效提升了会话场景下的语音识别性能。

authors_text: Dharma Shukla,Muthian Sivathanu,Srinidhi Viswanatha,Bhargav Gulavani,Rimma Nehme,Amey Agrawal,Chen Chen,Nipun Kwatra,Ramachandran Ramjee,Pankaj Sharma,Atul Katiyar,Vipul Modi,Vaibhav Sharma,Abhishek Singh,Shreshth Singhal,Kaustubh Welankar,Lu Xun,Ravi Anupindi,Karthik Elangovan,Hasibur Rahman,Zhou Lin,Rahul Seetharaman,Cheng Xu,Eddie Ailijiang,Suresh Krishnappa, et al. title: Singularity: Planet-Scale, Preemptive and Elastic Scheduling of AI Workloads
title_zh: 奇点：人工智能工作负载的行星级、抢先式和弹性调度
abstract: Lowering costs by driving high utilization across deep learning workloads is a crucial lever for cloud providers. We present Singularity, Microsoft's globally distributed scheduling service for highly-efficient and reliable execution of deep learning training and inference workloads. At the heart of Singularity is a novel, workload-aware scheduler that can transparently preempt and elastically scale deep learning workloads to drive high utilization without impacting their correctness or performance, across a global fleet of AI accelerators (e.g., GPUs, FPGAs). All jobs in Singularity are preemptable, migratable, and dynamically resizable (elastic) by default: a live job can be dynamically and transparently (a) preempted and migrated to a different set of nodes, cluster, data center or a region and resumed exactly from the point where the execution was preempted, and (b) resized (i.e., elastically scaled-up/down) on a varying set of accelerators of a given type. Our mechanisms are transparent in that they do not require the user to make any changes to their code or require using any custom libraries that may limit flexibility. Additionally, our approach significantly improves the reliability of deep learning workloads. We show that the resulting efficiency and reliability gains with Singularity are achieved with negligible impact on the steady-state performance. Finally, our design approach is agnostic of DNN architectures and handles a variety of parallelism strategies (e.g., data/pipeline/model parallelism).
summary: Lowering costs by driving high utilization across deep learning workloads is a crucial lever for cloud providers. We present Singularity, Microsoft's globally distributed scheduling service for highly-efficient and reliable execution of deep learning training and inference workloads. At the heart of Singularity is a novel, workload-aware scheduler that can transparently preempt and elastically scale deep learning workloads to drive high utilization without impacting their correctness or performance, across a global fleet of AI accelerators (e.g., GPUs, FPGAs). All jobs in Singularity are preemptable, migratable, and dynamically resizable (elastic) by default: a live job can be dynamically and transparently (a) preempted and migrated to a different set of nodes, cluster, data center or a region and resumed exactly from the point where the execution was preempted, and (b) resized (i.e., elastically scaled-up/down) on a varying set of accelerators of a given type. Our mechanisms are transparent in that they do not require the user to make any changes to their code or require using any custom libraries that may limit flexibility. Additionally, our approach significantly improves the reliability of deep learning workloads. We show that the resulting efficiency and reliability gains with Singularity are achieved with negligible impact on the steady-state performance. Finally, our design approach is agnostic of DNN architectures and handles a variety of parallelism strategies (e.g., data/pipeline/model parallelism).
abstract_zh: 对于云提供商来说，通过提高深度学习工作负载的高利用率来降低成本是一个至关重要的杠杆。我们推出 Singularity，这是 Microsoft 的全球分布式调度服务，用于高效、可靠地执行深度学习训练和推理工作负载。 Singularity 的核心是一种新颖的工作负载感知调度程序，它可以透明地抢占和弹性扩展深度学习工作负载，以在全球人工智能加速器（例如 GPU、FPGA）中提高利用率，而不会影响其正确性或性能。默认情况下，Singularity 中的所有作业都是可抢占、可迁移和动态调整大小（弹性）的：实时作业可以动态且透明地 (a) 抢占并迁移到不同的节点集、集群、数据中心或区域，并从执行被抢占的位置准确恢复，以及 (b) 在给定类型的不同加速器集上调整大小（即弹性扩展/缩小）。我们的机制是透明的，因为它们不需要用户对其代码进行任何更改，也不需要使用任何可能限制灵活性的自定义库。此外，我们的方法显着提高了深度学习工作负载的可靠性。我们表明，奇点所带来的效率和可靠性增益是在对稳态性能的影响可以忽略不计的情况下实现的。最后，我们的设计方法与 DNN 架构无关，并处理各种并行策略（例如数据/管道/模型并行）。

AI.tldr: 提出一种全球规模的、支持抢占和弹性扩展的AI工作负载调度系统，以提高云服务中深度学习任务的资源利用率和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 云服务提供商需要通过提高深度学习工作负载的资源利用率来降低成本，同时确保任务的可靠性和性能。
AI.method: 设计了一个透明的、工作负载感知的调度器，能够动态抢占和迁移任务，并弹性扩展资源，无需用户修改代码或使用特定库。
AI.result: 显著提高了深度学习任务的资源利用率和可靠性，同时对稳态性能影响极小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了AI工作负载的调度效率和可靠性，且适用于不同深度学习架构和并行策略，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: Singularity: Planet-Scale, Preemptive and Elastic Scheduling of AI Workloads 奇点：人工智能工作负载的行星级、抢先式和弹性调度 Lowering costs by driving high utilization across deep learning workloads is a crucial lever for cloud providers. At the heart of Singularity is a novel, workload-aware scheduler that can transparently preempt and elastically scale deep learning workloads to drive high utilization without impacting their correctness or performance, across a global fleet of AI accelerators (e.g., GPUs, FPGAs). All jobs in Singularity are preemptable, migratable, and dynamically resizable (elastic) by default: a live job can be dynamically and transparently (a) preempted and migrated to a different set of nodes, cluster, data center or a region and resumed exactly from the point where the execution was preempted, and (b) resized (i.e., elastically scaled-up/down) on a varying set of accelerators of a given type. Our mechanisms are transparent in that they do not require the user to make any changes to their code or require using any custom libraries that may limit flexibility. Additionally, our approach significantly improves the reliability of deep learning workloads. We show that the resulting efficiency and reliability gains with Singularity are achieved with negligible impact on the steady-state performance. authors_text: Shiya Luo,Defang Chen,Can Wang
title: Knowledge Distillation with Deep Supervision
title_zh: 深度监督的知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation aims to enhance the performance of a lightweight student model by exploiting the knowledge from a pre-trained cumbersome teacher model. However, in the traditional knowledge distillation, teacher predictions are only used to provide the supervisory signal for the last layer of the student model, which may result in those shallow student layers lacking accurate training guidance in the layer-by-layer back propagation and thus hinders effective knowledge transfer. To address this issue, we propose Deeply-Supervised Knowledge Distillation (DSKD), which fully utilizes class predictions and feature maps of the teacher model to supervise the training of shallow student layers. A loss-based weight allocation strategy is developed in DSKD to adaptively balance the learning process of each shallow layer, so as to further improve the student performance. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet with various teacher-student models show significantly performance, confirming the effectiveness of our proposed method. Code is available at: $\href{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}$
summary: Knowledge distillation aims to enhance the performance of a lightweight student model by exploiting the knowledge from a pre-trained cumbersome teacher model. However, in the traditional knowledge distillation, teacher predictions are only used to provide the supervisory signal for the last layer of the student model, which may result in those shallow student layers lacking accurate training guidance in the layer-by-layer back propagation and thus hinders effective knowledge transfer. To address this issue, we propose Deeply-Supervised Knowledge Distillation (DSKD), which fully utilizes class predictions and feature maps of the teacher model to supervise the training of shallow student layers. A loss-based weight allocation strategy is developed in DSKD to adaptively balance the learning process of each shallow layer, so as to further improve the student performance. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet with various teacher-student models show significantly performance, confirming the effectiveness of our proposed method. Code is available at: $\href{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}$
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏旨在通过利用预先训练的繁琐教师模型中的知识来提高轻量级学生模型的性能。然而，在传统的知识蒸馏中，教师预测仅用于为学生模型的最后一层提供监督信号，这可能会导致那些较浅的学生层在逐层反向传播中缺乏准确的训练指导，从而阻碍有效的知识迁移。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了深度监督知识蒸馏（DSKD），它充分利用教师模型的类别预测和特征图来监督浅层学生层的训练。 DSKD中开发了基于损失的权重分配策略，自适应地平衡每个浅层的学习过程，从而进一步提高学生的表现。在 CIFAR-100 和 TinyImageNet 上使用各种师生模型进行的大量实验显示出显着的性能，证实了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码位于：$\href{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}$

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DSKD的深度监督知识蒸馏方法，通过利用教师模型的类别预测和特征图来增强学生模型浅层的训练指导。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法仅用教师模型预测监督学生最后一层，导致浅层学生网络缺乏有效训练指导，影响知识传递效果。
AI.method: DSKD方法通过教师模型的类别预测和特征图同时监督学生模型各层，并采用基于损失的权重分配策略平衡浅层学习过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和TinyImageNet数据集上，DSKD方法显著提升了学生模型性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 深度监督机制能有效改善知识蒸馏中浅层学生网络的训练，代码已开源供验证。

search_text: Knowledge Distillation with Deep Supervision 深度监督的知识蒸馏 Knowledge distillation aims to enhance the performance of a lightweight student model by exploiting the knowledge from a pre-trained cumbersome teacher model. However, in the traditional knowledge distillation, teacher predictions are only used to provide the supervisory signal for the last layer of the student model, which may result in those shallow student layers lacking accurate training guidance in the layer-by-layer back propagation and thus hinders effective knowledge transfer. To address this issue, we propose Deeply-Supervised Knowledge Distillation (DSKD), which fully utilizes class predictions and feature maps of the teacher model to supervise the training of shallow student layers. A loss-based weight allocation strategy is developed in DSKD to adaptively balance the learning process of each shallow layer, so as to further improve the student performance. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet with various teacher-student models show significantly performance, confirming the effectiveness of our proposed method. Code is available at: $\href{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}$ 知识蒸馏旨在通过利用预先训练的繁琐教师模型中的知识来提高轻量级学生模型的性能。然而，在传统的知识蒸馏中，教师预测仅用于为学生模型的最后一层提供监督信号，这可能会导致那些较浅的学生层在逐层反向传播中缺乏准确的训练指导，从而阻碍有效的知识迁移。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了深度监督知识蒸馏（DSKD），它充分利用教师模型的类别预测和特征图来监督浅层学生层的训练。 DSKD中开发了基于损失的权重分配策略，自适应地平衡每个浅层的学习过程，从而进一步提高学生的表现。在 CIFAR-100 和 TinyImageNet 上使用各种师生模型进行的大量实验显示出显着的性能，证实了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码位于：$\href{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}{https://github.com/luoshiya/DSKD}$ 本文提出了一种名为DSKD的深度监督知识蒸馏方法，通过利用教师模型的类别预测和特征图来增强学生模型浅层的训练指导。 Shiya Luo,Defang Chen,Can Wang cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Pranav Kadam,Qingyang Zhou,Shan Liu,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: PCRP: Unsupervised Point Cloud Object Retrieval and Pose Estimation
title_zh: PCRP：无监督点云对象检索和姿态估计
abstract: An unsupervised point cloud object retrieval and pose estimation method, called PCRP, is proposed in this work. It is assumed that there exists a gallery point cloud set that contains point cloud objects with given pose orientation information. PCRP attempts to register the unknown point cloud object with those in the gallery set so as to achieve content-based object retrieval and pose estimation jointly, where the point cloud registration task is built upon an enhanced version of the unsupervised R-PointHop method. Experiments on the ModelNet40 dataset demonstrate the superior performance of PCRP in comparison with traditional and learning based methods.
summary: An unsupervised point cloud object retrieval and pose estimation method, called PCRP, is proposed in this work. It is assumed that there exists a gallery point cloud set that contains point cloud objects with given pose orientation information. PCRP attempts to register the unknown point cloud object with those in the gallery set so as to achieve content-based object retrieval and pose estimation jointly, where the point cloud registration task is built upon an enhanced version of the unsupervised R-PointHop method. Experiments on the ModelNet40 dataset demonstrate the superior performance of PCRP in comparison with traditional and learning based methods.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种无监督点云对象检索和姿态估计方法，称为 PCRP。假设存在一个图库点云集，其中包含具有给定姿态方向信息的点云对象。 PCRP尝试将未知点云对象与图库集中的对象进行配准，从而联合实现基于内容的对象检索和姿态估计，其中点云配准任务建立在无监督R-PointHop方法的增强版本之上。 ModelNet40 数据集上的实验证明了 PCRP 与传统方法和基于学习的方法相比具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督点云对象检索与姿态估计方法PCRP，通过点云注册实现内容检索与姿态估计的联合任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在点云对象检索与姿态估计中依赖标注数据，而实际场景中标注数据获取困难，需探索无监督学习方案。
AI.method: 基于改进的无监督R-PointHop方法，利用已知姿态的点云图库进行点云注册，实现对象检索与姿态估计的联合优化。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40数据集上，PCRP相比传统方法和基于学习的方法表现出更优的检索与姿态估计性能。
AI.conclusion: PCRP验证了无监督学习在点云对象检索与姿态估计任务中的有效性，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bing Yang,Hong Liu,Xiaofei Li
title: Learning Deep Direct-Path Relative Transfer Function for Binaural Sound Source Localization
title_zh: 学习用于双耳声源定位的深度直接路径相对传递函数
abstract: Direct-path relative transfer function (DP-RTF) refers to the ratio between the direct-path acoustic transfer functions of two microphone channels. Though DP-RTF fully encodes the sound spatial cues and serves as a reliable localization feature, it is often erroneously estimated in the presence of noise and reverberation. This paper proposes to learn DP-RTF with deep neural networks for robust binaural sound source localization. A DP-RTF learning network is designed to regress the binaural sensor signals to a real-valued representation of DP-RTF. It consists of a branched convolutional neural network module to separately extract the inter-channel magnitude and phase patterns, and a convolutional recurrent neural network module for joint feature learning. To better explore the speech spectra to aid the DP-RTF estimation, a monaural speech enhancement network is used to recover the direct-path spectrograms from the noisy ones. The enhanced spectrograms are stacked onto the noisy spectrograms to act as the input of the DP-RTF learning network. We train one unique DP-RTF learning network using many different binaural arrays to enable the generalization of DP-RTF learning across arrays. This way avoids time-consuming training data collection and network retraining for a new array, which is very useful in practical application. Experimental results on both simulated and real-world data show the effectiveness of the proposed method for direction of arrival (DOA) estimation in the noisy and reverberant environment, and a good generalization ability to unseen binaural arrays.
summary: Direct-path relative transfer function (DP-RTF) refers to the ratio between the direct-path acoustic transfer functions of two microphone channels. Though DP-RTF fully encodes the sound spatial cues and serves as a reliable localization feature, it is often erroneously estimated in the presence of noise and reverberation. This paper proposes to learn DP-RTF with deep neural networks for robust binaural sound source localization. A DP-RTF learning network is designed to regress the binaural sensor signals to a real-valued representation of DP-RTF. It consists of a branched convolutional neural network module to separately extract the inter-channel magnitude and phase patterns, and a convolutional recurrent neural network module for joint feature learning. To better explore the speech spectra to aid the DP-RTF estimation, a monaural speech enhancement network is used to recover the direct-path spectrograms from the noisy ones. The enhanced spectrograms are stacked onto the noisy spectrograms to act as the input of the DP-RTF learning network. We train one unique DP-RTF learning network using many different binaural arrays to enable the generalization of DP-RTF learning across arrays. This way avoids time-consuming training data collection and network retraining for a new array, which is very useful in practical application. Experimental results on both simulated and real-world data show the effectiveness of the proposed method for direction of arrival (DOA) estimation in the noisy and reverberant environment, and a good generalization ability to unseen binaural arrays.
abstract_zh: 直接路径相对传递函数（DP-RTF）是指两个麦克风通​​道的直接路径声学传递函数之间的比率。尽管 DP-RTF 完全编码了声音空间线索并作为可靠的定位功能，但在存在噪声和混响的情况下经常会被错误地估计。本文提出使用深度神经网络学习 DP-RTF，以实现鲁棒的双耳声源定位。 DP-RTF 学习网络旨在将双耳传感器信号回归为 DP-RTF 的实值表示。它由一个用于单独提取通道间幅度和相位模式的分支卷积神经网络模块和一个用于联合特征学习的卷积循环神经网络模块组成。为了更好地探索语音频谱以帮助 DP-RTF 估计，使用单耳语音增强网络从噪声频谱图中恢复直接路径频谱图。增强的频谱图被堆叠到噪声频谱图上，作为 DP-RTF 学习网络的输入。我们使用许多不同的双耳阵列训练一种独特的 DP-RTF 学习网络，以实现跨阵列的 DP-RTF 学习的泛化。这种方式避免了耗时的训练数据收集和新阵列的网络重新训练，这在实际应用中非常有用。模拟和真实数据的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在噪声和混响环境中的波达方向（DOA）估计方法是有效的，并且对不可见的双耳阵列具有良好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的学习直接路径相对传递函数（DP-RTF）的方法，用于实现鲁棒的双耳声源定位。
AI.motivation: 直接路径相对传递函数（DP-RTF）能够有效编码声音的空间线索，但其在噪声和混响环境下估计不准确，影响定位性能。因此，需要一种鲁棒的方法来提高DP-RTF估计的准确性。
AI.method: 设计了一个DP-RTF学习网络，该网络由分支卷积神经网络模块和卷积循环神经网络模块组成，分别提取通道间的幅度和相位模式，并进行联合特征学习。此外，使用单耳语音增强网络从噪声频谱中恢复直接路径频谱，并将其与噪声频谱堆叠作为DP-RTF学习网络的输入。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在噪声和混响环境下能够有效估计到达方向（DOA），并且在未见过的双耳阵列上具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习有效提升了DP-RTF估计的鲁棒性，并实现了跨双耳阵列的泛化能力，具有实际应用价值。

conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习有效提升了DP-RTF估计的鲁棒性，并实现了跨双耳阵列的泛化能力，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Learning Deep Direct-Path Relative Transfer Function for Binaural Sound Source Localization 学习用于双耳声源定位的深度直接路径相对传递函数 Direct-path relative transfer function (DP-RTF) refers to the ratio between the direct-path acoustic transfer functions of two microphone channels. Though DP-RTF fully encodes the sound spatial cues and serves as a reliable localization feature, it is often erroneously estimated in the presence of noise and reverberation. This paper proposes to learn DP-RTF with deep neural networks for robust binaural sound source localization. A DP-RTF learning network is designed to regress the binaural sensor signals to a real-valued representation of DP-RTF. It consists of a branched convolutional neural network module to separately extract the inter-channel magnitude and phase patterns, and a convolutional recurrent neural network module for joint feature learning. To better explore the speech spectra to aid the DP-RTF estimation, a monaural speech enhancement network is used to recover the direct-path spectrograms from the noisy ones. The enhanced spectrograms are stacked onto the noisy spectrograms to act as the input of the DP-RTF learning network. We train one unique DP-RTF learning network using many different binaural arrays to enable the generalization of DP-RTF learning across arrays. This way avoids time-consuming training data collection and network retraining for a new array, which is very useful in practical application. Experimental results on both simulated and real-world data show the effectiveness of the proposed method for direction of arrival (DOA) estimation in the noisy and reverberant environment, and a good generalization ability to unseen binaural arrays. 直接路径相对传递函数（DP-RTF）是指两个麦克风通​​道的直接路径声学传递函数之间的比率。尽管 DP-RTF 完全编码了声音空间线索并作为可靠的定位功能，但在存在噪声和混响的情况下经常会被错误地估计。本文提出使用深度神经网络学习 DP-RTF，以实现鲁棒的双耳声源定位。 DP-RTF 学习网络旨在将双耳传感器信号回归为 DP-RTF 的实值表示。它由一个用于单独提取通道间幅度和相位模式的分支卷积神经网络模块和一个用于联合特征学习的卷积循环神经网络模块组成。为了更好地探索语音频谱以帮助 DP-RTF 估计，使用单耳语音增强网络从噪声频谱图中恢复直接路径频谱图。增强的频谱图被堆叠到噪声频谱图上，作为 DP-RTF 学习网络的输入。我们使用许多不同的双耳阵列训练一种独特的 DP-RTF 学习网络，以实现跨阵列的 DP-RTF 学习的泛化。这种方式避免了耗时的训练数据收集和新阵列的网络重新训练，这在实际应用中非常有用。模拟和真实数据的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在噪声和混响环境中的波达方向（DOA）估计方法是有效的，并且对不可见的双耳阵列具有良好的泛化能力。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的学习直接路径相对传递函数（DP-RTF）的方法，用于实现鲁棒的双耳声源定位。 Bing Yang,Hong Liu,Xiaofei Li cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Eugene Wu
title: View Composition Algebra for Ad Hoc Comparison
title_zh: 查看组合代数以进行临时比较
abstract: Comparison is a core task in visual analysis. Although there are numerous guidelines to help users design effective visualizations to aid known comparison tasks, there are few techniques available when users want to make ad hoc comparisons between marks, trends, or charts during data exploration and visual analysis. For instance, to compare voting count maps from different years, two stock trends in a line chart, or a scatterplot of country GDPs with a textual summary of the average GDP. Ideally, users can directly select the comparison targets and compare them, however what elements of a visualization should be candidate targets, which combinations of targets are safe to compare, and what comparison operations make sense? This paper proposes a conceptual model that lets users compose combinations of values, marks, legend elements, and charts using a set of composition operators that summarize, compute differences, merge, and model their operands. We further define a View Composition Algebra (VCA) that is compatible with datacube-based visualizations, derive an interaction design based on this algebra that supports ad hoc visual comparisons, and illustrate its utility through several use cases.
summary: Comparison is a core task in visual analysis. Although there are numerous guidelines to help users design effective visualizations to aid known comparison tasks, there are few techniques available when users want to make ad hoc comparisons between marks, trends, or charts during data exploration and visual analysis. For instance, to compare voting count maps from different years, two stock trends in a line chart, or a scatterplot of country GDPs with a textual summary of the average GDP. Ideally, users can directly select the comparison targets and compare them, however what elements of a visualization should be candidate targets, which combinations of targets are safe to compare, and what comparison operations make sense? This paper proposes a conceptual model that lets users compose combinations of values, marks, legend elements, and charts using a set of composition operators that summarize, compute differences, merge, and model their operands. We further define a View Composition Algebra (VCA) that is compatible with datacube-based visualizations, derive an interaction design based on this algebra that supports ad hoc visual comparisons, and illustrate its utility through several use cases.
abstract_zh: 比较是视觉分析的核心任务。尽管有许多指南可以帮助用户设计有效的可视化以帮助已知的比较任务，但当用户想要在数据探索和可视化分析期间在标记、趋势或图表之间进行临时比较时，可用的技术很少。例如，要比较不同年份的投票计数图、折线图中的两种股票趋势，或带有平均 GDP 文本摘要的国家 GDP 散点图。理想情况下，用户可以直接选择比较目标并进行比较，但是可视化的哪些元素应该是候选目标，哪些目标组合可以安全比较，以及哪些比较操作有意义？本文提出了一种概念模型，允许用户使用一组组合运算符来组合值、标记、图例元素和图表，这些组合运算符可对其操作数进行汇总、计算差异、合并和建模。我们进一步定义了与基于数据立方体的可视化兼容的视图组合代数（VCA），基于该代数导出支持临时视觉比较的交互设计，并通过几个用例说明其实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种视图组合代数（VCA），用于支持用户在数据探索过程中进行临时的可视化比较。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化技术缺乏对用户临时比较需求的支持，例如比较不同年份的地图、股票趋势或散点图与文本摘要，用户难以直接选择比较目标并确定有效比较方式。
AI.method: 构建概念模型，定义组合运算符（总结、差异计算、合并等），并开发兼容数据立方体可视化的视图组合代数（VCA），配套设计交互方法。
AI.result: 通过多个用例验证了VCA在支持临时可视化比较中的有效性，展示了其在实际分析场景中的应用价值。
AI.conclusion: VCA为用户提供了一种结构化的方法，能够灵活组合可视化元素进行临时比较，填补了现有技术在动态比较任务中的空白。

authors_text: Xiangtai Chen,Tao Tang,Jing Ren,Ivan Lee,Honglong Chen,Feng Xia
title: Heterogeneous Graph Learning for Explainable Recommendation over Academic Networks
title_zh: 用于学术网络上可解释推荐的异构图学习
abstract: With the explosive growth of new graduates with research degrees every year, unprecedented challenges arise for early-career researchers to find a job at a suitable institution. This study aims to understand the behavior of academic job transition and hence recommend suitable institutions for PhD graduates. Specifically, we design a deep learning model to predict the career move of early-career researchers and provide suggestions. The design is built on top of scholarly/academic networks, which contains abundant information about scientific collaboration among scholars and institutions. We construct a heterogeneous scholarly network to facilitate the exploring of the behavior of career moves and the recommendation of institutions for scholars. We devise an unsupervised learning model called HAI (Heterogeneous graph Attention InfoMax) which aggregates attention mechanism and mutual information for institution recommendation. Moreover, we propose scholar attention and meta-path attention to discover the hidden relationships between several meta-paths. With these mechanisms, HAI provides ordered recommendations with explainability. We evaluate HAI upon a real-world dataset against baseline methods. Experimental results verify the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach.
summary: With the explosive growth of new graduates with research degrees every year, unprecedented challenges arise for early-career researchers to find a job at a suitable institution. This study aims to understand the behavior of academic job transition and hence recommend suitable institutions for PhD graduates. Specifically, we design a deep learning model to predict the career move of early-career researchers and provide suggestions. The design is built on top of scholarly/academic networks, which contains abundant information about scientific collaboration among scholars and institutions. We construct a heterogeneous scholarly network to facilitate the exploring of the behavior of career moves and the recommendation of institutions for scholars. We devise an unsupervised learning model called HAI (Heterogeneous graph Attention InfoMax) which aggregates attention mechanism and mutual information for institution recommendation. Moreover, we propose scholar attention and meta-path attention to discover the hidden relationships between several meta-paths. With these mechanisms, HAI provides ordered recommendations with explainability. We evaluate HAI upon a real-world dataset against baseline methods. Experimental results verify the effectiveness and efficiency of our approach.
abstract_zh: 随着每年获得研究学位的新毕业生的爆炸性增长，早期职业研究人员在合适的机构找到工作面临着前所未有的挑战。本研究旨在了解学术工作转换的行为，从而为博士毕业生推荐合适的机构。具体来说，我们设计了一个深度学习模型来预测早期职业研究人员的职业发展并提供建议。该设计建立在学术/学术网络之上，其中包含有关学者和机构之间科学合作的丰富信息。我们构建了一个异构学术网络，以促进职业变动行为的探索和学者机构的推荐。我们设计了一种名为 HAI（异构图注意力 InfoMax）的无监督学习模型，它聚合了注意力机制和互信息以进行机构推荐。此外，我们提出学者注意力和元路径注意力来发现多个元路径之间的隐藏关系。通过这些机制，HAI 提供具有可解释性的有序推荐。我们根据基线方法在现实世界数据集上评估 HAI。实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建异构学术网络和设计HAI模型，为博士毕业生提供可解释的学术机构推荐方案。
AI.motivation: 随着高学历毕业生数量激增，初级研究人员面临就业机构选择难题，现有推荐方法缺乏可解释性且难以捕捉学术网络中的复杂关系。
AI.method: 提出HAI模型（异构图注意力InfoMax），结合注意力机制与互信息理论，通过学者注意力和元路径注意力挖掘学术网络中的隐含关联，实现可解释的机构推荐。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，HAI模型在推荐准确率和效率上优于基线方法，且能提供可解释的推荐依据。
AI.conclusion: HAI模型通过异构图学习有效捕捉学术网络动态，为学术职业推荐提供了兼具准确性与可解释性的解决方案。

authors_text: Furkan Luleci,F. Necati Catbas,Onur Avci
title: CycleGAN for Undamaged-to-Damaged Domain Translation for Structural Health Monitoring and Damage Detection
title_zh: 用于结构健康监测和损坏检测的未损坏到损坏域转换的 CycleGAN
abstract: The recent advances in the data science field in the last few decades have benefitted many other fields including Structural Health Monitoring (SHM). Particularly, Artificial Intelligence (AI) such as Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL) methods for vibration-based damage diagnostics of civil structures has been utilized extensively due to the observed high performances in learning from data. Along with diagnostics, damage prognostics is also vitally important for estimating the remaining useful life of civil structures. Currently, AI-based data-driven methods used for damage diagnostics and prognostics centered on historical data of the structures and require a substantial amount of data for prediction models. Although some of these methods are generative-based models, they are used to perform ML or DL tasks such as classification, regression, clustering, etc. after learning the distribution of the data. In this study, a variant of Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), Cycle-Consistent Wasserstein Deep Convolutional GAN with Gradient Penalty (CycleWDCGAN-GP) model is developed to investigate the "transition of structural dynamic signature from an undamaged-to-damaged state" and "if this transition can be employed for predictive damage detection". The outcomes of this study demonstrate that the proposed model can accurately generate damaged responses from undamaged responses or vice versa. In other words, it will be possible to understand the damaged condition while the structure is still in a healthy (undamaged) condition or vice versa with the proposed methodology. This will enable a more proactive approach in overseeing the life-cycle performance as well as in predicting the remaining useful life of structures.

abstract_zh: 过去几十年来数据科学领域的最新进展使包括结构健康监测（SHM）在内的许多其他领域受益。特别是，用于土木结构基于振动的损伤诊断的机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）等人工智能（AI）方法由于在数据学习方面表现出高性能而得到了广泛应用。除了诊断之外，损坏预测对于估计土木结构的剩余使用寿命也至关重要。目前，基于人工智能的数据驱动方法用于损伤诊断和预测，以结构的历史数据为中心，需要大量数据来建立预测模型。尽管其中一些方法是基于生成的模型，但它们用于在学习数据分布后执行 ML 或 DL 任务，例如分类、回归、聚类等。在本研究中，开发了生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的变体、具有梯度惩罚的循环一致 Wasserstein 深度卷积 GAN (CycleWDCGAN-GP) 模型，以研究“结构动态特征从未损坏状态到损坏状态的转变”以及“这种转变是否可用于预测性损伤检测”。这项研究的结果表明，所提出的模型可以准确地从未损坏的响应生成损坏的响应，反之亦然。换句话说，利用所提出的方法，可以在结构仍处于健康（未损坏）状态时了解损坏情况，反之亦然。这将使我们能够采取更主动的方法来监督生命周期性能以及预测结构的剩余使用寿命。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用CycleGAN模型实现结构健康监测中未损坏到损坏的领域转换，以实现预测性损伤检测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人工智能的损伤诊断方法依赖大量历史数据，且难以在结构未受损时预测损伤状态，需更主动的监测手段。
AI.method: 开发了基于循环一致Wasserstein深度卷积GAN（CycleWDCGAN-GP）的生成对抗网络模型，实现未损坏与损坏状态的动态特征转换。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型能准确从未损坏响应生成损坏响应，或反之，从而在结构健康状态下预判损伤情况。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为结构全生命周期性能监控和剩余寿命预测提供了更主动的解决方案。

authors_text: Romain Cosentino,Randall Balestriero,Yanis Bahroun,Anirvan Sengupta,Richard Baraniuk,Behnaam Aazhang
title: Spatial Transformer K-Means
title_zh: 空间变换器 K 均值
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.09743
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.09743
abstract: K-means defines one of the most employed centroid-based clustering algorithms with performances tied to the data's embedding. Intricate data embeddings have been designed to push $K$-means performances at the cost of reduced theoretical guarantees and interpretability of the results. Instead, we propose preserving the intrinsic data space and augment K-means with a similarity measure invariant to non-rigid transformations. This enables (i) the reduction of intrinsic nuisances associated with the data, reducing the complexity of the clustering task and increasing performances and producing state-of-the-art results, (ii) clustering in the input space of the data, leading to a fully interpretable clustering algorithm, and (iii) the benefit of convergence guarantees.
summary: K-means defines one of the most employed centroid-based clustering algorithms with performances tied to the data's embedding. Intricate data embeddings have been designed to push $K$-means performances at the cost of reduced theoretical guarantees and interpretability of the results. Instead, we propose preserving the intrinsic data space and augment K-means with a similarity measure invariant to non-rigid transformations. This enables (i) the reduction of intrinsic nuisances associated with the data, reducing the complexity of the clustering task and increasing performances and producing state-of-the-art results, (ii) clustering in the input space of the data, leading to a fully interpretable clustering algorithm, and (iii) the benefit of convergence guarantees.
abstract_zh: K-means 定义了最常用的基于质心的聚类算法之一，其性能与数据的嵌入相关。复杂的数据嵌入旨在以降低理论保证和结果可解释性为代价来推动 $K$ 的性能。相反，我们建议保留内在数据空间并使用对非刚性变换不变的相似性度量来增强 K 均值。这使得（i）减少与数据相关的内在麻烦，降低聚类任务的复杂性并提高性能并产生最先进的结果，（ii）在数据的输入空间中进行聚类，从而形成完全可解释的聚类算法，以及（iii）收敛保证的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的K-means算法，通过引入对非刚性变换不变的相似度量，在保持数据固有空间的同时提升聚类性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统K-means性能依赖数据嵌入，而复杂嵌入虽提升效果却牺牲了理论保证与结果可解释性，需寻找兼顾性能与可解释性的方法。
AI.method: 在K-means中引入空间变换不变的相似度量，直接在输入空间进行聚类，减少数据内在干扰并保留收敛性保证。
AI.result: 实现聚类性能提升，达到最先进水平，同时保持算法在输入空间的完全可解释性与收敛性保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了聚类性能与可解释性，为后续研究提供了理论支持与实用方向。

authors_text: Gledson Melotti,Cristiano Premebida,Jordan J. Bird,Diego R. Faria,Nuno Gonçalves
title: Reducing Overconfidence Predictions for Autonomous Driving Perception
title_zh: 减少对自动驾驶感知的过度自信预测
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Access
comments: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Access
abstract: In state-of-the-art deep learning for object recognition, SoftMax and Sigmoid functions are most commonly employed as the predictor outputs. Such layers often produce overconfident predictions rather than proper probabilistic scores, which can thus harm the decision-making of `critical' perception systems applied in autonomous driving and robotics. Given this, the experiments in this work propose a probabilistic approach based on distributions calculated out of the Logit layer scores of pre-trained networks. We demonstrate that Maximum Likelihood (ML) and Maximum a-Posteriori (MAP) functions are more suitable for probabilistic interpretations than SoftMax and Sigmoid-based predictions for object recognition. We explore distinct sensor modalities via RGB images and LiDARs (RV: range-view) data from the KITTI and Lyft Level-5 datasets, where our approach shows promising performance compared to the usual SoftMax and Sigmoid layers, with the benefit of enabling interpretable probabilistic predictions. Another advantage of the approach introduced in this paper is that the ML and MAP functions can be implemented in existing trained networks, that is, the approach benefits from the output of the Logit layer of pre-trained networks. Thus, there is no need to carry out a new training phase since the ML and MAP functions are used in the test/prediction phase.
summary: In state-of-the-art deep learning for object recognition, SoftMax and Sigmoid functions are most commonly employed as the predictor outputs. Such layers often produce overconfident predictions rather than proper probabilistic scores, which can thus harm the decision-making of `critical' perception systems applied in autonomous driving and robotics. Given this, the experiments in this work propose a probabilistic approach based on distributions calculated out of the Logit layer scores of pre-trained networks. We demonstrate that Maximum Likelihood (ML) and Maximum a-Posteriori (MAP) functions are more suitable for probabilistic interpretations than SoftMax and Sigmoid-based predictions for object recognition. We explore distinct sensor modalities via RGB images and LiDARs (RV: range-view) data from the KITTI and Lyft Level-5 datasets, where our approach shows promising performance compared to the usual SoftMax and Sigmoid layers, with the benefit of enabling interpretable probabilistic predictions. Another advantage of the approach introduced in this paper is that the ML and MAP functions can be implemented in existing trained networks, that is, the approach benefits from the output of the Logit layer of pre-trained networks. Thus, there is no need to carry out a new training phase since the ML and MAP functions are used in the test/prediction phase.
abstract_zh: 在最先进的对象识别深度学习中，SoftMax 和 Sigmoid 函数最常用作预测器输出。这些层通常会产生过于自信的预测，而不是适当的概率分数，从而损害自动驾驶和机器人技术中应用的“关键”感知系统的决策。鉴于此，这项工作中的实验提出了一种基于根据预训练网络的 Logit 层分数计算出的分布的概率方法。我们证明最大似然 (ML) 和最大后验 (MAP) 函数比 SoftMax 和基于 Sigmoid 的对象识别预测更适合概率解释。我们通过来自 KITTI 和 Lyft Level-5 数据集的 RGB 图像和 LiDAR（RV：范围视图）数据探索不同的传感器模式，与通常的 SoftMax 和 Sigmoid 层相比，我们的方法显示出有希望的性能，并具有实现可解释的概率预测的好处。本文介绍的方法的另一个优点是ML和MAP功能可以在现有的训练网络中实现，也就是说，该方法受益于预训练网络的Logit层的输出。因此，由于在测试/预测阶段使用了 ML 和 MAP 函数，因此无需执行新的训练阶段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概率方法，通过使用最大似然（ML）和最大后验（MAP）函数替代SoftMax和Sigmoid函数，以降低自动驾驶感知系统中的过自信预测问题。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习中常用的SoftMax和Sigmoid函数会产生过自信的预测结果，这可能对自动驾驶等关键感知系统造成决策风险，因此需要更可靠的概率预测方法。
AI.method: 基于预训练网络的Logit层输出，通过ML和MAP函数计算概率分布，结合KITTI和Lyft Level-5数据集的RGB图像和LiDAR数据进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，ML和MAP方法在预测性能上优于传统SoftMax/Sigmoid层，且无需重新训练模型即可实现可解释的概率预测。
AI.conclusion: ML/MAP方法能有效降低预测过自信问题，适用于现有预训练网络，为自动驾驶感知系统提供更安全可靠的概率输出。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种概率方法，通过使用最大似然（ML）和最大后验（MAP）函数替代SoftMax和Sigmoid函数，以降低自动驾驶感知系统中的过自信预测问题。

search_text: Reducing Overconfidence Predictions for Autonomous Driving Perception 减少对自动驾驶感知的过度自信预测 In state-of-the-art deep learning for object recognition, SoftMax and Sigmoid functions are most commonly employed as the predictor outputs. Such layers often produce overconfident predictions rather than proper probabilistic scores, which can thus harm the decision-making of `critical' perception systems applied in autonomous driving and robotics. Given this, the experiments in this work propose a probabilistic approach based on distributions calculated out of the Logit layer scores of pre-trained networks. We demonstrate that Maximum Likelihood (ML) and Maximum a-Posteriori (MAP) functions are more suitable for probabilistic interpretations than SoftMax and Sigmoid-based predictions for object recognition. We explore distinct sensor modalities via RGB images and LiDARs (RV: range-view) data from the KITTI and Lyft Level-5 datasets, where our approach shows promising performance compared to the usual SoftMax and Sigmoid layers, with the benefit of enabling interpretable probabilistic predictions. Another advantage of the approach introduced in this paper is that the ML and MAP functions can be implemented in existing trained networks, that is, the approach benefits from the output of the Logit layer of pre-trained networks. Thus, there is no need to carry out a new training phase since the ML and MAP functions are used in the test/prediction phase. 在最先进的对象识别深度学习中，SoftMax 和 Sigmoid 函数最常用作预测器输出。这些层通常会产生过于自信的预测，而不是适当的概率分数，从而损害自动驾驶和机器人技术中应用的“关键”感知系统的决策。鉴于此，这项工作中的实验提出了一种基于根据预训练网络的 Logit 层分数计算出的分布的概率方法。我们证明最大似然 (ML) 和最大后验 (MAP) 函数比 SoftMax 和基于 Sigmoid 的对象识别预测更适合概率解释。我们通过来自 KITTI 和 Lyft Level-5 数据集的 RGB 图像和 LiDAR（RV：范围视图）数据探索不同的传感器模式，与通常的 SoftMax 和 Sigmoid 层相比，我们的方法显示出有希望的性能，并具有实现可解释的概率预测的好处。本文介绍的方法的另一个优点是ML和MAP功能可以在现有的训练网络中实现，也就是说，该方法受益于预训练网络的Logit层的输出。因此，由于在测试/预测阶段使用了 ML 和 MAP 函数，因此无需执行新的训练阶段。 本文提出一种概率方法，通过使用最大似然（ML）和最大后验（MAP）函数替代SoftMax和Sigmoid函数，以降低自动驾驶感知系统中的过自信预测问题。 Gledson Melotti,Cristiano Premebida,Jordan J. Bird,Diego R. Faria,Nuno Gonçalves cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhenhua Xu,Yuxuan Liu,Lu Gan,Yuxiang Sun,Xinyu Wu,Ming Liu,Lujia Wang
title: RNGDet: Road Network Graph Detection by Transformer in Aerial Images
title_zh: RNGDet：航空图像中 Transformer 的道路网络图检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
abstract: Road network graphs provide critical information for autonomous-vehicle applications, such as drivable areas that can be used for motion planning algorithms. To find road network graphs, manually annotation is usually inefficient and labor-intensive. Automatically detecting road network graphs could alleviate this issue, but existing works still have some limitations. For example, segmentation-based approaches could not ensure satisfactory topology correctness, and graph-based approaches could not present precise enough detection results. To provide a solution to these problems, we propose a novel approach based on transformer and imitation learning in this paper. In view of that high-resolution aerial images could be easily accessed all over the world nowadays, we make use of aerial images in our approach. Taken as input an aerial image, our approach iteratively generates road network graphs vertex-by-vertex. Our approach can handle complicated intersection points with various numbers of incident road segments. We evaluate our approach on a publicly available dataset. The superiority of our approach is demonstrated through the comparative experiments. Our work is accompanied with a demonstration video which is available at \url{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/RNGDet/}.
summary: Road network graphs provide critical information for autonomous-vehicle applications, such as drivable areas that can be used for motion planning algorithms. To find road network graphs, manually annotation is usually inefficient and labor-intensive. Automatically detecting road network graphs could alleviate this issue, but existing works still have some limitations. For example, segmentation-based approaches could not ensure satisfactory topology correctness, and graph-based approaches could not present precise enough detection results. To provide a solution to these problems, we propose a novel approach based on transformer and imitation learning in this paper. In view of that high-resolution aerial images could be easily accessed all over the world nowadays, we make use of aerial images in our approach. Taken as input an aerial image, our approach iteratively generates road network graphs vertex-by-vertex. Our approach can handle complicated intersection points with various numbers of incident road segments. We evaluate our approach on a publicly available dataset. The superiority of our approach is demonstrated through the comparative experiments. Our work is accompanied with a demonstration video which is available at \url{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/RNGDet/}.
abstract_zh: 道路网络图为自动驾驶汽车应用提供关键信息，例如可用于运动规划算法的可行驶区域。为了查找路网图，手动注释通常效率低下且耗费人力。自动检测路网图可以缓解这个问题，但现有的工作仍然存在一些局限性。例如，基于分割的方法无法确保令人满意的拓扑正确性，基于图的方法无法提供足够精确的检测结果。为了解决这些问题，我们在本文中提出了一种基于变压器和模仿学习的新方法。鉴于当今世界各地都可以轻松获取高分辨率航空图像，我们在我们的方法中使用了航空图像。将航拍图像作为输入，我们的方法会逐个迭代地生成道路网络图。我们的方法可以处理具有不同数量的事件路段的复杂交叉点。我们在公开数据集上评估我们的方法。通过比较实验证明了我们方法的优越性。我们的工作附有演示视频，可在 \url{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/RNGDet/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的航拍图像道路网络图检测方法RNGDet，通过模仿学习逐顶点生成道路网络图。
AI.motivation: 现有道路网络检测方法存在拓扑正确性不足或检测精度不够的问题，而手动标注效率低且耗时。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构结合模仿学习，利用高分辨率航拍图像逐顶点生成道路网络图，可处理复杂交叉点。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上通过对比实验验证了方法优越性，并提供演示视频展示检测效果。
AI.conclusion: RNGDet有效解决了道路网络检测中的拓扑与精度问题，为自动驾驶等应用提供可靠的道路网络信息。

authors_text: Fereshteh Yousefirizi,Ian Janzen,Natalia Dubljevic,Yueh-En Liu,Chloe Hill,Calum MacAulay,Arman Rahmim
title: Segmentation and Risk Score Prediction of Head and Neck Cancers in PET/CT Volumes with 3D U-Net and Cox Proportional Hazard Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用 3D U-Net 和 Cox 比例风险神经网络对 PET/CT 体积中的头颈癌进行分割和风险评分预测
abstract: We utilized a 3D nnU-Net model with residual layers supplemented by squeeze and excitation (SE) normalization for tumor segmentation from PET/CT images provided by the Head and Neck Tumor segmentation chal-lenge (HECKTOR). Our proposed loss function incorporates the Unified Fo-cal and Mumford-Shah losses to take the advantage of distribution, region, and boundary-based loss functions. The results of leave-one-out-center-cross-validation performed on different centers showed a segmentation performance of 0.82 average Dice score (DSC) and 3.16 median Hausdorff Distance (HD), and our results on the test set achieved 0.77 DSC and 3.01 HD. Following lesion segmentation, we proposed training a case-control proportional hazard Cox model with an MLP neural net backbone to predict the hazard risk score for each discrete lesion. This hazard risk prediction model (CoxCC) was to be trained on a number of PET/CT radiomic features extracted from the segmented lesions, patient and lesion demographics, and encoder features provided from the penultimate layer of a multi-input 2D PET/CT convolutional neural network tasked with predicting time-to-event for each lesion. A 10-fold cross-validated CoxCC model resulted in a c-index validation score of 0.89, and a c-index score of 0.61 on the HECKTOR challenge test dataset.
summary: We utilized a 3D nnU-Net model with residual layers supplemented by squeeze and excitation (SE) normalization for tumor segmentation from PET/CT images provided by the Head and Neck Tumor segmentation chal-lenge (HECKTOR). Our proposed loss function incorporates the Unified Fo-cal and Mumford-Shah losses to take the advantage of distribution, region, and boundary-based loss functions. The results of leave-one-out-center-cross-validation performed on different centers showed a segmentation performance of 0.82 average Dice score (DSC) and 3.16 median Hausdorff Distance (HD), and our results on the test set achieved 0.77 DSC and 3.01 HD. Following lesion segmentation, we proposed training a case-control proportional hazard Cox model with an MLP neural net backbone to predict the hazard risk score for each discrete lesion. This hazard risk prediction model (CoxCC) was to be trained on a number of PET/CT radiomic features extracted from the segmented lesions, patient and lesion demographics, and encoder features provided from the penultimate layer of a multi-input 2D PET/CT convolutional neural network tasked with predicting time-to-event for each lesion. A 10-fold cross-validated CoxCC model resulted in a c-index validation score of 0.89, and a c-index score of 0.61 on the HECKTOR challenge test dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们利用带有残余层的 3D nnU-Net 模型，辅以挤压和激励 (SE) 归一化，对头颈肿瘤分割挑战 (HECKTOR) 提供的 PET/CT 图像进行肿瘤分割。我们提出的损失函数结合了 Unified Fo-cal 和 Mumford-Shah 损失，以利用分布、区域和基于边界的损失函数。在不同中心进行的留一中心交叉验证的结果显示，分割性能为 0.82 平均 Dice 得分（DSC）和 3.16 中位数 Hausdorff 距离（HD），并且我们在测试集上的结果达到了 0.77 DSC 和 3.01 HD。病变分割后，我们建议使用 MLP 神经网络主干训练病例对照比例风险 Cox 模型，以预测每个离散病变的危险风险评分。该危险风险预测模型 (CoxCC) 将根据从分段病变、患者和病变人口统计数据中提取的许多 PET/CT 放射组学特征以及从多输入 2D PET/CT 卷积神经网络的倒数第二层提供的编码器特征进行训练，该神经网络的任务是预测每个病变的事件发生时间。 10 倍交叉验证的 CoxCC 模型的 c 指数验证得分为 0.89，在 HECKTOR 挑战测试数据集上的 c 指数得分为 0.61。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合3D U-Net和Cox比例风险神经网络的方法，用于头颈癌PET/CT影像的肿瘤分割及风险评分预测。
AI.motivation: 头颈癌的精准分割与预后评估对临床治疗至关重要，但现有方法在复杂解剖结构和多中心数据中存在分割精度不足及风险预测模型泛化能力弱的问题。
AI.method: 采用带残差层和SE归一化的3D nnU-Net进行肿瘤分割，融合Unified Focal与Mumford-Shah损失函数；基于分割结果，利用包含MLP的Cox比例风险模型（CoxCC），结合影像组学特征、患者信息及编码器特征预测病变风险评分。
AI.result: 分割任务在测试集上达到0.77 Dice系数和3.01 HD中位数；风险预测模型在10折交叉验证中c-index为0.89，HECKTOR测试集上c-index为0.61。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在多中心数据中实现了具有竞争力的分割性能和风险预测能力，为头颈癌的个体化诊疗提供了技术支撑。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合3D U-Net和Cox比例风险神经网络的方法，用于头颈癌PET/CT影像的肿瘤分割及风险评分预测。
motivation: 头颈癌的精准分割与预后评估对临床治疗至关重要，但现有方法在复杂解剖结构和多中心数据中存在分割精度不足及风险预测模型泛化能力弱的问题。
method: 采用带残差层和SE归一化的3D nnU-Net进行肿瘤分割，融合Unified Focal与Mumford-Shah损失函数；基于分割结果，利用包含MLP的Cox比例风险模型（CoxCC），结合影像组学特征、患者信息及编码器特征预测病变风险评分。
result: 分割任务在测试集上达到0.77 Dice系数和3.01 HD中位数；风险预测模型在10折交叉验证中c-index为0.89，HECKTOR测试集上c-index为0.61。
conclusion: 所提方法在多中心数据中实现了具有竞争力的分割性能和风险预测能力，为头颈癌的个体化诊疗提供了技术支撑。
search_text: Segmentation and Risk Score Prediction of Head and Neck Cancers in PET/CT Volumes with 3D U-Net and Cox Proportional Hazard Neural Networks 使用 3D U-Net 和 Cox 比例风险神经网络对 PET/CT 体积中的头颈癌进行分割和风险评分预测 We utilized a 3D nnU-Net model with residual layers supplemented by squeeze and excitation (SE) normalization for tumor segmentation from PET/CT images provided by the Head and Neck Tumor segmentation chal-lenge (HECKTOR). Our proposed loss function incorporates the Unified Fo-cal and Mumford-Shah losses to take the advantage of distribution, region, and boundary-based loss functions. The results of leave-one-out-center-cross-validation performed on different centers showed a segmentation performance of 0.82 average Dice score (DSC) and 3.16 median Hausdorff Distance (HD), and our results on the test set achieved 0.77 DSC and 3.01 HD. Following lesion segmentation, we proposed training a case-control proportional hazard Cox model with an MLP neural net backbone to predict the hazard risk score for each discrete lesion. This hazard risk prediction model (CoxCC) was to be trained on a number of PET/CT radiomic features extracted from the segmented lesions, patient and lesion demographics, and encoder features provided from the penultimate layer of a multi-input 2D PET/CT convolutional neural network tasked with predicting time-to-event for each lesion. A 10-fold cross-validated CoxCC model resulted in a c-index validation score of 0.89, and a c-index score of 0.61 on the HECKTOR challenge test dataset. 我们利用带有残余层的 3D nnU-Net 模型，辅以挤压和激励 (SE) 归一化，对头颈肿瘤分割挑战 (HECKTOR) 提供的 PET/CT 图像进行肿瘤分割。我们提出的损失函数结合了 Unified Fo-cal 和 Mumford-Shah 损失，以利用分布、区域和基于边界的损失函数。在不同中心进行的留一中心交叉验证的结果显示，分割性能为 0.82 平均 Dice 得分（DSC）和 3.16 中位数 Hausdorff 距离（HD），并且我们在测试集上的结果达到了 0.77 DSC 和 3.01 HD。病变分割后，我们建议使用 MLP 神经网络主干训练病例对照比例风险 Cox 模型，以预测每个离散病变的危险风险评分。该危险风险预测模型 (CoxCC) 将根据从分段病变、患者和病变人口统计数据中提取的许多 PET/CT 放射组学特征以及从多输入 2D PET/CT 卷积神经网络的倒数第二层提供的编码器特征进行训练，该神经网络的任务是预测每个病变的事件发生时间。 10 倍交叉验证的 CoxCC 模型的 c 指数验证得分为 0.89，在 HECKTOR 挑战测试数据集上的 c 指数得分为 0.61。 本文提出了一种结合3D U-Net和Cox比例风险神经网络的方法，用于头颈癌PET/CT影像的肿瘤分割及风险评分预测。 Fereshteh Yousefirizi,Ian Janzen,Natalia Dubljevic,Yueh-En Liu,Chloe Hill,Calum MacAulay,Arman Rahmim physics.med-ph,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Wenwei Zhao,Pingli Ma,Chen Li,Xiaoning Bu,Shuojia Zou,Tao Jiang,Marcin Grzegorzek
title: A Survey of Semen Quality Evaluation in Microscopic Videos Using Computer Assisted Sperm Analysis
title_zh: 使用计算机辅助精子分析在显微视频中评估精液质量的调查
abstract: The Computer Assisted Sperm Analysis (CASA) plays a crucial role in male reproductive health diagnosis and Infertility treatment. With the development of the computer industry in recent years, a great of accurate algorithms are proposed. With the assistance of those novel algorithms, it is possible for CASA to achieve a faster and higher quality result. Since image processing is the technical basis of CASA, including pre-processing,feature extraction, target detection and tracking, these methods are important technical steps in dealing with CASA. The various works related to Computer Assisted Sperm Analysis methods in the last 30 years (since 1988) are comprehensively introduced and analysed in this survey. To facilitate understanding, the methods involved are analysed in the sequence of general steps in sperm analysis. In other words, the methods related to sperm detection (localization) are first analysed, and then the methods of sperm tracking are analysed. Beside this, we analyse and prospect the present situation and future of CASA. According to our work, the feasible for applying in sperm microscopic video of methods mentioned in this review is explained. Moreover, existing challenges of object detection and tracking in microscope video are potential to be solved inspired by this survey.

Moreover, existing challenges of object detection and tracking in microscope video are potential to be solved inspired by this survey.
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助精子分析（CASA）在男性生殖健康诊断和不育症治疗中发挥着至关重要的作用。近年来，随着计算机工业的发展，提出了大量的精确算法。在这些新颖算法的帮助下，CASA 能够获得更快、更高质量的结果。由于图像处理是CASA的技术基础，包括预处理、特征提取、目标检测和跟踪等，这些方法是处理CASA的重要技术步骤。本次调查全面介绍和分析了近30年来（自1988年以来）与计算机辅助精子分析方法相关的各种工作。为了便于理解，按照精子分析的一般步骤顺序对所涉及的方法进行分析。换句话说，首先分析与精子检测（定位）相关的方法，然后分析精子追踪的方法。除此之外，我们对CASA的现状和未来进行了分析和展望。根据我们的工作，解释了本综述中提到的方法在精子显微视频中应用的可行性。此外，受本次调查的启发，显微镜视频中物体检测和跟踪的现有挑战有可能得到解决。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去30年计算机辅助精子分析（CASA）在微观视频中评估精液质量的方法，分析了图像处理的关键技术步骤。
AI.motivation: 随着计算机技术的发展，CASA在男性生殖健康诊断和不孕治疗中发挥重要作用，亟需系统梳理现有算法以提升分析效率和准确性。
AI.method: 按精子分析的通用流程（检测→追踪）分类综述相关方法，并分析当前技术挑战与未来发展方向。
AI.result: 阐明了适用于微观视频的可行方法，指出目标检测与追踪中的现存挑战，并提出潜在解决方案方向。
AI.conclusion: CASA技术已取得显著进展，但微观视频中的精子检测与追踪仍需进一步优化，本文为后续研究提供了系统性参考。

authors_text: Matheus M. Dos Santos,Giovanni G. De Giacomo,Paulo L. J. Drews-Jr,Silvia S. C. Botelho
title: Cross-view and Cross-domain Underwater Localization based on Optical Aerial and Acoustic Underwater Images
title_zh: 基于水下光航图和声学图像的跨视域跨域水下定位
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) for possible publication
abstract: Cross-view image matches have been widely explored on terrestrial image localization using aerial images from drones or satellites. This study expands the cross-view image match idea and proposes a cross-domain and cross-view localization framework. The method identifies the correlation between color aerial images and underwater acoustic images to improve the localization of underwater vehicles that travel in partially structured environments such as harbors and marinas. The approach is validated on a real dataset acquired by an underwater vehicle in a marina. The results show an improvement in the localization when compared to the dead reckoning of the vehicle.
summary: Cross-view image matches have been widely explored on terrestrial image localization using aerial images from drones or satellites. This study expands the cross-view image match idea and proposes a cross-domain and cross-view localization framework. The method identifies the correlation between color aerial images and underwater acoustic images to improve the localization of underwater vehicles that travel in partially structured environments such as harbors and marinas. The approach is validated on a real dataset acquired by an underwater vehicle in a marina. The results show an improvement in the localization when compared to the dead reckoning of the vehicle.
abstract_zh: 使用无人机或卫星的航空图像进行地面图像定位时，交叉视图图像匹配已被广泛探索。本研究扩展了跨视图图像匹配思想，提出了跨域和跨视图定位框架。该方法识别彩色航空图像和水下声学图像之间的相关性，以改善在港口和码头等部分结构化环境中行驶的水下航行器的定位。该方法在码头水下航行器获取的真实数据集上进行了验证。结果表明，与车辆的航位推算相比，定位能力有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光学航空图像与声学水下图像的跨域跨视图定位方法，用于提升水下车辆在港口等结构化环境中的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统水下定位依赖死 reckoning 方法存在误差累积问题，而陆地跨视图匹配技术尚未有效应用于水下场景，需探索多模态图像融合的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建跨域跨视图框架，通过建立航空光学图像与水下声学图像的关联性，利用多模态特征匹配实现水下定位优化。
AI.result: 在港口实测数据集上验证，相比死 reckoning 方法，定位精度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 跨域跨视图匹配方法可有效提升水下定位性能，为复杂水下环境定位提供新思路。

authors_text: Yi Ren,Ming Lei,Zhiying Huang,Shiliang Zhang,Qian Chen,Zhijie Yan,Zhou Zhao
title: ProsoSpeech: Enhancing Prosody With Quantized Vector Pre-training in Text-to-Speech
title_zh: ProsoSpeech：通过文本转语音中的量化向量预训练增强韵律
abstract: Expressive text-to-speech (TTS) has become a hot research topic recently, mainly focusing on modeling prosody in speech. Prosody modeling has several challenges: 1) the extracted pitch used in previous prosody modeling works have inevitable errors, which hurts the prosody modeling; 2) different attributes of prosody (e.g., pitch, duration and energy) are dependent on each other and produce the natural prosody together; and 3) due to high variability of prosody and the limited amount of high-quality data for TTS training, the distribution of prosody cannot be fully shaped. To tackle these issues, we propose ProsoSpeech, which enhances the prosody using quantized latent vectors pre-trained on large-scale unpaired and low-quality text and speech data. Specifically, we first introduce a word-level prosody encoder, which quantizes the low-frequency band of the speech and compresses prosody attributes in the latent prosody vector (LPV). Then we introduce an LPV predictor, which predicts LPV given word sequence. We pre-train the LPV predictor on large-scale text and low-quality speech data and fine-tune it on the high-quality TTS dataset. Finally, our model can generate expressive speech conditioned on the predicted LPV. Experimental results show that ProsoSpeech can generate speech with richer prosody compared with baseline methods.
summary: Expressive text-to-speech (TTS) has become a hot research topic recently, mainly focusing on modeling prosody in speech. Prosody modeling has several challenges: 1) the extracted pitch used in previous prosody modeling works have inevitable errors, which hurts the prosody modeling; 2) different attributes of prosody (e.g., pitch, duration and energy) are dependent on each other and produce the natural prosody together; and 3) due to high variability of prosody and the limited amount of high-quality data for TTS training, the distribution of prosody cannot be fully shaped. To tackle these issues, we propose ProsoSpeech, which enhances the prosody using quantized latent vectors pre-trained on large-scale unpaired and low-quality text and speech data. Specifically, we first introduce a word-level prosody encoder, which quantizes the low-frequency band of the speech and compresses prosody attributes in the latent prosody vector (LPV). Then we introduce an LPV predictor, which predicts LPV given word sequence. We pre-train the LPV predictor on large-scale text and low-quality speech data and fine-tune it on the high-quality TTS dataset. Finally, our model can generate expressive speech conditioned on the predicted LPV. Experimental results show that ProsoSpeech can generate speech with richer prosody compared with baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 表达性文本转语音（TTS）最近成为一个热门研究课题，主要集中在语音韵律建模。韵律建模面临几个挑战：1）以往韵律建模工作中使用的提取音调存在不可避免的错误，这损害了韵律建模； 2）韵律的不同属性（如音高、时长、能量）相互依赖，共同产生自然韵律； 3）由于韵律的高度变异性和TTS训练的高质量数据有限，无法完全塑造韵律的分布。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 ProsoSpeech，它使用在大规模不成对和低质量的文本和语音数据上预先训练的量化潜在向量来增强韵律。具体来说，我们首先引入一个词级韵律编码器，它量化语音的低频频带并压缩潜在韵律向量（LPV）中的韵律属性。然后我们引入一个 LPV 预测器，它可以预测给定单词序列的 LPV。我们在大规模文本和低质量语音数据上预训练 LPV 预测器，并在高质量 TTS 数据集上对其进行微调。最后，我们的模型可以根据预测的 LPV 生成富有表现力的语音。实验结果表明，与基线方法相比，ProsoSpeech 可以生成韵律更丰富的语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProsoSpeech方法，通过量化向量预训练增强文本到语音合成中的韵律建模。
AI.motivation: 现有韵律建模面临三大挑战：1）提取的基频存在误差；2）韵律属性间存在依赖关系；3）高质量数据不足导致韵律分布不完整。
AI.method: 设计词级韵律编码器量化语音低频带生成潜在韵律向量（LPV），构建LPV预测器在大规模文本和低质量语音数据上预训练，再在高质量数据集微调，最终基于预测LPV生成语音。
AI.result: 实验表明ProsoSpeech生成的语音在韵律丰富度上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化向量预训练和属性间依赖建模，ProsoSpeech有效提升了韵律表现，为高质量TTS提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aakash Kumar
title: Applying adversarial networks to increase the data efficiency and reliability of Self-Driving Cars
title_zh: 应用对抗网络提高自动驾驶汽车的数据效率和可靠性
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are vulnerable to misclassifying images when small perturbations are present. With the increasing prevalence of CNNs in self-driving cars, it is vital to ensure these algorithms are robust to prevent collisions from occurring due to failure in recognizing a situation. In the Adversarial Self-Driving framework, a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) is implemented to generate realistic perturbations in an image that cause a classifier CNN to misclassify data. This perturbed data is then used to train the classifier CNN further. The Adversarial Self-driving framework is applied to an image classification algorithm to improve the classification accuracy on perturbed images and is later applied to train a self-driving car to drive in a simulation. A small-scale self-driving car is also built to drive around a track and classify signs. The Adversarial Self-driving framework produces perturbed images through learning a dataset, as a result removing the need to train on significant amounts of data. Experiments demonstrate that the Adversarial Self-driving framework identifies situations where CNNs are vulnerable to perturbations and generates new examples of these situations for the CNN to train on. The additional data generated by the Adversarial Self-driving framework provides sufficient data for the CNN to generalize to the environment. Therefore, it is a viable tool to increase the resilience of CNNs to perturbations. Particularly, in the real-world self-driving car, the application of the Adversarial Self-Driving framework resulted in an 18 % increase in accuracy, and the simulated self-driving model had no collisions in 30 minutes of driving.

abstract_zh: 当存在小扰动时，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 很容易对图像进行错误分类。随着 CNN 在自动驾驶汽车中的日益普及，确保这些算法的稳健性以防止因无法识别情况而发生碰撞至关重要。在对抗性自驱动框架中，实现了生成对抗网络 (GAN)，以在图像中生成真实的扰动，从而导致分类器 CNN 对数据进行错误分类。然后使用这些扰动数据进一步训练 CNN 分类器。对抗性自动驾驶框架应用于图像分类算法，以提高扰动图像的分类精度，随后应用于训练自动驾驶汽车进行模拟驾驶。还制造了一辆小型自动驾驶汽车，用于绕赛道行驶并对标志进行分类。对抗性自动驾驶框架通过学习数据集来生成扰动图像，从而消除了对大量数据进行训练的需要。实验表明，对抗性自动驾驶框架可以识别 CNN 容易受到扰动的情况，并生成这些情况的新示例供 CNN 进行训练。对抗性自动驾驶框架生成的额外数据为 CNN 提供了足够的数据来推广到环境。因此，它是提高 CNN 对扰动的恢复能力的可行工具。特别是在现实自动驾驶汽车中，对抗性自动驾驶框架的应用使得准确率提高了18%，模拟的自动驾驶模型在30分钟的驾驶时间内没有发生碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性自驾车框架，利用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成扰动数据以提高卷积神经网络（CNN）在自驾车中的鲁棒性和数据效率。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在自驾车中易受小扰动影响导致误分类，可能引发碰撞，需提升其鲁棒性以确保安全。
AI.method: 通过生成对抗网络（GAN）生成真实扰动图像，训练CNN识别并适应这些扰动，减少对大量数据的依赖。
AI.result: 实际自驾车准确率提升18%，模拟环境中30分钟无碰撞，证明框架有效增强CNN对扰动的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性自驾车框架能有效提升CNN的鲁棒性，为自驾车在有限数据下的可靠运行提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Zhiyan Chen,Burak Kantarci
title: Generative Adversarial Network-Driven Detection of Adversarial Tasks in Mobile Crowdsensing
title_zh: 移动群智感知中生成对抗网络驱动的对抗任务检测
comment: This paper contains pages, 4 figures which is accepted by IEEE ICC 2022
comments: This paper contains pages, 4 figures which is accepted by IEEE ICC 2022
abstract: Mobile Crowdsensing systems are vulnerable to various attacks as they build on non-dedicated and ubiquitous properties. Machine learning (ML)-based approaches are widely investigated to build attack detection systems and ensure MCS systems security. However, adversaries that aim to clog the sensing front-end and MCS back-end leverage intelligent techniques, which are challenging for MCS platform and service providers to develop appropriate detection frameworks against these attacks. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been applied to generate synthetic samples, that are extremely similar to the real ones, deceiving classifiers such that the synthetic samples are indistinguishable from the originals. Previous works suggest that GAN-based attacks exhibit more crucial devastation than empirically designed attack samples, and result in low detection rate at the MCS platform. With this in mind, this paper aims to detect intelligently designed illegitimate sensing service requests by integrating a GAN-based model. To this end, we propose a two-level cascading classifier that combines the GAN discriminator with a binary classifier to prevent adversarial fake tasks. Through simulations, we compare our results to a single-level binary classifier, and the numeric results show that proposed approach raises Adversarial Attack Detection Rate (AADR), from $0\%$ to $97.5\%$ by KNN/NB, from $45.9\%$ to $100\%$ by Decision Tree. Meanwhile, with two-levels classifiers, Original Attack Detection Rate (OADR) improves for the three binary classifiers, with comparison, such as NB from $26.1\%$ to $61.5\%$.
summary: Mobile Crowdsensing systems are vulnerable to various attacks as they build on non-dedicated and ubiquitous properties. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been applied to generate synthetic samples, that are extremely similar to the real ones, deceiving classifiers such that the synthetic samples are indistinguishable from the originals. Previous works suggest that GAN-based attacks exhibit more crucial devastation than empirically designed attack samples, and result in low detection rate at the MCS platform. With this in mind, this paper aims to detect intelligently designed illegitimate sensing service requests by integrating a GAN-based model. To this end, we propose a two-level cascading classifier that combines the GAN discriminator with a binary classifier to prevent adversarial fake tasks. Through simulations, we compare our results to a single-level binary classifier, and the numeric results show that proposed approach raises Adversarial Attack Detection Rate (AADR), from $0\%$ to $97.5\%$ by KNN/NB, from $45.9\%$ to $100\%$ by Decision Tree. Meanwhile, with two-levels classifiers, Original Attack Detection Rate (OADR) improves for the three binary classifiers, with comparison, such as NB from $26.1\%$ to $61.5\%$.
abstract_zh: 移动群体感知系统很容易受到各种攻击，因为它们建立在非专用且普遍存在的属性之上。基于机器学习 (ML) 的方法被广泛研究，以构建攻击检测系统并确保 MCS 系统的安全。然而，旨在堵塞传感前端和 MCS 后端的对手利用智能技术，这对 MCS 平台和服务提供商开发适当的检测框架来应对这些攻击构成了挑战。生成对抗网络（GAN）已被应用于生成与真实样本极其相似的合成样本，欺骗分类器，使合成样本与原始样本无法区分。之前的研究表明，基于 GAN 的攻击比凭经验设计的攻击样本表现出更严重的破坏性，并导致 MCS 平台的检测率较低。考虑到这一点，本文旨在通过集成基于 GAN 的模型来检测智能设计的非法传感服务请求。为此，我们提出了一种两级级联分类器，将 GAN 判别器与二元分类器相结合，以防止对抗性假任务。通过模拟，我们将我们的结果与单级二元分类器进行比较，数值结果表明，所提出的方法提高了对抗攻击检测率（AADR），KNN/NB 从 $0\%$ 提高到 $97.5\%$，决策树从 $45.9\%$ 提高到 $100\%$。同时，使用两级分类器，三个二元分类器的原始攻击检测率（OADR）有所提高，相比之下，例如 NB 从 $26.1\%$ 提高到 $61.5\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的双级级联分类器，用于检测移动众包系统中的智能设计的恶意传感任务。
AI.motivation: 移动众包系统易受利用智能技术设计的攻击影响，传统机器学习方法检测率低，需更有效的防御框架。
AI.method: 结合GAN判别器与二分类器构建双级级联分类器，利用GAN生成的合成样本提升对抗攻击检测能力。
AI.result: 检测率显著提升：对抗攻击检测率（AADR）从0%升至97.5%（KNN/NB）和100%（决策树），原始攻击检测率（OADR）提升至61.5%（NB）。
AI.conclusion: 双级分类器有效提高移动众包系统对智能攻击的检测能力，验证了GAN在安全防御中的潜力。

search_text: Generative Adversarial Network-Driven Detection of Adversarial Tasks in Mobile Crowdsensing 移动群智感知中生成对抗网络驱动的对抗任务检测 Mobile Crowdsensing systems are vulnerable to various attacks as they build on non-dedicated and ubiquitous properties. Machine learning (ML)-based approaches are widely investigated to build attack detection systems and ensure MCS systems security. However, adversaries that aim to clog the sensing front-end and MCS back-end leverage intelligent techniques, which are challenging for MCS platform and service providers to develop appropriate detection frameworks against these attacks. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been applied to generate synthetic samples, that are extremely similar to the real ones, deceiving classifiers such that the synthetic samples are indistinguishable from the originals. Previous works suggest that GAN-based attacks exhibit more crucial devastation than empirically designed attack samples, and result in low detection rate at the MCS platform. With this in mind, this paper aims to detect intelligently designed illegitimate sensing service requests by integrating a GAN-based model. To this end, we propose a two-level cascading classifier that combines the GAN discriminator with a binary classifier to prevent adversarial fake tasks. Through simulations, we compare our results to a single-level binary classifier, and the numeric results show that proposed approach raises Adversarial Attack Detection Rate (AADR), from $0\%$ to $97.5\%$ by KNN/NB, from $45.9\%$ to $100\%$ by Decision Tree. Meanwhile, with two-levels classifiers, Original Attack Detection Rate (OADR) improves for the three binary classifiers, with comparison, such as NB from $26.1\%$ to $61.5\%$. 移动群体感知系统很容易受到各种攻击，因为它们建立在非专用且普遍存在的属性之上。基于机器学习 (ML) 的方法被广泛研究，以构建攻击检测系统并确保 MCS 系统的安全。然而，旨在堵塞传感前端和 MCS 后端的对手利用智能技术，这对 MCS 平台和服务提供商开发适当的检测框架来应对这些攻击构成了挑战。生成对抗网络（GAN）已被应用于生成与真实样本极其相似的合成样本，欺骗分类器，使合成样本与原始样本无法区分。之前的研究表明，基于 GAN 的攻击比凭经验设计的攻击样本表现出更严重的破坏性，并导致 MCS 平台的检测率较低。考虑到这一点，本文旨在通过集成基于 GAN 的模型来检测智能设计的非法传感服务请求。为此，我们提出了一种两级级联分类器，将 GAN 判别器与二元分类器相结合，以防止对抗性假任务。通过模拟，我们将我们的结果与单级二元分类器进行比较，数值结果表明，所提出的方法提高了对抗攻击检测率（AADR），KNN/NB 从 $0\%$ 提高到 $97.5\%$，决策树从 $45.9\%$ 提高到 $100\%$。同时，使用两级分类器，三个二元分类器的原始攻击检测率（OADR）有所提高，相比之下，例如 NB 从 $26.1\%$ 提高到 $61.5\%$。 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的双级级联分类器，用于检测移动众包系统中的智能设计的恶意传感任务。 Zhiyan Chen,Burak Kantarci cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Youwei Liang,Chongjian Ge,Zhan Tong,Yibing Song,Jue Wang,Pengtao Xie
title: Not All Patches are What You Need: Expediting Vision Transformers via Token Reorganizations
title_zh: 并非所有补丁都是您所需要的：通过代币重组加速 Vision Transformers
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) take all the image patches as tokens and construct multi-head self-attention (MHSA) among them. Complete leverage of these image tokens brings redundant computations since not all the tokens are attentive in MHSA. Examples include that tokens containing semantically meaningless or distractive image backgrounds do not positively contribute to the ViT predictions. In this work, we propose to reorganize image tokens during the feed-forward process of ViT models, which is integrated into ViT during training. For each forward inference, we identify the attentive image tokens between MHSA and FFN (i.e., feed-forward network) modules, which is guided by the corresponding class token attention. Then, we reorganize image tokens by preserving attentive image tokens and fusing inattentive ones to expedite subsequent MHSA and FFN computations. To this end, our method EViT improves ViTs from two perspectives. First, under the same amount of input image tokens, our method reduces MHSA and FFN computation for efficient inference. For instance, the inference speed of DeiT-S is increased by 50% while its recognition accuracy is decreased by only 0.3% for ImageNet classification. Second, by maintaining the same computational cost, our method empowers ViTs to take more image tokens as input for recognition accuracy improvement, where the image tokens are from higher resolution images. An example is that we improve the recognition accuracy of DeiT-S by 1% for ImageNet classification at the same computational cost of a vanilla DeiT-S. Meanwhile, our method does not introduce more parameters to ViTs. Experiments on the standard benchmarks show the effectiveness of our method. The code is available at https://github.com/youweiliang/evit
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) take all the image patches as tokens and construct multi-head self-attention (MHSA) among them. Complete leverage of these image tokens brings redundant computations since not all the tokens are attentive in MHSA. Examples include that tokens containing semantically meaningless or distractive image backgrounds do not positively contribute to the ViT predictions. In this work, we propose to reorganize image tokens during the feed-forward process of ViT models, which is integrated into ViT during training. For each forward inference, we identify the attentive image tokens between MHSA and FFN (i.e., feed-forward network) modules, which is guided by the corresponding class token attention. Then, we reorganize image tokens by preserving attentive image tokens and fusing inattentive ones to expedite subsequent MHSA and FFN computations. To this end, our method EViT improves ViTs from two perspectives. First, under the same amount of input image tokens, our method reduces MHSA and FFN computation for efficient inference. For instance, the inference speed of DeiT-S is increased by 50% while its recognition accuracy is decreased by only 0.3% for ImageNet classification. Second, by maintaining the same computational cost, our method empowers ViTs to take more image tokens as input for recognition accuracy improvement, where the image tokens are from higher resolution images. An example is that we improve the recognition accuracy of DeiT-S by 1% for ImageNet classification at the same computational cost of a vanilla DeiT-S. Meanwhile, our method does not introduce more parameters to ViTs. Experiments on the standard benchmarks show the effectiveness of our method. The code is available at https://github.com/youweiliang/evit
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViTs）将所有图像块作为令牌，并在其中构建多头自注意力（MHSA）。完全利用这些图像标记会带来冗余计算，因为并非所有标记都在 MHSA 中受到关注。示例包括包含语义上无意义或分散注意力的图像背景的标记不会对 ViT 预测产生积极贡献。在这项工作中，我们建议在 ViT 模型的前馈过程中重新组织图像标记，并在训练期间将其集成到 ViT 中。对于每个前向推理，我们识别 MHSA 和 FFN（即前馈网络）模块之间的注意图像标记，这是由相应的类标记注意引导的。然后，我们通过保留关注的图像标记并融合非关注的图像标记来重新组织图像标记，以加快后续的 MHSA 和 FFN 计算。为此，我们的方法 EViT 从两个角度改进了 ViT。首先，在相同数量的输入图像标记下，我们的方法减少了 MHSA 和 FFN 计算，以实现高效推理。例如，对于ImageNet分类，DeiT-S的推理速度提高了50%，而识别精度仅下降0.3%。其次，通过保持相同的计算成本，我们的方法使 ViT 能够采用更多图像标记作为输入以提高识别精度，其中图像标记来自更高分辨率的图像。一个例子是，在与普通 DeiT-S 相同的计算成本下，我们将 DeiT-S 的 ImageNet 分类识别精度提高了 1%。同时，我们的方法没有向 ViT 引入更多参数。标准基准的实验表明了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/youweiliang/evit 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过重新组织图像标记来加速视觉Transformer（ViT）的推理过程。
AI.motivation: 传统ViT模型对所有图像块进行多头自注意力计算，导致冗余计算，因为并非所有标记都对最终预测有贡献。
AI.method: 在ViT前向传播过程中，通过类标记注意力识别关键标记，保留有注意力的标记并融合无注意力的标记，从而减少后续计算量。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，DeiT-S模型推理速度提升50%且精度仅下降0.3%，或在相同计算成本下精度提升1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过标记重组织有效提升了ViT的推理效率和精度，且不增加模型参数。

authors_text: Serge Kernbach,Olga Kernbach,Igor Kuksin,Andreas Kernbach,Yury Nepomnyashchiy,Timo Dochow,Andrew Bobrov
title: The Biosensor based on electrochemical dynamics of fermentation in yeast Saccharomyces Cerevisiae
title_zh: 基于酿酒酵母发酵电化学动力学的生物传感器
abstract: The zymase activity of the yeast Saccharomyces Cerevisiae is sensitive to environmental parameters and is therefore used as a microbiological sensor for water quality assessment, ecotoxicological characterization or environmental monitoring. Comparing to bacterial bioluminescence approach, this method has no toxicity, excludes usage of genetically modified microorganisms, and enables low-cost express analysis. This work focuses on measuring the yeast fermentation dynamics based on multichannel pressure sensing and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS). Measurement results are compared with each other in terms of accuracy, reproducibility and ease of use in the field conditions. It has been shown that EIS provides more information about ionic dynamics of metabolic processes and requires less complex measurements. The conducted experiments demonstrated the sensitivity of this approach for assessing biophotonic phenomena, non-chemical water treatments and impact of environmental stressors.
summary: The zymase activity of the yeast Saccharomyces Cerevisiae is sensitive to environmental parameters and is therefore used as a microbiological sensor for water quality assessment, ecotoxicological characterization or environmental monitoring. Comparing to bacterial bioluminescence approach, this method has no toxicity, excludes usage of genetically modified microorganisms, and enables low-cost express analysis. This work focuses on measuring the yeast fermentation dynamics based on multichannel pressure sensing and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS). Measurement results are compared with each other in terms of accuracy, reproducibility and ease of use in the field conditions. It has been shown that EIS provides more information about ionic dynamics of metabolic processes and requires less complex measurements. The conducted experiments demonstrated the sensitivity of this approach for assessing biophotonic phenomena, non-chemical water treatments and impact of environmental stressors.
abstract_zh: 酿酒酵母的酶活性对环境参数敏感，因此被用作水质评估、生态毒理学表征或环境监测的微生物传感器。与细菌生物发光方法相比，该方法无毒性，不使用转基因微生物，并且能够实现低成本的快速分析。这项工作的重点是基于多通道压力传感和电化学阻抗谱 (EIS) 测量酵母发酵动力学。测量结果在准确性、再现性和现场条件下的易用性方面进行比较。事实证明，EIS 提供了有关代谢过程离子动力学的更多信息，并且需要不太复杂的测量。进行的实验证明了这种方法在评估生物光子现象、非化学水处理和环境压力源影响方面的敏感性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于酵母发酵电化学动态的生物传感器，用于水质评估和环境监测。
AI.motivation: 传统细菌生物发光方法存在毒性、需使用转基因微生物且成本较高，需开发无毒、低成本且无需转基因的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过多通道压力传感和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）测量酵母发酵动态，并对比两种方法的准确性、可重复性和现场适用性。
AI.result: EIS方法能更详细反映代谢过程的离子动态，且测量更简单；实验验证了该方法对生物发光现象、非化学水处理及环境压力的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 该生物传感器具备高灵敏度和实用性，可有效用于水质检测和环境监测，优于现有技术。
