search_text: The Biosensor based on electrochemical dynamics of fermentation in yeast Saccharomyces Cerevisiae 基于酿酒酵母发酵电化学动力学的生物传感器 The zymase activity of the yeast Saccharomyces Cerevisiae is sensitive to environmental parameters and is therefore used as a microbiological sensor for water quality assessment, ecotoxicological characterization or environmental monitoring. Comparing to bacterial bioluminescence approach, this method has no toxicity, excludes usage of genetically modified microorganisms, and enables low-cost express analysis. This work focuses on measuring the yeast fermentation dynamics based on multichannel pressure sensing and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS). Measurement results are compared with each other in terms of accuracy, reproducibility and ease of use in the field conditions. It has been shown that EIS provides more information about ionic dynamics of metabolic processes and requires less complex measurements. The conducted experiments demonstrated the sensitivity of this approach for assessing biophotonic phenomena, non-chemical water treatments and impact of environmental stressors. 酿酒酵母的酶活性对环境参数敏感，因此被用作水质评估、生态毒理学表征或环境监测的微生物传感器。与细菌生物发光方法相比，该方法无毒性，不使用转基因微生物，并且能够实现低成本的快速分析。这项工作的重点是基于多通道压力传感和电化学阻抗谱 (EIS) 测量酵母发酵动力学。测量结果在准确性、再现性和现场条件下的易用性方面进行比较。事实证明，EIS 提供了有关代谢过程离子动力学的更多信息，并且需要不太复杂的测量。进行的实验证明了这种方法在评估生物光子现象、非化学水处理和环境压力源影响方面的敏感性。 本文提出了一种基于酵母发酵电化学动态的生物传感器，用于水质评估和环境监测。 Serge Kernbach,Olga Kernbach,Igor Kuksin,Andreas Kernbach,Yury Nepomnyashchiy,Timo Dochow,Andrew Bobrov q-bio.QM,cs.RO,physics.bio-ph,physics.ins-det

authors_text: Hisao Tamaki
title: Heuristic computation of exact treewidth
title_zh: 精确树宽的启发式计算
abstract: We are interested in computing the treewidth $\tw(G)$ of a given graph $G$. Our approach is to design heuristic algorithms for computing a sequence of improving upper bounds and a sequence of improving lower bounds, which would hopefully converge to $\tw(G)$ from both sides. The upper bound algorithm extends and simplifies Tamaki's unpublished work on a heuristic use of the dynamic programming algorithm for deciding treewidth due to Bouchitté and Todinca. The lower bound algorithm is based on the well-known fact that, for every minor $H$ of $G$, we have $\tw(H) \leq \tw(G)$. Starting from a greedily computed minor $H_0$ of $G$, the algorithm tries to construct a sequence of minors $H_0$, $H_1$, \ldots $H_k$ with $\tw(H_i) < \tw(H_{i + 1})$ for $0 \leq i < k$ and hopefully $\tw(H_k) = \tw(G)$. We have implemented a treewidth solver based on this approach and have evaluated it on the bonus instances from the exact treewidth track of PACE 2017 algorithm implementation challenge. The results show that our approach is extremely effective in tackling instances that are hard for conventional solvers. Our solver has an additional advantage over conventional ones in that it attaches a compact certificate to the lower bound it computes.
summary: We are interested in computing the treewidth $\tw(G)$ of a given graph $G$. Our approach is to design heuristic algorithms for computing a sequence of improving upper bounds and a sequence of improving lower bounds, which would hopefully converge to $\tw(G)$ from both sides. The upper bound algorithm extends and simplifies Tamaki's unpublished work on a heuristic use of the dynamic programming algorithm for deciding treewidth due to Bouchitté and Todinca. The lower bound algorithm is based on the well-known fact that, for every minor $H$ of $G$, we have $\tw(H) \leq \tw(G)$. Starting from a greedily computed minor $H_0$ of $G$, the algorithm tries to construct a sequence of minors $H_0$, $H_1$, \ldots $H_k$ with $\tw(H_i) < \tw(H_{i + 1})$ for $0 \leq i < k$ and hopefully $\tw(H_k) = \tw(G)$. We have implemented a treewidth solver based on this approach and have evaluated it on the bonus instances from the exact treewidth track of PACE 2017 algorithm implementation challenge. The results show that our approach is extremely effective in tackling instances that are hard for conventional solvers. Our solver has an additional advantage over conventional ones in that it attaches a compact certificate to the lower bound it computes.
abstract_zh: 我们感兴趣的是计算给定图 $G$ 的树宽 $\tw(G)$。我们的方法是设计启发式算法来计算一系列改进的上限和一系列改进的下限，这将有望从两侧收敛到 $\tw(G)$。上限算法扩展并简化了 Tamaki 未发表的工作，即 Bouchitté 和 Todinca 启发式使用动态规划算法来决定树宽。下界算法基于众所周知的事实，即对于 $G$ 的每个次要 $H$，我们有 $\tw(H) \leq \tw(G)$。从贪婪计算 $G$ 的次要 $H_0$ 开始，该算法尝试构造一个次要序列 $H_0$、$H_1$、\ldots $H_k$，其中 $\tw(H_i) < \tw(H_{i + 1})$ 对于 $0 \leq i < k$ 并希望 $\tw(H_k) = \tw(G)$。我们基于这种方法实现了一个树宽求解器，并根据 PACE 2017 算法实现挑战的精确树宽跟踪的奖励实例对其进行了评估。结果表明，我们的方法在解决传统求解器难以解决的情况方面非常有效。与传统求解器相比，我们的求解器还有一个额外的优势，即它在计算的下限上附加了一个紧凑的证书。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过启发式算法计算图精确树宽的方法，结合上下界收敛策略。
AI.motivation: 传统树宽计算方法在处理复杂实例时效率低下，且缺乏下界证明的紧凑证书。
AI.method: 改进Tamaki的动态规划上界算法，并通过图的收缩序列迭代优化下界，最终结合PACE 2017测试集验证。
AI.result: 在挑战性实例上显著优于传统求解器，且能为下界提供紧凑证明证书。
AI.conclusion: 该启发式方法为难解实例提供了有效解决方案，并通过证书增强结果可信度。

authors_text: Alena Fenogenova,Maria Tikhonova,Vladislav Mikhailov,Tatiana Shavrina,Anton Emelyanov,Denis Shevelev,Alexandr Kukushkin,Valentin Malykh,Ekaterina Artemova
title: Russian SuperGLUE 1.1: Revising the Lessons not Learned by Russian NLP models
title_zh: Russian SuperGLUE 1.1：修正俄罗斯 NLP 模型未吸取的教训
comment: Computational Linguistics and Intellectual Technologies Papers from the Annual International Conference "Dialogue" (2021) Issue 20
comments: Computational Linguistics and Intellectual Technologies Papers from the Annual International Conference "Dialogue" (2021) Issue 20
abstract: In the last year, new neural architectures and multilingual pre-trained models have been released for Russian, which led to performance evaluation problems across a range of language understanding tasks. This paper presents Russian SuperGLUE 1.1, an updated benchmark styled after GLUE for Russian NLP models. The new version includes a number of technical, user experience and methodological improvements, including fixes of the benchmark vulnerabilities unresolved in the previous version: novel and improved tests for understanding the meaning of a word in context (RUSSE) along with reading comprehension and common sense reasoning (DaNetQA, RuCoS, MuSeRC). Together with the release of the updated datasets, we improve the benchmark toolkit based on \texttt{jiant} framework for consistent training and evaluation of NLP-models of various architectures which now supports the most recent models for Russian. Finally, we provide the integration of Russian SuperGLUE with a framework for industrial evaluation of the open-source models, MOROCCO (MOdel ResOurCe COmparison), in which the models are evaluated according to the weighted average metric over all tasks, the inference speed, and the occupied amount of RAM. Russian SuperGLUE is publicly available at https://russiansuperglue.com/.
summary: In the last year, new neural architectures and multilingual pre-trained models have been released for Russian, which led to performance evaluation problems across a range of language understanding tasks. This paper presents Russian SuperGLUE 1.1, an updated benchmark styled after GLUE for Russian NLP models. The new version includes a number of technical, user experience and methodological improvements, including fixes of the benchmark vulnerabilities unresolved in the previous version: novel and improved tests for understanding the meaning of a word in context (RUSSE) along with reading comprehension and common sense reasoning (DaNetQA, RuCoS, MuSeRC). Together with the release of the updated datasets, we improve the benchmark toolkit based on \texttt{jiant} framework for consistent training and evaluation of NLP-models of various architectures which now supports the most recent models for Russian. Finally, we provide the integration of Russian SuperGLUE with a framework for industrial evaluation of the open-source models, MOROCCO (MOdel ResOurCe COmparison), in which the models are evaluated according to the weighted average metric over all tasks, the inference speed, and the occupied amount of RAM. Russian SuperGLUE is publicly available at https://russiansuperglue.com/.
abstract_zh: 去年，针对俄语发布了新的神经架构和多语言预训练模型，这导致了一系列语言理解任务的性能评估问题。本文介绍了 Russian SuperGLUE 1.1，这是俄罗斯 NLP 模型的 GLUE 风格的更新基准。新版本包括许多技术、用户体验和方法方面的改进，包括修复了上一版本中未解决的基准漏洞：用于理解上下文中单词含义的新颖且改进的测试（RUSSE）以及阅读理解和常识推理（DaNetQA、RuCoS、MuSeRC）。随着更新数据集的发布，我们改进了基于 \texttt{jiant} 框架的基准工具包，以对各种架构的 NLP 模型进行一致的训练和评估，现在支持最新的俄语模型。最后，我们提供了俄罗斯SuperGLUE与开源模型MOROCCO（MOdel ResOurCe COmparison）的工业评估框架的集成，其中根据所有任务的加权平均指标、推理速度和RAM占用量来评估模型。 Russian SuperGLUE 可在 https://Russiansuperglue.com/ 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出俄语SuperGLUE 1.1基准测试，针对俄语NLP模型的性能评估问题进行更新与改进。
AI.motivation: 随着新神经架构和多语言预训练模型的出现，原有俄语NLP评估基准存在漏洞，需通过更新测试集和工具提升评估准确性与全面性。
AI.method: 改进测试集（如RUSSE、DaNetQA等），升级基于jiant框架的工具包以支持最新模型，并集成MOROCCO框架实现多维度工业评估。
AI.result: 发布更新后的数据集与工具包，支持最新俄语模型，并通过MOROCCO框架实现加权平均指标、推理速度及内存占用的综合评估。
AI.conclusion: 俄语SuperGLUE 1.1提升了俄语NLP模型评估的全面性与实用性，为后续研究提供更可靠的基准支持。

conclusion: 俄语SuperGLUE 1.1提升了俄语NLP模型评估的全面性与实用性，为后续研究提供更可靠的基准支持。
search_text: Russian SuperGLUE 1.1: Revising the Lessons not Learned by Russian NLP models Russian SuperGLUE 1.1：修正俄罗斯 NLP 模型未吸取的教训 In the last year, new neural architectures and multilingual pre-trained models have been released for Russian, which led to performance evaluation problems across a range of language understanding tasks. This paper presents Russian SuperGLUE 1.1, an updated benchmark styled after GLUE for Russian NLP models. The new version includes a number of technical, user experience and methodological improvements, including fixes of the benchmark vulnerabilities unresolved in the previous version: novel and improved tests for understanding the meaning of a word in context (RUSSE) along with reading comprehension and common sense reasoning (DaNetQA, RuCoS, MuSeRC). Together with the release of the updated datasets, we improve the benchmark toolkit based on \texttt{jiant} framework for consistent training and evaluation of NLP-models of various architectures which now supports the most recent models for Russian. Finally, we provide the integration of Russian SuperGLUE with a framework for industrial evaluation of the open-source models, MOROCCO (MOdel ResOurCe COmparison), in which the models are evaluated according to the weighted average metric over all tasks, the inference speed, and the occupied amount of RAM. Russian SuperGLUE is publicly available at https://russiansuperglue.com/. 去年，针对俄语发布了新的神经架构和多语言预训练模型，这导致了一系列语言理解任务的性能评估问题。本文介绍了 Russian SuperGLUE 1.1，这是俄罗斯 NLP 模型的 GLUE 风格的更新基准。新版本包括许多技术、用户体验和方法方面的改进，包括修复了上一版本中未解决的基准漏洞：用于理解上下文中单词含义的新颖且改进的测试（RUSSE）以及阅读理解和常识推理（DaNetQA、RuCoS、MuSeRC）。随着更新数据集的发布，我们改进了基于 \texttt{jiant} 框架的基准工具包，以对各种架构的 NLP 模型进行一致的训练和评估，现在支持最新的俄语模型。最后，我们提供了俄罗斯SuperGLUE与开源模型MOROCCO（MOdel ResOurCe COmparison）的工业评估框架的集成，其中根据所有任务的加权平均指标、推理速度和RAM占用量来评估模型。 Russian SuperGLUE 可在 https://Russiansuperglue.com/ 上公开获取。 本文提出俄语SuperGLUE 1.1基准测试，针对俄语NLP模型的性能评估问题进行更新与改进。 Alena Fenogenova,Maria Tikhonova,Vladislav Mikhailov,Tatiana Shavrina,Anton Emelyanov,Denis Shevelev,Alexandr Kukushkin,Valentin Malykh,Ekaterina Artemova cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhifeng Kong,Wei Ping,Ambrish Dantrey,Bryan Catanzaro
title: Speech Denoising in the Waveform Domain with Self-Attention
title_zh: 利用自注意力在波形域中进行语音去噪
comment: Published in ICASSP 2022 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP). Listen to audio samples from CleanUNet at: https://cleanunet.github.io/
comments: Published in ICASSP 2022 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP). Listen to audio samples from CleanUNet at: https://cleanunet.github.io/
abstract: In this work, we present CleanUNet, a causal speech denoising model on the raw waveform. The proposed model is based on an encoder-decoder architecture combined with several self-attention blocks to refine its bottleneck representations, which is crucial to obtain good results. The model is optimized through a set of losses defined over both waveform and multi-resolution spectrograms. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art models in terms of denoised speech quality from various objective and subjective evaluation metrics. We release our code and models at https://github.com/nvidia/cleanunet.
summary: In this work, we present CleanUNet, a causal speech denoising model on the raw waveform. The proposed model is based on an encoder-decoder architecture combined with several self-attention blocks to refine its bottleneck representations, which is crucial to obtain good results. The model is optimized through a set of losses defined over both waveform and multi-resolution spectrograms. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art models in terms of denoised speech quality from various objective and subjective evaluation metrics. We release our code and models at https://github.com/nvidia/cleanunet.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 CleanUNet，一种基于原始波形的因果语音去噪模型。所提出的模型基于编码器-解码器架构，结合多个自注意力块来细化其瓶颈表示，这对于获得良好的结果至关重要。该模型通过在波形和多分辨率频谱图上定义的一组损耗进行优化。从各种客观和主观评估指标来看，所提出的方法在去噪语音质量方面优于最先进的模型。我们在 https://github.com/nvidia/cleanunet 发布了我们的代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自注意力机制的波形域语音降噪模型CleanUNet，通过编码器-解码器结构结合多分辨率频谱损失实现更优的降噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统语音降噪方法在频谱域处理时存在时序信息丢失问题，且难以捕捉长距离依赖关系，而波形域处理能保留更完整的时序特征。
AI.method: 采用因果编码器-解码器架构，在瓶颈层引入自注意力模块增强特征表达，联合优化波形域和多分辨率频谱图的复合损失函数。
AI.result: 在客观指标（如PESQ、SISDR）和主观评估中均优于现有SOTA方法，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: CleanUNet通过自注意力机制有效提升了波形域语音降噪性能，为端到端语音增强提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shuhan Yuan,Xintao Wu
title: Trustworthy Anomaly Detection: A Survey
title_zh: 值得信赖的异常检测：调查
abstract: Anomaly detection has a wide range of real-world applications, such as bank fraud detection and cyber intrusion detection. In the past decade, a variety of anomaly detection models have been developed, which lead to big progress towards accurately detecting various anomalies. Despite the successes, anomaly detection models still face many limitations. The most significant one is whether we can trust the detection results from the models. In recent years, the research community has spent a great effort to design trustworthy machine learning models, such as developing trustworthy classification models. However, the attention to anomaly detection tasks is far from sufficient. Considering that many anomaly detection tasks are life-changing tasks involving human beings, labeling someone as anomalies or fraudsters should be extremely cautious. Hence, ensuring the anomaly detection models conducted in a trustworthy fashion is an essential requirement to deploy the models to conduct automatic decisions in the real world. In this brief survey, we summarize the existing efforts and discuss open problems towards trustworthy anomaly detection from the perspectives of interpretability, fairness, robustness, and privacy-preservation.
summary: Anomaly detection has a wide range of real-world applications, such as bank fraud detection and cyber intrusion detection. In the past decade, a variety of anomaly detection models have been developed, which lead to big progress towards accurately detecting various anomalies. Despite the successes, anomaly detection models still face many limitations. The most significant one is whether we can trust the detection results from the models. In recent years, the research community has spent a great effort to design trustworthy machine learning models, such as developing trustworthy classification models. However, the attention to anomaly detection tasks is far from sufficient. Considering that many anomaly detection tasks are life-changing tasks involving human beings, labeling someone as anomalies or fraudsters should be extremely cautious. Hence, ensuring the anomaly detection models conducted in a trustworthy fashion is an essential requirement to deploy the models to conduct automatic decisions in the real world. In this brief survey, we summarize the existing efforts and discuss open problems towards trustworthy anomaly detection from the perspectives of interpretability, fairness, robustness, and privacy-preservation.
abstract_zh: 异常检测在现实世界中具有广泛的应用，例如银行欺诈检测和网络入侵检测。在过去的十年中，已经开发了多种异常检测模型，这使得准确检测各种异常取得了巨大进展。尽管取得了成功，异常检测模型仍然面临许多限制。最重要的是我们是否可以相信模型的检测结果。近年来，研究界花费了大量精力来设计可信的机器学习模型，例如开发可信的分类模型。然而，对异常检测任务的关注还远远不够。考虑到许多异常检测任务是涉及人类的改变生活的任务，将某人标记为异常或欺诈者应该极其谨慎。因此，确保异常检测模型以值得信赖的方式进行是部署模型在现实世界中进行自动决策的基本要求。在这个简短的调查中，我们总结了现有的工作，并从可解释性、公平性、鲁棒性和隐私保护的角度讨论了可信异常检测的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了可信异常检测领域的现有研究，探讨了可解释性、公平性、鲁棒性和隐私保护等方向的挑战与开放问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管异常检测模型在准确性上取得进展，但其结果的可信度不足，尤其在涉及人类生活的场景中需避免误判带来的严重后果。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统总结现有模型在可信性方面的研究，并从四个关键维度分析其局限性与改进方向。
AI.result: 梳理了当前在可解释性、公平性、鲁棒性和隐私保护领域的研究进展，指出现有方法在实际应用中的不足及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步推动可信异常检测技术的发展，特别是在保障模型透明度、公平性与隐私安全的前提下提升实际部署可行性。

authors_text: Eleni Chiou,Eleftheria Panagiotaki,Iasonas Kokkinos
title: Beyond Deterministic Translation for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 超越无监督领域适应的确定性翻译
comment: Accepted at BMVC 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/elchiou/Beyond-deterministic-translation-for-UDA
comments: Accepted at BMVC 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/elchiou/Beyond-deterministic-translation-for-UDA
abstract: In this work we challenge the common approach of using a one-to-one mapping ('translation') between the source and target domains in unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Instead, we rely on stochastic translation to capture inherent translation ambiguities. This allows us to (i) train more accurate target networks by generating multiple outputs conditioned on the same source image, leveraging both accurate translation and data augmentation for appearance variability, (ii) impute robust pseudo-labels for the target data by averaging the predictions of a source network on multiple translated versions of a single target image and (iii) train and ensemble diverse networks in the target domain by modulating the degree of stochasticity in the translations. We report improvements over strong recent baselines, leading to state-of-the-art UDA results on two challenging semantic segmentation benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/elchiou/Beyond-deterministic-translation-for-UDA.
summary: In this work we challenge the common approach of using a one-to-one mapping ('translation') between the source and target domains in unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Instead, we rely on stochastic translation to capture inherent translation ambiguities. This allows us to (i) train more accurate target networks by generating multiple outputs conditioned on the same source image, leveraging both accurate translation and data augmentation for appearance variability, (ii) impute robust pseudo-labels for the target data by averaging the predictions of a source network on multiple translated versions of a single target image and (iii) train and ensemble diverse networks in the target domain by modulating the degree of stochasticity in the translations. We report improvements over strong recent baselines, leading to state-of-the-art UDA results on two challenging semantic segmentation benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/elchiou/Beyond-deterministic-translation-for-UDA.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们挑战了在无监督域适应（UDA）中在源域和目标域之间使用一对一映射（“翻译”）的常见方法。相反，我们依靠随机翻译来捕获固有的翻译歧义。这使我们能够（i）通过生成以同一源图像为条件的多个输出来训练更准确的目标网络，利用精确的翻译和数据增强来实现外观可变性，（ii）通过对单个目标图像的多个翻译版本上的源网络的预测进行平均来为目标数据估算鲁棒的伪标签，以及（iii）通过调节翻译中的随机性程度来训练和集成目标域中的不同网络。我们报告了相对于近期强大基线的改进，从而在两个具有挑战性的语义分割基准上取得了最先进的 UDA 结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/elchiou/Beyond-deterministic-translation-for-UDA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机翻译的无监督领域自适应方法，用于改进语义分割任务中目标域模型的训练。
AI.motivation: 传统一对一确定性翻译无法捕捉领域间的翻译歧义，导致目标域模型训练不充分。通过引入随机翻译可增强模型鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过生成多版本目标域伪样本实现数据增强，利用源域网络预测的平均值生成鲁棒伪标签，并通过调节随机性训练多样化目标网络。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和Syn2City两个基准测试中取得当时最优的UDA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 随机翻译机制有效缓解了领域自适应中的歧义问题，为UDA任务提供了新的技术路线。

search_text: Beyond Deterministic Translation for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 超越无监督领域适应的确定性翻译 In this work we challenge the common approach of using a one-to-one mapping ('translation') between the source and target domains in unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Instead, we rely on stochastic translation to capture inherent translation ambiguities. This allows us to (i) train more accurate target networks by generating multiple outputs conditioned on the same source image, leveraging both accurate translation and data augmentation for appearance variability, (ii) impute robust pseudo-labels for the target data by averaging the predictions of a source network on multiple translated versions of a single target image and (iii) train and ensemble diverse networks in the target domain by modulating the degree of stochasticity in the translations. We report improvements over strong recent baselines, leading to state-of-the-art UDA results on two challenging semantic segmentation benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/elchiou/Beyond-deterministic-translation-for-UDA. 在这项工作中，我们挑战了在无监督域适应（UDA）中在源域和目标域之间使用一对一映射（“翻译”）的常见方法。相反，我们依靠随机翻译来捕获固有的翻译歧义。这使我们能够（i）通过生成以同一源图像为条件的多个输出来训练更准确的目标网络，利用精确的翻译和数据增强来实现外观可变性，（ii）通过对单个目标图像的多个翻译版本上的源网络的预测进行平均来为目标数据估算鲁棒的伪标签，以及（iii）通过调节翻译中的随机性程度来训练和集成目标域中的不同网络。我们报告了相对于近期强大基线的改进，从而在两个具有挑战性的语义分割基准上取得了最先进的 UDA 结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/elchiou/Beyond-deterministic-translation-for-UDA 获取。 本文提出了一种基于随机翻译的无监督领域自适应方法，用于改进语义分割任务中目标域模型的训练。 Eleni Chiou,Eleftheria Panagiotaki,Iasonas Kokkinos cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Dilini Rajapaksha,Christoph Bergmeir
title: LIMREF: Local Interpretable Model Agnostic Rule-based Explanations for Forecasting, with an Application to Electricity Smart Meter Data
title_zh: LIMREF：本地可解释模型不可知的基于规则的预测解释，并应用于电力智能电表数据
comment: Accepted as a conference paper to AAAI 2022
comments: Accepted as a conference paper to AAAI 2022
abstract: Accurate electricity demand forecasts play a crucial role in sustainable power systems. To enable better decision-making especially for demand flexibility of the end-user, it is necessary to provide not only accurate but also understandable and actionable forecasts. To provide accurate forecasts Global Forecasting Models (GFM) trained across time series have shown superior results in many demand forecasting competitions and real-world applications recently, compared with univariate forecasting approaches. We aim to fill the gap between the accuracy and the interpretability in global forecasting approaches. In order to explain the global model forecasts, we propose Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Rule-based Explanations for Forecasting (LIMREF), a local explainer framework that produces k-optimal impact rules for a particular forecast, considering the global forecasting model as a black-box model, in a model-agnostic way. It provides different types of rules that explain the forecast of the global model and the counterfactual rules, which provide actionable insights for potential changes to obtain different outputs for given instances. We conduct experiments using a large-scale electricity demand dataset with exogenous features such as temperature and calendar effects. Here, we evaluate the quality of the explanations produced by the LIMREF framework in terms of both qualitative and quantitative aspects such as accuracy, fidelity, and comprehensibility and benchmark those against other local explainers.
summary: Accurate electricity demand forecasts play a crucial role in sustainable power systems. To enable better decision-making especially for demand flexibility of the end-user, it is necessary to provide not only accurate but also understandable and actionable forecasts. To provide accurate forecasts Global Forecasting Models (GFM) trained across time series have shown superior results in many demand forecasting competitions and real-world applications recently, compared with univariate forecasting approaches. We aim to fill the gap between the accuracy and the interpretability in global forecasting approaches. In order to explain the global model forecasts, we propose Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Rule-based Explanations for Forecasting (LIMREF), a local explainer framework that produces k-optimal impact rules for a particular forecast, considering the global forecasting model as a black-box model, in a model-agnostic way. It provides different types of rules that explain the forecast of the global model and the counterfactual rules, which provide actionable insights for potential changes to obtain different outputs for given instances. We conduct experiments using a large-scale electricity demand dataset with exogenous features such as temperature and calendar effects. Here, we evaluate the quality of the explanations produced by the LIMREF framework in terms of both qualitative and quantitative aspects such as accuracy, fidelity, and comprehensibility and benchmark those against other local explainers.
abstract_zh: 准确的电力需求预测在可持续电力系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。为了更好地做出决策，特别是针对最终用户的需求灵活性，有必要提供不仅准确而且易于理解和可操作的预测。为了提供准确的预测，与单变量预测方法相比，跨时间序列训练的全局预测模型 (GFM) 最近在许多需求预测竞赛和实际应用中显示出优异的结果。我们的目标是填补全球预测方法的准确性和可解释性之间的差距。为了解释全局模型预测，我们提出了局部可解释模型不可知的基于规则的预测解释（LIMREF），这是一种局部解释器框架，可以为特定预测生成 k 最优影响规则，以模型不可知的方式将全局预测模型视为黑盒模型。它提供了不同类型的规则来解释全局模型的预测和反事实规则，这些规则为潜在的变化提供了可操作的见解，以获得给定实例的不同输出。我们使用具有温度和日历效应等外生特征的大规模电力需求数据集进行实验。在这里，我们从定性和定量方面（例如准确性、保真度和可理解性）评估 LIMREF 框架产生的解释的质量，并将其与其他本地解释器进行基准比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIMREF框架，通过生成局部可解释的规则解释全局预测模型在电力需求预测中的结果。
AI.motivation: 尽管全局预测模型在电力需求预测中表现优异，但其黑箱特性限制了可解释性，难以支持用户端需求灵活性决策。
AI.method: 设计LIMREF框架，以模型无关方式生成k-最优影响规则和反事实规则，解释全局模型预测并提供可操作的调整建议。
AI.result: 在包含温度等外部因素的电力需求数据集上验证，LIMREF在准确性、保真度和可理解性方面优于其他局部解释方法。
AI.conclusion: LIMREF有效弥合了全局预测模型的准确性与可解释性差距，为电力系统决策提供可操作的解释支持。

authors_text: Curtis Hawthorne,Andrew Jaegle,Cătălina Cangea,Sebastian Borgeaud,Charlie Nash,Mateusz Malinowski,Sander Dieleman,Oriol Vinyals,Matthew Botvinick,Ian Simon,Hannah Sheahan,Neil Zeghidour,Jean-Baptiste Alayrac,João Carreira,Jesse Engel
title: General-purpose, long-context autoregressive modeling with Perceiver AR
title_zh: 使用 Perceiver AR 进行通用、长上下文自回归建模
abstract: Real-world data is high-dimensional: a book, image, or musical performance can easily contain hundreds of thousands of elements even after compression. However, the most commonly used autoregressive models, Transformers, are prohibitively expensive to scale to the number of inputs and layers needed to capture this long-range structure. We develop Perceiver AR, an autoregressive, modality-agnostic architecture which uses cross-attention to map long-range inputs to a small number of latents while also maintaining end-to-end causal masking. Perceiver AR can directly attend to over a hundred thousand tokens, enabling practical long-context density estimation without the need for hand-crafted sparsity patterns or memory mechanisms. When trained on images or music, Perceiver AR generates outputs with clear long-term coherence and structure. Our architecture also obtains state-of-the-art likelihood on long-sequence benchmarks, including 64 x 64 ImageNet images and PG-19 books.
summary: Real-world data is high-dimensional: a book, image, or musical performance can easily contain hundreds of thousands of elements even after compression. However, the most commonly used autoregressive models, Transformers, are prohibitively expensive to scale to the number of inputs and layers needed to capture this long-range structure. We develop Perceiver AR, an autoregressive, modality-agnostic architecture which uses cross-attention to map long-range inputs to a small number of latents while also maintaining end-to-end causal masking. Perceiver AR can directly attend to over a hundred thousand tokens, enabling practical long-context density estimation without the need for hand-crafted sparsity patterns or memory mechanisms. When trained on images or music, Perceiver AR generates outputs with clear long-term coherence and structure. Our architecture also obtains state-of-the-art likelihood on long-sequence benchmarks, including 64 x 64 ImageNet images and PG-19 books.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的数据是高维的：一本书、图像或音乐表演即使在压缩后也可以轻松包含数十万个元素。然而，最常用的自回归模型 Transformer 要想扩展到捕获这种远程结构所需的输入和层数，其成本极其昂贵。我们开发了 Perceiver AR，这是一种自回归、模态不可知的架构，它使用交叉注意力将远程输入映射到少量潜在变量，同时保持端到端因果屏蔽。 Perceiver AR 可以直接处理超过十万个令牌，从而实现实用的长上下文密度估计，而不需要手工制作的稀疏模式或记忆机制。当接受图像或音乐训练时，Perceiver AR 会生成具有清晰的长期一致性和结构的输出。我们的架构还在长序列基准上获得了最先进的可能性，包括 64 x 64 ImageNet 图像和 PG-19 书籍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Perceiver AR的通用长上下文自回归模型架构，用于高效处理高维数据中的长距离依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型在处理长序列时计算成本过高，且难以直接建模超长上下文的高维数据结构。
AI.method: 通过引入交叉注意力机制将长输入映射到少量隐状态，同时保持端到端因果掩码，实现对超10万token的直接建模。
AI.result: 在64x64 ImageNet图像和PG-19书籍等长序列基准测试中取得最先进似然性能，生成内容具有长期连贯性。
AI.conclusion: Perceiver AR为通用长上下文建模提供了高效解决方案，无需人工设计稀疏模式即可实现高质量密度估计。

search_text: General-purpose, long-context autoregressive modeling with Perceiver AR 使用 Perceiver AR 进行通用、长上下文自回归建模 Real-world data is high-dimensional: a book, image, or musical performance can easily contain hundreds of thousands of elements even after compression. However, the most commonly used autoregressive models, Transformers, are prohibitively expensive to scale to the number of inputs and layers needed to capture this long-range structure. We develop Perceiver AR, an autoregressive, modality-agnostic architecture which uses cross-attention to map long-range inputs to a small number of latents while also maintaining end-to-end causal masking. Perceiver AR can directly attend to over a hundred thousand tokens, enabling practical long-context density estimation without the need for hand-crafted sparsity patterns or memory mechanisms. When trained on images or music, Perceiver AR generates outputs with clear long-term coherence and structure. Our architecture also obtains state-of-the-art likelihood on long-sequence benchmarks, including 64 x 64 ImageNet images and PG-19 books. 现实世界的数据是高维的：一本书、图像或音乐表演即使在压缩后也可以轻松包含数十万个元素。然而，最常用的自回归模型 Transformer 要想扩展到捕获这种远程结构所需的输入和层数，其成本极其昂贵。我们开发了 Perceiver AR，这是一种自回归、模态不可知的架构，它使用交叉注意力将远程输入映射到少量潜在变量，同时保持端到端因果屏蔽。 Perceiver AR 可以直接处理超过十万个令牌，从而实现实用的长上下文密度估计，而不需要手工制作的稀疏模式或记忆机制。当接受图像或音乐训练时，Perceiver AR 会生成具有清晰的长期一致性和结构的输出。我们的架构还在长序列基准上获得了最先进的可能性，包括 64 x 64 ImageNet 图像和 PG-19 书籍。 本文提出了一种名为Perceiver AR的通用长上下文自回归模型架构，用于高效处理高维数据中的长距离依赖关系。 Curtis Hawthorne,Andrew Jaegle,Cătălina Cangea,Sebastian Borgeaud,Charlie Nash,Mateusz Malinowski,Sander Dieleman,Oriol Vinyals,Matthew Botvinick,Ian Simon,Hannah Sheahan,Neil Zeghidour,Jean-Baptiste Alayrac,João Carreira,Jesse Engel cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Williams Rizzi,Marco Comuzzi,Chiara Di Francescomarino,Chiara Ghidini,Suhwan Lee,Fabrizio Maria Maggi,Alexander Nolte
title: Explainable Predictive Process Monitoring: A User Evaluation
title_zh: 可解释的预测过程监控：用户评估
abstract: Explainability is motivated by the lack of transparency of black-box Machine Learning approaches, which do not foster trust and acceptance of Machine Learning algorithms. This also happens in the Predictive Process Monitoring field, where predictions, obtained by applying Machine Learning techniques, need to be explained to users, so as to gain their trust and acceptance. In this work, we carry on a user evaluation on explanation approaches for Predictive Process Monitoring aiming at investigating whether and how the explanations provided (i) are understandable; (ii) are useful in decision making tasks;(iii) can be further improved for process analysts, with different Machine Learning expertise levels. The results of the user evaluation show that, although explanation plots are overall understandable and useful for decision making tasks for Business Process Management users -- with and without experience in Machine Learning -- differences exist in the comprehension and usage of different plots, as well as in the way users with different Machine Learning expertise understand and use them.
summary: Explainability is motivated by the lack of transparency of black-box Machine Learning approaches, which do not foster trust and acceptance of Machine Learning algorithms. This also happens in the Predictive Process Monitoring field, where predictions, obtained by applying Machine Learning techniques, need to be explained to users, so as to gain their trust and acceptance. In this work, we carry on a user evaluation on explanation approaches for Predictive Process Monitoring aiming at investigating whether and how the explanations provided (i) are understandable; (ii) are useful in decision making tasks;(iii) can be further improved for process analysts, with different Machine Learning expertise levels. The results of the user evaluation show that, although explanation plots are overall understandable and useful for decision making tasks for Business Process Management users -- with and without experience in Machine Learning -- differences exist in the comprehension and usage of different plots, as well as in the way users with different Machine Learning expertise understand and use them.
abstract_zh: 可解释性是由于黑盒机器学习方法缺乏透明度而产生的，这种方法不能促进对机器学习算法的信任和接受。这种情况也发生在预测过程监控领域，通过应用机器学习技术获得的预测需要向用户解释，以获得他们的信任和接受。在这项工作中，我们对预测过程监控的解释方法进行了用户评估，旨在调查所提供的解释是否以及如何理解（i）； (ii) 在决策任务中有用；(iii) 对于具有不同机器学习专业水平的流程分析师来说可以进一步改进。用户评估的结果表明，尽管解释图总体上是可以理解的并且对于业务流程管理用户的决策任务很有用（无论是否有机器学习经验），但对不同图的理解和使用以及具有不同机器学习专业知识的用户理解和使用它们的方式存在差异。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过用户评估研究预测过程监控中的可解释性方法，探讨不同用户对解释结果的理解、决策支持效果及改进空间。
AI.motivation: 黑箱机器学习模型缺乏透明度，导致用户信任度不足。在预测过程监控领域，需通过解释性方法增强用户对预测结果的信任与接受度。
AI.method: 对预测过程监控的解释方法进行用户评估，从可理解性、决策支持有效性及不同机器学习经验用户的改进需求三个维度分析。
AI.result: 解释图表整体被用户理解且有助于决策，但不同用户群体（尤其机器学习经验差异）在理解深度和使用方式上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 解释性方法对业务流程管理用户有效，但需针对不同专业背景优化解释形式，以提升普适性与实用性。

authors_text: Qiang Wang,Susan Fernandes,Gareth O. S. Williams,Neil Finlayson,Ahsan R. Akram,Kevin Dhaliwal,James R. Hopgood,Marta Vallejo
title: Deep Learning-Assisted Co-registration of Full-Spectral Autofluorescence Lifetime Microscopic Images with H&E-Stained Histology Images
title_zh: 深度学习辅助全光谱自发荧光寿命显微图像与 H&E 染色组织学图像的联合配准
abstract: Autofluorescence lifetime images reveal unique characteristics of endogenous fluorescence in biological samples. Comprehensive understanding and clinical diagnosis rely on co-registration with the gold standard, histology images, which is extremely challenging due to the difference of both images. Here, we show an unsupervised image-to-image translation network that significantly improves the success of the co-registration using a conventional optimisation-based regression network, applicable to autofluorescence lifetime images at different emission wavelengths. A preliminary blind comparison by experienced researchers shows the superiority of our method on co-registration. The results also indicate that the approach is applicable to various image formats, like fluorescence intensity images. With the registration, stitching outcomes illustrate the distinct differences of the spectral lifetime across an unstained tissue, enabling macro-level rapid visual identification of lung cancer and cellular-level characterisation of cell variants and common types. The approach could be effortlessly extended to lifetime images beyond this range and other staining technologies.
summary: Autofluorescence lifetime images reveal unique characteristics of endogenous fluorescence in biological samples. Comprehensive understanding and clinical diagnosis rely on co-registration with the gold standard, histology images, which is extremely challenging due to the difference of both images. Here, we show an unsupervised image-to-image translation network that significantly improves the success of the co-registration using a conventional optimisation-based regression network, applicable to autofluorescence lifetime images at different emission wavelengths. A preliminary blind comparison by experienced researchers shows the superiority of our method on co-registration. The results also indicate that the approach is applicable to various image formats, like fluorescence intensity images. With the registration, stitching outcomes illustrate the distinct differences of the spectral lifetime across an unstained tissue, enabling macro-level rapid visual identification of lung cancer and cellular-level characterisation of cell variants and common types. The approach could be effortlessly extended to lifetime images beyond this range and other staining technologies.
abstract_zh: 自发荧光寿命图像揭示了生物样品中内源荧光的独特特征。全面的理解和临床诊断依赖于与金标准组织学图像的共同配准，由于两种图像的差异，这极具挑战性。在这里，我们展示了一种无监督的图像到图像转换网络，该网络使用传统的基于优化的回归网络显着提高了联合配准的成功率，适用于不同发射波长的自发荧光寿命图像。经验丰富的研究人员进行的初步盲比显示了我们的方法在联合配准方面的优越性。结果还表明该方法适用于各种图像格式，例如荧光强度图像。通过配准，拼接结果显示了未染色组织中光谱寿命的明显差异，从而能够对肺癌进行宏观水平的快速视觉识别，并对细胞变异和常见类型进行细胞水平的表征。该方法可以毫不费力地扩展到超出此范围的终身图像和其他染色技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的无监督图像到图像翻译网络，用于改善全光谱自荧光寿命显微图像与H&E染色组织学图像的配准。
AI.motivation: 自荧光寿命图像与组织学图像因成像原理差异导致配准困难，而准确配准对临床诊断至关重要。
AI.method: 结合无监督图像翻译网络与传统优化回归网络，实现跨模态图像配准，并验证其在不同波长和图像格式中的适用性。
AI.result: 专家盲测验证方法优越性，配准结果可区分肺部组织光谱寿命差异，支持宏观癌症识别与细胞层面分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升配准精度，具有扩展至其他成像技术和染色方法的潜力。

authors_text: Nicholas Pellegrino,Paul Fieguth,Parsin Haji Reza
title: K-Means for Noise-Insensitive Multi-Dimensional Feature Learning
title_zh: 用于噪声不敏感多维特征学习的 K 均值
comment: Under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters. 6 pages (excluding references), 5 figures
comments: Under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters. 6 pages (excluding references), 5 figures
abstract: Many measurement modalities which perform imaging by probing an object pixel-by-pixel, such as via Photoacoustic Microscopy, produce a multi-dimensional feature (typically a time-domain signal) at each pixel. In principle, the many degrees of freedom in the time-domain signal would admit the possibility of significant multi-modal information being implicitly present, much more than a single scalar "brightness", regarding the underlying targets being observed. However, the measured signal is neither a weighted-sum of basis functions (such as principal components) nor one of a set of prototypes (K-means), which has motivated the novel clustering method proposed here. Signals are clustered based on their shape, but not amplitude, via angular distance and centroids are calculated as the direction of maximal intra-cluster variance, resulting in a clustering algorithm capable of learning centroids (signal shapes) that are related to the underlying, albeit unknown, target characteristics in a scalable and noise-robust manner.
summary: Many measurement modalities which perform imaging by probing an object pixel-by-pixel, such as via Photoacoustic Microscopy, produce a multi-dimensional feature (typically a time-domain signal) at each pixel. In principle, the many degrees of freedom in the time-domain signal would admit the possibility of significant multi-modal information being implicitly present, much more than a single scalar "brightness", regarding the underlying targets being observed. However, the measured signal is neither a weighted-sum of basis functions (such as principal components) nor one of a set of prototypes (K-means), which has motivated the novel clustering method proposed here. Signals are clustered based on their shape, but not amplitude, via angular distance and centroids are calculated as the direction of maximal intra-cluster variance, resulting in a clustering algorithm capable of learning centroids (signal shapes) that are related to the underlying, albeit unknown, target characteristics in a scalable and noise-robust manner.
abstract_zh: 许多通过逐像素探测物体来执行成像的测量方式（例如通过光声显微镜）在每个像素处产生多维特征（通常是时域信号）。原则上，时域信号中的多个自由度将承认隐含存在显着多模态信息的可能性，其远大于关于被观察的潜在目标的单个标量“亮度”。然而，测量的信号既不是基函数（例如主成分）的加权和，也不是一组原型（K-means）中的一个，这激发了这里提出的新颖的聚类方法。信号通过角距离根据其形状而不是幅度进行聚类，并且将质心计算为最大簇内方差的方向，从而产生能够以可扩展和抗噪声方式学习与潜在（尽管未知）目标特征相关的质心（信号形状）的聚类算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的K-means聚类方法，通过基于信号形状而非振幅的聚类方式，实现多维特征的噪声鲁棒学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如PCA和传统K-means无法有效处理成像技术中产生的多维时域信号，因其既非基础函数加权和，也非原型集合，需新方法提取多模态信息并抑制噪声影响。
AI.method: 基于角度距离对信号形状进行聚类，通过计算类内方差最大方向作为聚类中心，实现与目标特征相关且抗噪声的中心学习。
AI.result: 该方法能有效学习到与未知目标特性相关的信号形状中心，在保持可扩展性的同时提升噪声环境下的聚类鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的聚类算法为多维特征学习提供了新思路，尤其适用于存在噪声的成像场景，可挖掘传统方法难以捕捉的多模态信息。

search_text: K-Means for Noise-Insensitive Multi-Dimensional Feature Learning 用于噪声不敏感多维特征学习的 K 均值 Many measurement modalities which perform imaging by probing an object pixel-by-pixel, such as via Photoacoustic Microscopy, produce a multi-dimensional feature (typically a time-domain signal) at each pixel. In principle, the many degrees of freedom in the time-domain signal would admit the possibility of significant multi-modal information being implicitly present, much more than a single scalar "brightness", regarding the underlying targets being observed. However, the measured signal is neither a weighted-sum of basis functions (such as principal components) nor one of a set of prototypes (K-means), which has motivated the novel clustering method proposed here. Signals are clustered based on their shape, but not amplitude, via angular distance and centroids are calculated as the direction of maximal intra-cluster variance, resulting in a clustering algorithm capable of learning centroids (signal shapes) that are related to the underlying, albeit unknown, target characteristics in a scalable and noise-robust manner. 许多通过逐像素探测物体来执行成像的测量方式（例如通过光声显微镜）在每个像素处产生多维特征（通常是时域信号）。原则上，时域信号中的多个自由度将承认隐含存在显着多模态信息的可能性，其远大于关于被观察的潜在目标的单个标量“亮度”。然而，测量的信号既不是基函数（例如主成分）的加权和，也不是一组原型（K-means）中的一个，这激发了这里提出的新颖的聚类方法。信号通过角距离根据其形状而不是幅度进行聚类，并且将质心计算为最大簇内方差的方向，从而产生能够以可扩展和抗噪声方式学习与潜在（尽管未知）目标特征相关的质心（信号形状）的聚类算法。 本文提出一种改进的K-means聚类方法，通过基于信号形状而非振幅的聚类方式，实现多维特征的噪声鲁棒学习。 Nicholas Pellegrino,Paul Fieguth,Parsin Haji Reza cs.CV,eess.SP

authors_text: Colin Lea,Zifang Huang,Dhruv Jain,Lauren Tooley,Zeinab Liaghat,Shrinath Thelapurath,Leah Findlater,Jeffrey P. Bigham
title: Nonverbal Sound Detection for Disordered Speech
title_zh: 言语障碍的非语言声音检测
abstract: Voice assistants have become an essential tool for people with various disabilities because they enable complex phone- or tablet-based interactions without the need for fine-grained motor control, such as with touchscreens. However, these systems are not tuned for the unique characteristics of individuals with speech disorders, including many of those who have a motor-speech disorder, are deaf or hard of hearing, have a severe stutter, or are minimally verbal. We introduce an alternative voice-based input system which relies on sound event detection using fifteen nonverbal mouth sounds like "pop," "click," or "eh." This system was designed to work regardless of ones' speech abilities and allows full access to existing technology. In this paper, we describe the design of a dataset, model considerations for real-world deployment, and efforts towards model personalization. Our fully-supervised model achieves segment-level precision and recall of 88.6% and 88.4% on an internal dataset of 710 adults, while achieving 0.31 false positives per hour on aggressors such as speech. Five-shot personalization enables satisfactory performance in 84.5% of cases where the generic model fails.
summary: Voice assistants have become an essential tool for people with various disabilities because they enable complex phone- or tablet-based interactions without the need for fine-grained motor control, such as with touchscreens. However, these systems are not tuned for the unique characteristics of individuals with speech disorders, including many of those who have a motor-speech disorder, are deaf or hard of hearing, have a severe stutter, or are minimally verbal. We introduce an alternative voice-based input system which relies on sound event detection using fifteen nonverbal mouth sounds like "pop," "click," or "eh." This system was designed to work regardless of ones' speech abilities and allows full access to existing technology. In this paper, we describe the design of a dataset, model considerations for real-world deployment, and efforts towards model personalization. Our fully-supervised model achieves segment-level precision and recall of 88.6% and 88.4% on an internal dataset of 710 adults, while achieving 0.31 false positives per hour on aggressors such as speech. Five-shot personalization enables satisfactory performance in 84.5% of cases where the generic model fails.
abstract_zh: 语音助手已成为各种残疾人士的重要工具，因为它们可以实现复杂的基于手机或平板电脑的交互，而无需细粒度的运动控制（例如触摸屏）。然而，这些系统并未针对患有言语障碍的个体的独特特征进行调整，包括许多患有运动言语障碍、耳聋或听力困难、严重口吃或言语能力极差的人。我们引入了一种替代的基于语音的输入系统，该系统依赖于使用 15 个非语言口音（例如“pop”、“click”或“eh”）进行声音事件检测。该系统的设计目的是无论人的言语能力如何，都可以正常工作，并允许完全访问现有技术。在本文中，我们描述了数据集的设计、实际部署的模型注意事项以及模型个性化的努力。我们的完全监督模型在 710 名成年人的内部数据集上实现了分段级精确度和召回率分别为 88.6% 和 88.4%，同时针对言语等攻击者实现了每小时 0.31 的误报。在通用模型失败的情况下，五次个性化可以在 84.5% 的情况下实现令人满意的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非语言声音检测的语音输入系统，旨在帮助言语障碍者使用现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有语音助手无法满足言语障碍者（如运动性言语障碍、听力障碍者）的需求，需开发无需传统语音输入的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计包含15种非语言口腔声音的数据集，采用全监督模型并结合五次射击个性化方法优化模型适应性。
AI.result: 全监督模型在710人内部数据集上实现88.6%精度和88.4%召回率，每小时误报仅0.31次；五次射击个性化在84.5%的通用模型失效案例中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为言语障碍者提供了有效技术接入途径，但需进一步优化模型泛化能力和个性化效率。

authors_text: Mariam Guizani,Thomas Zimmermann,Anita Sarma,Denae Ford
title: Attracting and Retaining OSS Contributors with a Maintainer Dashboard
title_zh: 通过维护者仪表板吸引和留住 OSS 贡献者
abstract: Tools and artifacts produced by open source software (OSS) have been woven into the foundation of the technology industry. To keep this foundation intact, the open source community needs to actively invest in sustainable approaches to bring in new contributors and nurture existing ones. We take a first step at this by collaboratively designing a maintainer dashboard that provides recommendations on how to attract and retain open source contributors. For example, by highlighting project goals (e.g., a social good cause) to attract diverse contributors and mechanisms to acknowledge (e.g., a "rising contributor" badge) existing contributors. Next, we conduct a project-specific evaluation with maintainers to better understand use cases in which this tool will be most helpful at supporting their plans for growth. From analyzing feedback, we find recommendations to be useful at signaling projects as welcoming and providing gentle nudges for maintainers to proactively recognize emerging contributors. However, there are complexities to consider when designing recommendations such as the project current development state (e.g., deadlines, milestones, refactoring) and governance model. Finally, we distill our findings to share what the future of recommendations in open source looks like and how to make these recommendations most meaningful over time.
summary: Tools and artifacts produced by open source software (OSS) have been woven into the foundation of the technology industry. To keep this foundation intact, the open source community needs to actively invest in sustainable approaches to bring in new contributors and nurture existing ones. We take a first step at this by collaboratively designing a maintainer dashboard that provides recommendations on how to attract and retain open source contributors. For example, by highlighting project goals (e.g., a social good cause) to attract diverse contributors and mechanisms to acknowledge (e.g., a "rising contributor" badge) existing contributors. Next, we conduct a project-specific evaluation with maintainers to better understand use cases in which this tool will be most helpful at supporting their plans for growth. From analyzing feedback, we find recommendations to be useful at signaling projects as welcoming and providing gentle nudges for maintainers to proactively recognize emerging contributors. However, there are complexities to consider when designing recommendations such as the project current development state (e.g., deadlines, milestones, refactoring) and governance model. Finally, we distill our findings to share what the future of recommendations in open source looks like and how to make these recommendations most meaningful over time.
abstract_zh: 开源软件 (OSS) 生成的工具和工件已融入技术行业的基础。为了保持这个基础的完整性，开源社区需要积极投资于可持续的方法，以引入新的贡献者并培养现有的贡献者。我们在这方面迈出了第一步，合作设计了一个维护者仪表板，该仪表板提供了有关如何吸引和留住开源贡献者的建议。例如，通过突出项目目标（例如，社会公益事业）来吸引不同的贡献者和机制来认可（例如，“崛起的贡献者”徽章）现有的贡献者。接下来，我们与维护人员进行特定于项目的评估，以更好地了解该工具在支持他们的增长计划方面最有帮助的用例。通过分析反馈，我们发现建议有助于向项目发出欢迎信号，并为维护人员主动认可新兴贡献者提供温和的推动。然而，在设计建议时需要考虑一些复杂性，例如项目当前的开发状态（例如，截止日期、里程碑、重构）和治理模型。最后，我们总结了我们的研究结果，以分享开源建议的未来是什么样子，以及如何随着时间的推移使这些建议变得最有意义。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个维护者仪表板，旨在通过提供具体建议帮助开源项目吸引更多贡献者并留住现有贡献者。
AI.motivation: 开源软件（OSS）是技术行业的基础，但社区需要可持续的方法来吸引新贡献者并培养现有贡献者，以维持其发展。
AI.method: 通过协作设计维护者仪表板，包含项目目标展示和贡献者认可机制，并针对具体项目进行评估以验证工具的实际应用场景。
AI.result: 反馈显示仪表板能有效传递项目友好性并提醒维护者主动认可新贡献者，但需考虑项目发展阶段和治理模式等复杂因素。
AI.conclusion: 未来推荐系统需结合项目具体情境，动态调整建议以长期提升开源社区的可持续性。

search_text: Attracting and Retaining OSS Contributors with a Maintainer Dashboard 通过维护者仪表板吸引和留住 OSS 贡献者 Tools and artifacts produced by open source software (OSS) have been woven into the foundation of the technology industry. To keep this foundation intact, the open source community needs to actively invest in sustainable approaches to bring in new contributors and nurture existing ones. We take a first step at this by collaboratively designing a maintainer dashboard that provides recommendations on how to attract and retain open source contributors. For example, by highlighting project goals (e.g., a social good cause) to attract diverse contributors and mechanisms to acknowledge (e.g., a "rising contributor" badge) existing contributors. Next, we conduct a project-specific evaluation with maintainers to better understand use cases in which this tool will be most helpful at supporting their plans for growth. From analyzing feedback, we find recommendations to be useful at signaling projects as welcoming and providing gentle nudges for maintainers to proactively recognize emerging contributors. However, there are complexities to consider when designing recommendations such as the project current development state (e.g., deadlines, milestones, refactoring) and governance model. Finally, we distill our findings to share what the future of recommendations in open source looks like and how to make these recommendations most meaningful over time. 开源软件 (OSS) 生成的工具和工件已融入技术行业的基础。为了保持这个基础的完整性，开源社区需要积极投资于可持续的方法，以引入新的贡献者并培养现有的贡献者。我们在这方面迈出了第一步，合作设计了一个维护者仪表板，该仪表板提供了有关如何吸引和留住开源贡献者的建议。例如，通过突出项目目标（例如，社会公益事业）来吸引不同的贡献者和机制来认可（例如，“崛起的贡献者”徽章）现有的贡献者。接下来，我们与维护人员进行特定于项目的评估，以更好地了解该工具在支持他们的增长计划方面最有帮助的用例。通过分析反馈，我们发现建议有助于向项目发出欢迎信号，并为维护人员主动认可新兴贡献者提供温和的推动。然而，在设计建议时需要考虑一些复杂性，例如项目当前的开发状态（例如，截止日期、里程碑、重构）和治理模型。最后，我们总结了我们的研究结果，以分享开源建议的未来是什么样子，以及如何随着时间的推移使这些建议变得最有意义。 本文设计了一个维护者仪表板，旨在通过提供具体建议帮助开源项目吸引更多贡献者并留住现有贡献者。 Mariam Guizani,Thomas Zimmermann,Anita Sarma,Denae Ford cs.SE,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Yunpeng Shi,Amit Singer
title: Ab-initio Contrast Estimation and Denoising of Cryo-EM Images
title_zh: 冷冻电镜图像的从头算对比度估计和去噪
abstract: Background and Objective: The contrast of cryo-EM images varies from one to another, primarily due to the uneven thickness of the ice layer. This contrast variation can affect the quality of 2-D class averaging, 3-D ab-initio modeling, and 3-D heterogeneity analysis. Contrast estimation is currently performed during 3-D iterative refinement. As a result, the estimates are not available at the earlier computational stages of class averaging and ab-initio modeling. This paper aims to solve the contrast estimation problem directly from the picked particle images in the ab-initio stage, without estimating the 3-D volume, image rotations, or class averages. Methods: The key observation underlying our analysis is that the 2-D covariance matrix of the raw images is related to the covariance of the underlying clean images, the noise variance, and the contrast variability between images. We show that the contrast variability can be derived from the 2-D covariance matrix and we apply the existing Covariance Wiener Filtering (CWF) framework to estimate it. We also demonstrate a modification of CWF to estimate the contrast of individual images. Results: Our method improves the contrast estimation by a large margin, compared to the previous CWF method. Its estimation accuracy is often comparable to that of an oracle that knows the ground truth covariance of the clean images. The more accurate contrast estimation also improves the quality of image restoration as demonstrated in both synthetic and experimental datasets. Conclusions: This paper proposes an effective method for contrast estimation directly from noisy images without using any 3-D volume information. It enables contrast correction in the earlier stage of single particle analysis, and may improve the accuracy of downstream processing.

This contrast variation can affect the quality of 2-D class averaging, 3-D ab-initio modeling, and 3-D heterogeneity analysis. Contrast estimation is currently performed during 3-D iterative refinement. As a result, the estimates are not available at the earlier computational stages of class averaging and ab-initio modeling. This paper aims to solve the contrast estimation problem directly from the picked particle images in the ab-initio stage, without estimating the 3-D volume, image rotations, or class averages. Methods: The key observation underlying our analysis is that the 2-D covariance matrix of the raw images is related to the covariance of the underlying clean images, the noise variance, and the contrast variability between images. We show that the contrast variability can be derived from the 2-D covariance matrix and we apply the existing Covariance Wiener Filtering (CWF) framework to estimate it. We also demonstrate a modification of CWF to estimate the contrast of individual images. Results: Our method improves the contrast estimation by a large margin, compared to the previous CWF method. Its estimation accuracy is often comparable to that of an oracle that knows the ground truth covariance of the clean images. The more accurate contrast estimation also improves the quality of image restoration as demonstrated in both synthetic and experimental datasets. Conclusions: This paper proposes an effective method for contrast estimation directly from noisy images without using any 3-D volume information. abstract_zh: 背景和目的：冷冻电镜图像的对比度各不相同，这主要是由于冰层厚度不均匀造成的。这种对比度变化会影响 2-D 类平均、3-D 从头建模和 3-D 异质性分析的质量。目前，对比度估计是在 3D 迭代细化过程中执行的。因此，在类平均和从头建模的早期计算阶段无法获得估计值。本文旨在直接从从头开始阶段从拾取的粒子图像中解决对比度估计问题，而不估计 3-D 体积、图像旋转或类平均值。方法：我们分析的关键观察结果是，原始图像的二维协方差矩阵与底层干净图像的协方差、噪声方差和图像之间的对比度变异性相关。我们证明对比度变异性可以从二维协方差矩阵中导出，并且我们应用现有的协方差维纳滤波（CWF）框架来估计它。我们还演示了对 CWF 的修改来估计单个图像的对比度。结果：与之前的 CWF 方法相比，我们的方法大幅提高了对比度估计。它的估计精度通常可以与了解干净图像的真实协方差的预言机相媲美。更准确的对比度估计还可以提高图像恢复的质量，如合成数据集和实验数据集所示。结论：本文提出了一种直接从噪声图像进行对比度估计的有效方法，无需使用任何 3-D 体积信息。它可以在单颗粒分析的早期阶段进行对比度校正，并可以提高下游处理的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需3D体积信息即可直接从冷冻电镜单颗粒图像中进行对比度估计和去噪的方法。
AI.motivation: 冷冻电镜图像的对比度因冰层厚度不均而变化，影响后续分析质量。现有方法在3D迭代优化阶段进行对比度估计，无法在早期阶段（如类平均和初始建模）使用。
AI.method: 利用原始图像的2D协方差矩阵与清洁图像协方差、噪声方差及对比度变化的关系，改进协方差维纳滤波框架（CWF），直接从单颗粒图像估计对比度。
AI.result: 新方法对比度估计精度显著优于传统CWF方法，接近已知清洁图像真实协方差的「神谕」水平，并提升了合成与实验数据的图像复原质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需3D信息的早期对比度校正，可提升单颗粒分析后续处理的准确性。

authors_text: Tauheed Khan Mohd,Nicole Nguyen,Ahmad Y Javaid
title: Multi-Modal Data Fusion in Enhancing Human-Machine Interaction for Robotic Applications: A Survey
title_zh: 多模态数据融合增强机器人应用人机交互：一项调查
abstract: Human-machine interaction has been around for several decades now, with new applications emerging every day. One of the major goals that remain to be achieved is designing an interaction similar to how a human interacts with another human. Therefore, there is a need to develop interactive systems that could replicate a more realistic and easier human-machine interaction. On the other hand, developers and researchers need to be aware of state-of-the-art methodologies being used to achieve this goal. We present this survey to provide researchers with state-of-the-art data fusion technologies implemented using multiple inputs to accomplish a task in the robotic application domain. Moreover, the input data modalities are broadly classified into uni-modal and multi-modal systems and their application in myriad industries, including the health care industry, which contributes to the medical industry's future development. It will help the professionals to examine patients using different modalities. The multi-modal systems are differentiated by a combination of inputs used as a single input, e.g., gestures, voice, sensor, and haptic feedback. All these inputs may or may not be fused, which provides another classification of multi-modal systems. The survey concludes with a summary of technologies in use for multi-modal systems.
summary: Human-machine interaction has been around for several decades now, with new applications emerging every day. One of the major goals that remain to be achieved is designing an interaction similar to how a human interacts with another human. Therefore, there is a need to develop interactive systems that could replicate a more realistic and easier human-machine interaction. On the other hand, developers and researchers need to be aware of state-of-the-art methodologies being used to achieve this goal. We present this survey to provide researchers with state-of-the-art data fusion technologies implemented using multiple inputs to accomplish a task in the robotic application domain. Moreover, the input data modalities are broadly classified into uni-modal and multi-modal systems and their application in myriad industries, including the health care industry, which contributes to the medical industry's future development. It will help the professionals to examine patients using different modalities. The multi-modal systems are differentiated by a combination of inputs used as a single input, e.g., gestures, voice, sensor, and haptic feedback. All these inputs may or may not be fused, which provides another classification of multi-modal systems. The survey concludes with a summary of technologies in use for multi-modal systems.
abstract_zh: 人机交互已经存在了几十年，每天都有新的应用出现。仍有待实现的主要目标之一是设计一种类似于人与人之间交互方式的交互方式。因此，需要开发能够复制更真实、更容易的人机交互的交互系统。另一方面，开发人员和研究人员需要了解用于实现这一目标的最先进的方法。我们提出这项调查是为了向研究人员提供最先进的数据融合技术，这些技术使用多个输入来完成机器人应用领域的任务。此外，输入数据模态大致分为单模态和多模态系统，其在包括医疗保健行业在内的众多行业中的应用，有助于医疗行业的未来发展。它将帮助专业人员使用不同的方式检查患者。多模态系统的区别在于用作单个输入的输入组合，例如手势、语音、传感器和触觉反馈。所有这些输入可能会或可能不会被融合，这提供了多模态系统的另一种分类。调查最后总结了多模式系统所使用的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态数据融合技术在增强机器人应用中人机交互领域的最新进展。
AI.motivation: 现有系统难以实现类人交互，需通过多模态数据融合提升交互的自然性与实用性，尤其在医疗等关键行业。
AI.method: 分类梳理单模态与多模态系统，分析其输入模态组合方式（如手势、语音、传感器等）及融合技术，并总结应用案例。
AI.result: 总结了当前多模态系统的核心技术，明确了不同模态组合对交互性能的影响，并指出医疗等领域的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合是实现高效人机交互的关键，未来需进一步优化融合算法以适应复杂场景需求。

result: 总结了当前多模态系统的核心技术，明确了不同模态组合对交互性能的影响，并指出医疗等领域的应用潜力。
conclusion: 多模态数据融合是实现高效人机交互的关键，未来需进一步优化融合算法以适应复杂场景需求。
search_text: Multi-Modal Data Fusion in Enhancing Human-Machine Interaction for Robotic Applications: A Survey 多模态数据融合增强机器人应用人机交互：一项调查 Human-machine interaction has been around for several decades now, with new applications emerging every day. One of the major goals that remain to be achieved is designing an interaction similar to how a human interacts with another human. Therefore, there is a need to develop interactive systems that could replicate a more realistic and easier human-machine interaction. On the other hand, developers and researchers need to be aware of state-of-the-art methodologies being used to achieve this goal. We present this survey to provide researchers with state-of-the-art data fusion technologies implemented using multiple inputs to accomplish a task in the robotic application domain. Moreover, the input data modalities are broadly classified into uni-modal and multi-modal systems and their application in myriad industries, including the health care industry, which contributes to the medical industry's future development. It will help the professionals to examine patients using different modalities. The multi-modal systems are differentiated by a combination of inputs used as a single input, e.g., gestures, voice, sensor, and haptic feedback. All these inputs may or may not be fused, which provides another classification of multi-modal systems. The survey concludes with a summary of technologies in use for multi-modal systems. 人机交互已经存在了几十年，每天都有新的应用出现。仍有待实现的主要目标之一是设计一种类似于人与人之间交互方式的交互方式。因此，需要开发能够复制更真实、更容易的人机交互的交互系统。另一方面，开发人员和研究人员需要了解用于实现这一目标的最先进的方法。我们提出这项调查是为了向研究人员提供最先进的数据融合技术，这些技术使用多个输入来完成机器人应用领域的任务。此外，输入数据模态大致分为单模态和多模态系统，其在包括医疗保健行业在内的众多行业中的应用，有助于医疗行业的未来发展。它将帮助专业人员使用不同的方式检查患者。多模态系统的区别在于用作单个输入的输入组合，例如手势、语音、传感器和触觉反馈。所有这些输入可能会或可能不会被融合，这提供了多模态系统的另一种分类。调查最后总结了多模式系统所使用的技术。 本文综述了多模态数据融合技术在增强机器人应用中人机交互领域的最新进展。 Tauheed Khan Mohd,Nicole Nguyen,Ahmad Y Javaid cs.HC

authors_text: Duolikun Danier,Fan Zhang,David Bull
title: Enhancing Deformable Convolution based Video Frame Interpolation with Coarse-to-fine 3D CNN
title_zh: 使用从粗到细的 3D CNN 增强基于可变形卷积的视频帧插值
abstract: This paper presents a new deformable convolution-based video frame interpolation (VFI) method, using a coarse to fine 3D CNN to enhance the multi-flow prediction. This model first extracts spatio-temporal features at multiple scales using a 3D CNN, and estimates multi-flows using these features in a coarse-to-fine manner. The estimated multi-flows are then used to warp the original input frames as well as context maps, and the warped results are fused by a synthesis network to produce the final output. This VFI approach has been fully evaluated against 12 state-of-the-art VFI methods on three commonly used test databases. The results evidently show the effectiveness of the proposed method, which offers superior interpolation performance over other state of the art algorithms, with PSNR gains up to 0.19dB.
summary: This paper presents a new deformable convolution-based video frame interpolation (VFI) method, using a coarse to fine 3D CNN to enhance the multi-flow prediction. This model first extracts spatio-temporal features at multiple scales using a 3D CNN, and estimates multi-flows using these features in a coarse-to-fine manner. The estimated multi-flows are then used to warp the original input frames as well as context maps, and the warped results are fused by a synthesis network to produce the final output. This VFI approach has been fully evaluated against 12 state-of-the-art VFI methods on three commonly used test databases. The results evidently show the effectiveness of the proposed method, which offers superior interpolation performance over other state of the art algorithms, with PSNR gains up to 0.19dB.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的基于可变形卷积的视频帧插值（VFI）方法，使用从粗到细的 3D CNN 来增强多流预测。该模型首先使用 3D CNN 提取多个尺度的时空特征，并使用这些特征以从粗到细的方式估计多流。然后使用估计的多流来扭曲原始输入帧以及上下文映射，并且扭曲的结果由合成网络融合以产生最终输出。该 VFI 方法已在三个常用测试数据库上针对 12 种最先进的 VFI 方法进行了全面评估。结果清楚地表明了所提出方法的有效性，该方法提供了优于其他最先进算法的插值性能，PSNR 增益高达 0.19dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可变形卷积和粗到细3D CNN的视频帧插值方法，通过多流预测提升插值效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频帧插值方法在多流预测和时空特征建模方面存在不足，难以准确捕捉复杂运动模式。
AI.method: 采用多尺度3D CNN提取时空特征，通过粗到细策略估计多流，利用流场对原始帧和上下文图进行变形，最终通过合成网络融合生成结果。
AI.result: 在三个常用测试数据库上对比12种先进方法，PSNR指标最高提升0.19dB，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进多流预测机制和时空特征融合策略，在视频帧插值任务中实现了优于现有算法的性能提升。

authors_text: Thomas Fel,Melanie Ducoffe,David Vigouroux,Remi Cadene,Mikael Capelle,Claire Nicodeme,Thomas Serre
title: Don't Lie to Me! Robust and Efficient Explainability with Verified Perturbation Analysis
title_zh: 别对我撒谎！通过经过验证的扰动分析实现稳健、高效的可解释性
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE / CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR), 2023
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE / CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR), 2023
abstract: A variety of methods have been proposed to try to explain how deep neural networks make their decisions. Key to those approaches is the need to sample the pixel space efficiently in order to derive importance maps. However, it has been shown that the sampling methods used to date introduce biases and other artifacts, leading to inaccurate estimates of the importance of individual pixels and severely limit the reliability of current explainability methods. Unfortunately, the alternative -- to exhaustively sample the image space is computationally prohibitive. In this paper, we introduce EVA (Explaining using Verified perturbation Analysis) -- the first explainability method guarantee to have an exhaustive exploration of a perturbation space. Specifically, we leverage the beneficial properties of verified perturbation analysis -- time efficiency, tractability and guaranteed complete coverage of a manifold -- to efficiently characterize the input variables that are most likely to drive the model decision. We evaluate the approach systematically and demonstrate state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.
summary: A variety of methods have been proposed to try to explain how deep neural networks make their decisions. Key to those approaches is the need to sample the pixel space efficiently in order to derive importance maps. However, it has been shown that the sampling methods used to date introduce biases and other artifacts, leading to inaccurate estimates of the importance of individual pixels and severely limit the reliability of current explainability methods. Unfortunately, the alternative -- to exhaustively sample the image space is computationally prohibitive. In this paper, we introduce EVA (Explaining using Verified perturbation Analysis) -- the first explainability method guarantee to have an exhaustive exploration of a perturbation space. Specifically, we leverage the beneficial properties of verified perturbation analysis -- time efficiency, tractability and guaranteed complete coverage of a manifold -- to efficiently characterize the input variables that are most likely to drive the model decision. We evaluate the approach systematically and demonstrate state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了多种方法来尝试解释深度神经网络如何做出决策。这些方法的关键是需要有效地对像素空间进行采样，以便得出重要性图。然而，事实证明，迄今为止使用的采样方法引入了偏差和其他伪影，导致对单个像素的重要性的估计不准确，并严重限制了当前可解释性方法的可靠性。不幸的是，替代方案——对图像空间进行彻底采样在计算上是令人望而却步的。在本文中，我们介绍了 EVA（使用验证扰动分析进行解释）——第一个保证对扰动空间进行详尽探索的可解释性方法。具体来说，我们利用经过验证的扰动分析的有益特性——时间效率、易处理性和保证流形的完全覆盖——来有效地表征最有可能驱动模型决策的输入变量。我们系统地评估该方法并在多个基准上展示最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EVA的可解释性方法，通过验证的扰动分析实现对深度神经网络决策的鲁棒且高效的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法因采样偏差和计算开销问题导致可靠性不足，而穷举采样又不可行，需寻找兼顾效率与准确性的新方法。
AI.method: 利用验证扰动分析的高效性、可处理性及完全覆盖特性，系统探索扰动空间以确定驱动模型决策的关键输入变量。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进的解释效果，验证了EVA在准确性和计算效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: EVA通过理论保证的扰动空间探索，显著提升了模型解释的可靠性，为可解释性研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Don't Lie to Me! Robust and Efficient Explainability with Verified Perturbation Analysis 别对我撒谎！通过经过验证的扰动分析实现稳健、高效的可解释性 A variety of methods have been proposed to try to explain how deep neural networks make their decisions. authors_text: Duolikun Danier,Fan Zhang,David Bull
title: A Subjective Quality Study for Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: 视频帧插值的主观质量研究
abstract: Video frame interpolation (VFI) is one of the fundamental research areas in video processing and there has been extensive research on novel and enhanced interpolation algorithms. The same is not true for quality assessment of the interpolated content. In this paper, we describe a subjective quality study for VFI based on a newly developed video database, BVI-VFI. BVI-VFI contains 36 reference sequences at three different frame rates and 180 distorted videos generated using five conventional and learning based VFI algorithms. Subjective opinion scores have been collected from 60 human participants, and then employed to evaluate eight popular quality metrics, including PSNR, SSIM and LPIPS which are all commonly used for assessing VFI methods. The results indicate that none of these metrics provide acceptable correlation with the perceived quality on interpolated content, with the best-performing metric, LPIPS, offering a SROCC value below 0.6. Our findings show that there is an urgent need to develop a bespoke perceptual quality metric for VFI. The BVI-VFI dataset is publicly available and can be accessed at https://danier97.github.io/BVI-VFI/.
summary: Video frame interpolation (VFI) is one of the fundamental research areas in video processing and there has been extensive research on novel and enhanced interpolation algorithms. The same is not true for quality assessment of the interpolated content. In this paper, we describe a subjective quality study for VFI based on a newly developed video database, BVI-VFI. BVI-VFI contains 36 reference sequences at three different frame rates and 180 distorted videos generated using five conventional and learning based VFI algorithms. Subjective opinion scores have been collected from 60 human participants, and then employed to evaluate eight popular quality metrics, including PSNR, SSIM and LPIPS which are all commonly used for assessing VFI methods. The results indicate that none of these metrics provide acceptable correlation with the perceived quality on interpolated content, with the best-performing metric, LPIPS, offering a SROCC value below 0.6. Our findings show that there is an urgent need to develop a bespoke perceptual quality metric for VFI. The BVI-VFI dataset is publicly available and can be accessed at https://danier97.github.io/BVI-VFI/.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值（VFI）是视频处理的基础研究领域之一，并且对新颖和增强的插值算法进行了广泛的研究。对于内插内容的质量评估而言，情况并非如此。在本文中，我们描述了基于新开发的视频数据库 BVI-VFI 的 VFI 主观质量研究。 BVI-VFI 包含三种不同帧速率的 36 个参考序列以及使用五种传统和基于学习的 VFI 算法生成的 180 个失真视频。从 60 名人类参与者那里收集了主观意见评分，然后用于评估八种流行的质量指标，包括 PSNR、SSIM 和 LPIPS，这些指标都常用于评估 VFI 方法。结果表明，这些指标均未提供与内插内容的感知质量可接受的相关性，其中表现最好的指标 LPIPS 提供的 SROCC 值低于 0.6。我们的研究结果表明，迫切需要为 VFI 开发定制的感知质量指标。 BVI-VFI 数据集是公开的，可以通过 https://danier97.github.io/BVI-VFI/ 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建新的视频数据库BVI-VFI，开展视频帧插值（VFI）的主观质量评估研究，分析现有质量度量指标与感知质量的相关性。
AI.motivation: 尽管VFI算法研究较多，但针对插值内容的质量评估方法缺乏系统研究，现有指标可能无法准确反映人眼感知质量。
AI.method: 构建包含36个参考序列和180个畸变视频的BVI-VFI数据集，采用5种传统和基于学习的VFI算法生成数据，收集60名参与者的主观评分，并用PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS等8种指标进行相关性分析。
AI.result: 所有测试指标与主观评分的SROCC值均未达0.6，其中表现最佳的LPIPS值为0.58，表明现有指标无法有效评估VFI质量。
AI.conclusion: 需开发专门针对VFI的感知质量度量方法，BVI-VFI数据集已公开供研究使用。

search_text: A Subjective Quality Study for Video Frame Interpolation 视频帧插值的主观质量研究 Video frame interpolation (VFI) is one of the fundamental research areas in video processing and there has been extensive research on novel and enhanced interpolation algorithms. The same is not true for quality assessment of the interpolated content. In this paper, we describe a subjective quality study for VFI based on a newly developed video database, BVI-VFI. BVI-VFI contains 36 reference sequences at three different frame rates and 180 distorted videos generated using five conventional and learning based VFI algorithms. Subjective opinion scores have been collected from 60 human participants, and then employed to evaluate eight popular quality metrics, including PSNR, SSIM and LPIPS which are all commonly used for assessing VFI methods. The results indicate that none of these metrics provide acceptable correlation with the perceived quality on interpolated content, with the best-performing metric, LPIPS, offering a SROCC value below 0.6. Our findings show that there is an urgent need to develop a bespoke perceptual quality metric for VFI. The BVI-VFI dataset is publicly available and can be accessed at https://danier97.github.io/BVI-VFI/. 视频帧插值（VFI）是视频处理的基础研究领域之一，并且对新颖和增强的插值算法进行了广泛的研究。对于内插内容的质量评估而言，情况并非如此。在本文中，我们描述了基于新开发的视频数据库 BVI-VFI 的 VFI 主观质量研究。 BVI-VFI 包含三种不同帧速率的 36 个参考序列以及使用五种传统和基于学习的 VFI 算法生成的 180 个失真视频。从 60 名人类参与者那里收集了主观意见评分，然后用于评估八种流行的质量指标，包括 PSNR、SSIM 和 LPIPS，这些指标都常用于评估 VFI 方法。结果表明，这些指标均未提供与内插内容的感知质量可接受的相关性，其中表现最好的指标 LPIPS 提供的 SROCC 值低于 0.6。我们的研究结果表明，迫切需要为 VFI 开发定制的感知质量指标。 BVI-VFI 数据集是公开的，可以通过 https://danier97.github.io/BVI-VFI/ 访问。 本文通过构建新的视频数据库BVI-VFI，开展视频帧插值（VFI）的主观质量评估研究，分析现有质量度量指标与感知质量的相关性。 Duolikun Danier,Fan Zhang,David Bull eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Haimin Hu,Jaime F. Fisac
title: Active Uncertainty Reduction for Human-Robot Interaction: An Implicit Dual Control Approach
title_zh: 人机交互的主动不确定性降低：隐式双重控制方法
comment: Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR) 2022
comments: Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR) 2022
abstract: The ability to accurately predict human behavior is central to the safety and efficiency of robot autonomy in interactive settings. Unfortunately, robots often lack access to key information on which these predictions may hinge, such as people's goals, attention, and willingness to cooperate. Dual control theory addresses this challenge by treating unknown parameters of a predictive model as stochastic hidden states and inferring their values at runtime using information gathered during system operation. While able to optimally and automatically trade off exploration and exploitation, dual control is computationally intractable for general interactive motion planning, mainly due to the fundamental coupling between robot trajectory optimization and human intent inference. In this paper, we present a novel algorithmic approach to enable active uncertainty reduction for interactive motion planning based on the implicit dual control paradigm. Our approach relies on sampling-based approximation of stochastic dynamic programming, leading to a model predictive control problem that can be readily solved by real-time gradient-based optimization methods. The resulting policy is shown to preserve the dual control effect for a broad class of predictive human models with both continuous and categorical uncertainty. The efficacy of our approach is demonstrated with simulated driving examples.
summary: The ability to accurately predict human behavior is central to the safety and efficiency of robot autonomy in interactive settings. Unfortunately, robots often lack access to key information on which these predictions may hinge, such as people's goals, attention, and willingness to cooperate. Dual control theory addresses this challenge by treating unknown parameters of a predictive model as stochastic hidden states and inferring their values at runtime using information gathered during system operation. While able to optimally and automatically trade off exploration and exploitation, dual control is computationally intractable for general interactive motion planning, mainly due to the fundamental coupling between robot trajectory optimization and human intent inference. In this paper, we present a novel algorithmic approach to enable active uncertainty reduction for interactive motion planning based on the implicit dual control paradigm. Our approach relies on sampling-based approximation of stochastic dynamic programming, leading to a model predictive control problem that can be readily solved by real-time gradient-based optimization methods. The resulting policy is shown to preserve the dual control effect for a broad class of predictive human models with both continuous and categorical uncertainty. The efficacy of our approach is demonstrated with simulated driving examples.
abstract_zh: 准确预测人类行为的能力对于交互环境中机器人自主的安全性和效率至关重要。不幸的是，机器人通常无法获取这些预测所依赖的关键信息，例如人们的目标、注意力和合作意愿。双控制理论通过将预测模型的未知参数视为随机隐藏状态并使用系统运行期间收集的信息在运行时推断它们的值来解决这一挑战。虽然能够最优、自动地权衡探索和利用，但双重控制对于一般交互式运动规划来说在计算上是困难的，这主要是由于机器人轨迹优化和人类意图推理之间的基本耦合。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的算法方法，可以基于隐式双控制范式来主动减少交互式运动规划的不确定性。我们的方法依赖于随机动态规划的基于采样的近似，从而产生可以通过基于实时梯度的优化方法轻松解决的模型预测控制问题。由此产生的策略被证明可以为具有连续和分类不确定性的广泛预测人类模型保留双重控制效果。我们的方法的有效性通过模拟驾驶示例得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式双重控制范式的算法，用于解决人机交互中机器人主动减少不确定性的计算难题。
AI.motivation: 机器人需预测人类行为以保证安全高效，但人类目标、注意力等关键信息缺失，传统双重控制方法因计算复杂度难以应用于实时交互场景。
AI.method: 通过采样近似随机动态规划，将问题转化为可实时求解的模型预测控制问题，采用梯度优化方法处理连续与分类不确定性。
AI.result: 算法在多种人类行为模型中保持双重控制效果，模拟驾驶实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了双重控制的计算瓶颈，为复杂人机交互场景提供了可行的实时决策框架。

authors_text: Guanrui Li,Alex Tunchez,Giuseppe Loianno
title: Learning Model Predictive Control for Quadrotors
title_zh: 四旋翼飞行器的学习模型预测控制
comment: Guanrui Li and Alex Tunchez contributed equally to this paper. This paper has been accepted to the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation. Please cite this paper with the standard IEEE Conference format. Link to the Video: https://youtu.be/-5cIsIM5G7M
comments: Guanrui Li and Alex Tunchez contributed equally to this paper. This paper has been accepted to the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation. Please cite this paper with the standard IEEE Conference format. Link to the Video: https://youtu.be/-5cIsIM5G7M
abstract: Aerial robots can enhance their safe and agile navigation in complex and cluttered environments by efficiently exploiting the information collected during a given task. In this paper, we address the learning model predictive control problem for quadrotors. We design a learning receding--horizon nonlinear control strategy directly formulated on the system nonlinear manifold configuration space SO(3)xR^3. The proposed approach exploits past successful task iterations to improve the system performance over time while respecting system dynamics and actuator constraints. We further relax its computational complexity making it compatible with real-time quadrotor control requirements. We show the effectiveness of the proposed approach in learning a minimum time control task, respecting dynamics, actuators, and environment constraints. Several experiments in simulation and real-world set-up validate the proposed approach.
summary: Aerial robots can enhance their safe and agile navigation in complex and cluttered environments by efficiently exploiting the information collected during a given task. In this paper, we address the learning model predictive control problem for quadrotors. We design a learning receding--horizon nonlinear control strategy directly formulated on the system nonlinear manifold configuration space SO(3)xR^3. The proposed approach exploits past successful task iterations to improve the system performance over time while respecting system dynamics and actuator constraints. We further relax its computational complexity making it compatible with real-time quadrotor control requirements. We show the effectiveness of the proposed approach in learning a minimum time control task, respecting dynamics, actuators, and environment constraints. Several experiments in simulation and real-world set-up validate the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 空中机器人可以通过有效地利用在给定任务期间收集的信息来增强其在复杂和杂乱环境中的安全和敏捷导航。在本文中，我们解决了四旋翼飞行器的学习模型预测控制问题。我们设计了一种直接在系统非线性流形配置空间SO(3)xR^3上表述的学习后退视界非线性控制策略。所提出的方法利用过去成功的任务迭代来随着时间的推移提高系统性能，同时尊重系统动力学和执行器约束。我们进一步放宽了其计算复杂度，使其符合实时四旋翼飞行器控制要求。我们展示了所提出的方法在学习最小时间控制任务、尊重动力学、执行器和环境约束方面的有效性。模拟和现实世界设置中的多个实验验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对四旋翼无人机的学习模型预测控制方法，通过利用历史任务数据优化控制策略，提升复杂环境中的导航性能。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在处理四旋翼无人机动态约束和复杂环境时存在效率不足，需开发能实时适应并学习的控制策略以提高安全性和敏捷性。
AI.method: 设计基于非线性流形配置空间SO(3)xR^3的滚动时域控制策略，结合历史成功任务数据迭代优化，同时降低计算复杂度以满足实时性需求。
AI.result: 仿真与真实实验验证了该方法在最小时间控制任务中的有效性，成功满足动力学、执行器及环境约束。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在计算效率与控制性能间取得平衡，为四旋翼无人机复杂环境下的实时控制提供了可行解决方案。
