method: 设计基于非线性流形配置空间SO(3)xR^3的滚动时域控制策略，结合历史成功任务数据迭代优化，同时降低计算复杂度以满足实时性需求。
result: 仿真与真实实验验证了该方法在最小时间控制任务中的有效性，成功满足动力学、执行器及环境约束。
conclusion: 所提方法在计算效率与控制性能间取得平衡，为四旋翼无人机复杂环境下的实时控制提供了可行解决方案。
search_text: Learning Model Predictive Control for Quadrotors 四旋翼飞行器的学习模型预测控制 Aerial robots can enhance their safe and agile navigation in complex and cluttered environments by efficiently exploiting the information collected during a given task. In this paper, we address the learning model predictive control problem for quadrotors. We design a learning receding--horizon nonlinear control strategy directly formulated on the system nonlinear manifold configuration space SO(3)xR^3. The proposed approach exploits past successful task iterations to improve the system performance over time while respecting system dynamics and actuator constraints. We further relax its computational complexity making it compatible with real-time quadrotor control requirements. We show the effectiveness of the proposed approach in learning a minimum time control task, respecting dynamics, actuators, and environment constraints. Several experiments in simulation and real-world set-up validate the proposed approach. 空中机器人可以通过有效地利用在给定任务期间收集的信息来增强其在复杂和杂乱环境中的安全和敏捷导航。在本文中，我们解决了四旋翼飞行器的学习模型预测控制问题。我们设计了一种直接在系统非线性流形配置空间SO(3)xR^3上表述的学习后退视界非线性控制策略。所提出的方法利用过去成功的任务迭代来随着时间的推移提高系统性能，同时尊重系统动力学和执行器约束。我们进一步放宽了其计算复杂度，使其符合实时四旋翼飞行器控制要求。我们展示了所提出的方法在学习最小时间控制任务、尊重动力学、执行器和环境约束方面的有效性。模拟和现实世界设置中的多个实验验证了所提出的方法。 本文提出一种针对四旋翼无人机的学习模型预测控制方法，通过利用历史任务数据优化控制策略，提升复杂环境中的导航性能。 Guanrui Li,Alex Tunchez,Giuseppe Loianno cs.RO

authors_text: Cristian-Paul Bara,Qing Ping,Abhinav Mathur,Govind Thattai,Rohith MV,Gaurav S. Sukhatme
title: Privacy Preserving Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 隐私保护视觉问答
abstract: We introduce a novel privacy-preserving methodology for performing Visual Question Answering on the edge. Our method constructs a symbolic representation of the visual scene, using a low-complexity computer vision model that jointly predicts classes, attributes and predicates. This symbolic representation is non-differentiable, which means it cannot be used to recover the original image, thereby keeping the original image private. Our proposed hybrid solution uses a vision model which is more than 25 times smaller than the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) vision models, and 100 times smaller than end-to-end SOTA VQA models. We report detailed error analysis and discuss the trade-offs of using a distilled vision model and a symbolic representation of the visual scene.
summary: We introduce a novel privacy-preserving methodology for performing Visual Question Answering on the edge. Our method constructs a symbolic representation of the visual scene, using a low-complexity computer vision model that jointly predicts classes, attributes and predicates. This symbolic representation is non-differentiable, which means it cannot be used to recover the original image, thereby keeping the original image private. Our proposed hybrid solution uses a vision model which is more than 25 times smaller than the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) vision models, and 100 times smaller than end-to-end SOTA VQA models. We report detailed error analysis and discuss the trade-offs of using a distilled vision model and a symbolic representation of the visual scene.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的隐私保护方法，用于在边缘执行视觉问答。我们的方法使用低复杂度计算机视觉模型构建视觉场景的符号表示，该模型联合预测类、属性和谓词。这种符号表示是不可微的，这意味着它不能用于恢复原始图像，从而保持原始图像的私密性。我们提出的混合解决方案使用的视觉模型比当前最先进的 (SOTA) 视觉模型小 25 倍以上，比端到端 SOTA VQA 模型小 100 倍。我们报告了详细的错误分析，并讨论了使用蒸馏视觉模型和视觉场景的符号表示的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在边缘设备上保护隐私的视觉问答方法，通过构建非微分符号表示防止图像泄露。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉问答模型在边缘设备部署时存在模型过大和隐私泄露风险，需在计算效率与隐私保护间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 采用低复杂度视觉模型生成场景的符号化表示，利用非微分特性防止图像重建，模型体积仅为SOTA模型的1/25至1/100。
AI.result: 完成详细误差分析，验证了蒸馏模型与符号表示在精度与隐私保护间的权衡效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持较高问答准确性的同时显著降低模型规模，为边缘设备隐私保护提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Kehan Wang,David Chan,Seth Z. Zhao,John Canny,Avideh Zakhor
title: Misinformation Detection in Social Media Video Posts
title_zh: 社交媒体视频帖子中的错误信息检测
comment: We discovered an error in our dataset construction where retweets were not properly filtered. This resulted in test data leakage in training data, and the results reported are affected
comments: We discovered an error in our dataset construction where retweets were not properly filtered. This resulted in test data leakage in training data, and the results reported are affected
abstract: With the growing adoption of short-form video by social media platforms, reducing the spread of misinformation through video posts has become a critical challenge for social media providers. In this paper, we develop methods to detect misinformation in social media posts, exploiting modalities such as video and text. Due to the lack of large-scale public data for misinformation detection in multi-modal datasets, we collect 160,000 video posts from Twitter, and leverage self-supervised learning to learn expressive representations of joint visual and textual data. In this work, we propose two new methods for detecting semantic inconsistencies within short-form social media video posts, based on contrastive learning and masked language modeling. We demonstrate that our new approaches outperform current state-of-the-art methods on both artificial data generated by random-swapping of positive samples and in the wild on a new manually-labeled test set for semantic misinformation.
summary: With the growing adoption of short-form video by social media platforms, reducing the spread of misinformation through video posts has become a critical challenge for social media providers. In this paper, we develop methods to detect misinformation in social media posts, exploiting modalities such as video and text. Due to the lack of large-scale public data for misinformation detection in multi-modal datasets, we collect 160,000 video posts from Twitter, and leverage self-supervised learning to learn expressive representations of joint visual and textual data. In this work, we propose two new methods for detecting semantic inconsistencies within short-form social media video posts, based on contrastive learning and masked language modeling. We demonstrate that our new approaches outperform current state-of-the-art methods on both artificial data generated by random-swapping of positive samples and in the wild on a new manually-labeled test set for semantic misinformation.
abstract_zh: 随着社交媒体平台越来越多地采用短视频，减少通过视频帖子传播错误信息已成为社交媒体提供商面临的严峻挑战。在本文中，我们开发了利用视频和文本等方式来检测社交媒体帖子中的错误信息的方法。由于缺乏用于多模态数据集中错误信息检测的大规模公共数据，我们从 Twitter 收集了 160,000 个视频帖子，并利用自我监督学习来学习联合视觉和文本数据的表达表示。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种基于对比学习和屏蔽语言模型的新方法，用于检测简短社交媒体视频帖子中的语义不一致。我们证明，我们的新方法在通过随机交换正样本生成的人工数据以及在新的手动标记的语义错误信息测试集上都优于当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发检测社交媒体视频帖子中虚假信息的方法，利用视频和文本模态进行语义不一致分析。
AI.motivation: 短视频在社交媒体的普及加剧了虚假信息传播，但现有方法缺乏大规模多模态数据和有效检测技术。
AI.method: 收集16万条Twitter视频数据，采用自监督学习提取多模态表征，并提出基于对比学习和掩码语言模型的语义不一致检测方法。
AI.result: 新方法在人工生成的随机样本和真实标注数据集上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效检测视频虚假信息，为社交媒体平台提供可行的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在开发检测社交媒体视频帖子中虚假信息的方法，利用视频和文本模态进行语义不一致分析。

authors_text: Justin D. Weisz,Michael Muller,Steven I. Ross,Fernando Martinez,Stephanie Houde,Mayank Agarwal,Kartik Talamadupula,John T. Richards
title: Better Together? An Evaluation of AI-Supported Code Translation
title_zh: 在一起更好吗？人工智能支持的代码翻译评估
comment: 35 pages, 3 figures. To be published in IUI 2022
comments: 35 pages, 3 figures. To be published in IUI 2022
abstract: Generative machine learning models have recently been applied to source code, for use cases including translating code between programming languages, creating documentation from code, and auto-completing methods. Yet, state-of-the-art models often produce code that is erroneous or incomplete. In a controlled study with 32 software engineers, we examined whether such imperfect outputs are helpful in the context of Java-to-Python code translation. When aided by the outputs of a code translation model, participants produced code with fewer errors than when working alone. We also examined how the quality and quantity of AI translations affected the work process and quality of outcomes, and observed that providing multiple translations had a larger impact on the translation process than varying the quality of provided translations. Our results tell a complex, nuanced story about the benefits of generative code models and the challenges software engineers face when working with their outputs. Our work motivates the need for intelligent user interfaces that help software engineers effectively work with generative code models in order to understand and evaluate their outputs and achieve superior outcomes to working alone.
summary: Generative machine learning models have recently been applied to source code, for use cases including translating code between programming languages, creating documentation from code, and auto-completing methods. Yet, state-of-the-art models often produce code that is erroneous or incomplete. In a controlled study with 32 software engineers, we examined whether such imperfect outputs are helpful in the context of Java-to-Python code translation. When aided by the outputs of a code translation model, participants produced code with fewer errors than when working alone. We also examined how the quality and quantity of AI translations affected the work process and quality of outcomes, and observed that providing multiple translations had a larger impact on the translation process than varying the quality of provided translations. Our results tell a complex, nuanced story about the benefits of generative code models and the challenges software engineers face when working with their outputs. Our work motivates the need for intelligent user interfaces that help software engineers effectively work with generative code models in order to understand and evaluate their outputs and achieve superior outcomes to working alone.
abstract_zh: 生成式机器学习模型最近已应用于源代码，其用例包括在编程语言之间翻译代码、从代码创建文档以及自动完成方法。然而，最先进的模型通常会生成错误或不完整的代码。在一项由 32 名软件工程师参与的对照研究中，我们检查了这种不完美的输出在 Java 到 Python 代码翻译的情况下是否有帮助。在代码翻译模型输出的帮助下，参与者生成的代码比单独工作时的错误更少。我们还研究了人工智能翻译的质量和数量如何影响工作流程和结果质量，并观察到提供多个翻译对翻译流程的影响比改变所提供翻译的质量更大。我们的结果讲述了一个复杂而细致的故事，讲述了生成代码模型的好处以及软件工程师在处理其输出时面临的挑战。我们的工作激发了对智能用户界面的需求，帮助软件工程师有效地使用生成代码模型，以理解和评估他们的输出，并获得比单独工作更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了AI辅助代码翻译在Java到Python转换中的效果，探讨了不完美AI输出对软件工程师的帮助程度。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式模型在代码翻译中应用广泛，但其输出常存在错误或不完整，需验证此类输出是否能实际帮助工程师并优化协作方式。
AI.method: 通过32名软件工程师的对照实验，比较其在独立工作与AI辅助下的代码质量差异，并分析翻译数量与质量对工作流程的影响。
AI.result: AI辅助下代码错误率降低，且提供多个翻译选项比提升单个翻译质量对工程师工作流程和结果影响更显著。
AI.conclusion: 需设计智能用户界面以帮助工程师高效利用生成式代码模型，从而更有效地评估和优化AI输出结果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文评估了AI辅助代码翻译在Java到Python转换中的效果，探讨了不完美AI输出对软件工程师的帮助程度。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管生成式模型在代码翻译中应用广泛，但其输出常存在错误或不完整，需验证此类输出是否能实际帮助工程师并优化协作方式。
ai_content.method: 通过32名软件工程师的对照实验，比较其在独立工作与AI辅助下的代码质量差异，并分析翻译数量与质量对工作流程的影响。

search_text: Better Together? An Evaluation of AI-Supported Code Translation 在一起更好吗？人工智能支持的代码翻译评估 Generative machine learning models have recently been applied to source code, for use cases including translating code between programming languages, creating documentation from code, and auto-completing methods. Yet, state-of-the-art models often produce code that is erroneous or incomplete. In a controlled study with 32 software engineers, we examined whether such imperfect outputs are helpful in the context of Java-to-Python code translation. When aided by the outputs of a code translation model, participants produced code with fewer errors than when working alone. We also examined how the quality and quantity of AI translations affected the work process and quality of outcomes, and observed that providing multiple translations had a larger impact on the translation process than varying the quality of provided translations. Our results tell a complex, nuanced story about the benefits of generative code models and the challenges software engineers face when working with their outputs. Our work motivates the need for intelligent user interfaces that help software engineers effectively work with generative code models in order to understand and evaluate their outputs and achieve superior outcomes to working alone. 生成式机器学习模型最近已应用于源代码，其用例包括在编程语言之间翻译代码、从代码创建文档以及自动完成方法。然而，最先进的模型通常会生成错误或不完整的代码。在一项由 32 名软件工程师参与的对照研究中，我们检查了这种不完美的输出在 Java 到 Python 代码翻译的情况下是否有帮助。在代码翻译模型输出的帮助下，参与者生成的代码比单独工作时的错误更少。我们还研究了人工智能翻译的质量和数量如何影响工作流程和结果质量，并观察到提供多个翻译对翻译流程的影响比改变所提供翻译的质量更大。我们的结果讲述了一个复杂而细致的故事，讲述了生成代码模型的好处以及软件工程师在处理其输出时面临的挑战。我们的工作激发了对智能用户界面的需求，帮助软件工程师有效地使用生成代码模型，以理解和评估他们的输出，并获得比单独工作更好的结果。 本文评估了AI辅助代码翻译在Java到Python转换中的效果，探讨了不完美AI输出对软件工程师的帮助程度。 Justin D. Weisz,Michael Muller,Steven I. Ross,Fernando Martinez,Stephanie Houde,Mayank Agarwal,Kartik Talamadupula,John T. Richards cs.HC,cs.SE

authors_text: Taman Narayan,Heinrich Jiang,Sen Zhao,Sanjiv Kumar
title: Predicting on the Edge: Identifying Where a Larger Model Does Better
title_zh: 边缘预测：确定较大模型在哪些方面表现更好
abstract: Much effort has been devoted to making large and more accurate models, but relatively little has been put into understanding which examples are benefiting from the added complexity. In this paper, we demonstrate and analyze the surprisingly tight link between a model's predictive uncertainty on individual examples and the likelihood that larger models will improve prediction on them. Through extensive numerical studies on the T5 encoder-decoder architecture, we show that large models have the largest improvement on examples where the small model is most uncertain. On more certain examples, even those where the small model is not particularly accurate, large models are often unable to improve at all, and can even perform worse than the smaller model. Based on these findings, we show that a switcher model which defers examples to a larger model when a small model is uncertain can achieve striking improvements in performance and resource usage. We also explore committee-based uncertainty metrics that can be more effective but less practical.
summary: Much effort has been devoted to making large and more accurate models, but relatively little has been put into understanding which examples are benefiting from the added complexity. In this paper, we demonstrate and analyze the surprisingly tight link between a model's predictive uncertainty on individual examples and the likelihood that larger models will improve prediction on them. Through extensive numerical studies on the T5 encoder-decoder architecture, we show that large models have the largest improvement on examples where the small model is most uncertain. On more certain examples, even those where the small model is not particularly accurate, large models are often unable to improve at all, and can even perform worse than the smaller model. Based on these findings, we show that a switcher model which defers examples to a larger model when a small model is uncertain can achieve striking improvements in performance and resource usage. We also explore committee-based uncertainty metrics that can be more effective but less practical.
abstract_zh: 人们投入了大量精力来制作大型且更准确的模型，但在理解哪些示例受益于增加的复杂性方面投入的精力相对较少。在本文中，我们展示并分析了模型对单个示例的预测不确定性与较大模型改善对它们的预测的可能性之间惊人的紧密联系。通过对 T5 编码器-解码器架构的广泛数值研究，我们表明大模型对小模型最不确定的示例有最大的改进。在更具体的例子中，即使是那些小模型不是特别准确的例子，大模型往往根本无法改进，甚至可能比小模型表现得更差。基于这些发现，我们表明，当小模型不确定时将示例推迟到较大模型的切换器模型可以在性能和资源使用方面实现显着改进。我们还探索基于委员会的不确定性指标，这些指标可能更有效，但不太实用。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了大型模型在哪些示例上比小型模型表现更好，并提出了基于不确定性的模型切换策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型模型的研究较多，但缺乏对哪些示例能从模型复杂性提升中受益的理解，因此探讨模型不确定性与性能提升的关系。
AI.method: 基于T5架构进行数值实验，分析小型模型不确定性与大型模型改进效果的关联，并设计切换模型在不确定时调用大模型，同时探索委员会式不确定性度量方法。
AI.result: 大型模型在小型模型不确定的示例上提升显著，而在确定性示例上可能无改进甚至退化；切换模型显著提升了性能与资源效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性判断切换模型可有效利用资源，但委员会式度量方法虽更优却实用性较低。

authors_text: Namyong Park,Fuchen Liu,Purvanshi Mehta,Dana Cristofor,Christos Faloutsos,Yuxiao Dong
title: EvoKG: Jointly Modeling Event Time and Network Structure for Reasoning over Temporal Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: EvoKG：联合建模事件时间和网络结构，用于时态知识图推理
abstract: How can we perform knowledge reasoning over temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs)? TKGs represent facts about entities and their relations, where each fact is associated with a timestamp. Reasoning over TKGs, i.e., inferring new facts from time-evolving KGs, is crucial for many applications to provide intelligent services. However, despite the prevalence of real-world data that can be represented as TKGs, most methods focus on reasoning over static knowledge graphs, or cannot predict future events. In this paper, we present a problem formulation that unifies the two major problems that need to be addressed for an effective reasoning over TKGs, namely, modeling the event time and the evolving network structure. Our proposed method EvoKG jointly models both tasks in an effective framework, which captures the ever-changing structural and temporal dynamics in TKGs via recurrent event modeling, and models the interactions between entities based on the temporal neighborhood aggregation framework. Further, EvoKG achieves an accurate modeling of event time, using flexible and efficient mechanisms based on neural density estimation. Experiments show that EvoKG outperforms existing methods in terms of effectiveness (up to 77% and 116% more accurate time and link prediction) and efficiency.
summary: How can we perform knowledge reasoning over temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs)? TKGs represent facts about entities and their relations, where each fact is associated with a timestamp. Reasoning over TKGs, i.e., inferring new facts from time-evolving KGs, is crucial for many applications to provide intelligent services. However, despite the prevalence of real-world data that can be represented as TKGs, most methods focus on reasoning over static knowledge graphs, or cannot predict future events. In this paper, we present a problem formulation that unifies the two major problems that need to be addressed for an effective reasoning over TKGs, namely, modeling the event time and the evolving network structure. Our proposed method EvoKG jointly models both tasks in an effective framework, which captures the ever-changing structural and temporal dynamics in TKGs via recurrent event modeling, and models the interactions between entities based on the temporal neighborhood aggregation framework. Further, EvoKG achieves an accurate modeling of event time, using flexible and efficient mechanisms based on neural density estimation. Experiments show that EvoKG outperforms existing methods in terms of effectiveness (up to 77% and 116% more accurate time and link prediction) and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 我们如何对时间知识图（TKG）进行知识推理？ TKG 表示有关实体及其关系的事实，其中每个事实都与时间戳相关联。对 TKG 进行推理，即从随时间演化的 KG 中推断新事实，对于许多应用程序提供智能服务至关重要。然而，尽管可以表示为 TKG 的现实世界数据很普遍，但大多数方法都侧重于静态知识图的推理，或者无法预测未来事件。在本文中，我们提出了一种问题表述，它统一了对 TKG 进行有效推理所需解决的两个主要问题，即事件时间建模和不断演化的网络结构。我们提出的方法 EvoKG 在一个有效的框架中对这两个任务进行联合建模，该框架通过循环事件建模捕获 TKG 中不断变化的结构和时间动态，并基于时间邻域聚合框架对实体之间的交互进行建模。此外，EvoKG 使用基于神经密度估计的灵活高效的机制实现了事件时间的准确建模。实验表明，EvoKG 在有效性（时间和链路预测准确率分别提高了 77% 和 116%）和效率方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoKG方法，通过联合建模事件时间和网络结构，解决时序知识图谱（TKG）中的推理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理TKG的动态特性，无法准确预测未来事件或建模时间演化结构。
AI.method: EvoKG采用循环事件建模和时序邻域聚合框架，结合神经密度估计机制，联合建模时间动态与网络结构演变。
AI.result: 在时间预测和链接预测任务中，EvoKG分别比现有方法准确率提升77%和116%。
AI.conclusion: EvoKG通过整合时间与结构建模，有效解决了TKG推理中的关键挑战，验证了其在动态知识图谱任务中的优越性。

Our proposed method EvoKG jointly models both tasks in an effective framework, which captures the ever-changing structural and temporal dynamics in TKGs via recurrent event modeling, and models the interactions between entities based on the temporal neighborhood aggregation framework. Further, EvoKG achieves an accurate modeling of event time, using flexible and efficient mechanisms based on neural density estimation. Experiments show that EvoKG outperforms existing methods in terms of effectiveness (up to 77% and 116% more accurate time and link prediction) and efficiency. 我们如何对时间知识图（TKG）进行知识推理？ TKG 表示有关实体及其关系的事实，其中每个事实都与时间戳相关联。对 TKG 进行推理，即从随时间演化的 KG 中推断新事实，对于许多应用程序提供智能服务至关重要。然而，尽管可以表示为 TKG 的现实世界数据很普遍，但大多数方法都侧重于静态知识图的推理，或者无法预测未来事件。在本文中，我们提出了一种问题表述，它统一了对 TKG 进行有效推理所需解决的两个主要问题，即事件时间建模和不断演化的网络结构。我们提出的方法 EvoKG 在一个有效的框架中对这两个任务进行联合建模，该框架通过循环事件建模捕获 TKG 中不断变化的结构和时间动态，并基于时间邻域聚合框架对实体之间的交互进行建模。此外，EvoKG 使用基于神经密度估计的灵活高效的机制实现了事件时间的准确建模。实验表明，EvoKG 在有效性（时间和链路预测准确率分别提高了 77% 和 116%）和效率方面优于现有方法。 本文提出EvoKG方法，通过联合建模事件时间和网络结构，解决时序知识图谱（TKG）中的推理问题。 Namyong Park,Fuchen Liu,Purvanshi Mehta,Dana Cristofor,Christos Faloutsos,Yuxiao Dong cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Johannes Brandstetter,Max Welling,Daniel E. Worrall
title: Lie Point Symmetry Data Augmentation for Neural PDE Solvers
title_zh: 神经偏微分方程求解器的谎言点对称数据增强
abstract: Neural networks are increasingly being used to solve partial differential equations (PDEs), replacing slower numerical solvers. However, a critical issue is that neural PDE solvers require high-quality ground truth data, which usually must come from the very solvers they are designed to replace. Thus, we are presented with a proverbial chicken-and-egg problem. In this paper, we present a method, which can partially alleviate this problem, by improving neural PDE solver sample complexity -- Lie point symmetry data augmentation (LPSDA). In the context of PDEs, it turns out that we are able to quantitatively derive an exhaustive list of data transformations, based on the Lie point symmetry group of the PDEs in question, something not possible in other application areas. We present this framework and demonstrate how it can easily be deployed to improve neural PDE solver sample complexity by an order of magnitude.
summary: Neural networks are increasingly being used to solve partial differential equations (PDEs), replacing slower numerical solvers. However, a critical issue is that neural PDE solvers require high-quality ground truth data, which usually must come from the very solvers they are designed to replace. Thus, we are presented with a proverbial chicken-and-egg problem. In this paper, we present a method, which can partially alleviate this problem, by improving neural PDE solver sample complexity -- Lie point symmetry data augmentation (LPSDA). In the context of PDEs, it turns out that we are able to quantitatively derive an exhaustive list of data transformations, based on the Lie point symmetry group of the PDEs in question, something not possible in other application areas. We present this framework and demonstrate how it can easily be deployed to improve neural PDE solver sample complexity by an order of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 神经网络越来越多地用于求解偏微分方程 (PDE)，取代速度较慢的数值求解器。然而，一个关键问题是神经偏微分方程求解器需要高质量的地面实况数据，而这些数据通常必须来自它们旨在取代的求解器。因此，我们面临着一个众所周知的先有鸡还是先有蛋的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过提高神经偏微分方程求解器样本复杂度来部分缓解这个问题的方法——谎言点对称数据增强（LPSDA）。在偏微分方程的背景下，事实证明，我们能够根据相关偏微分方程的李点对称群定量地导出详尽的数据转换列表，这在其他应用领域是不可能的。我们提出了这个框架，并演示了如何轻松部署它，以将神经偏微分方程求解器样本复杂性提高一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用Lie点对称数据增强（LPSDA）方法，通过生成PDE的对称变换数据，提升神经PDE求解器的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 神经PDE求解器依赖高质量数据训练，但传统方法需依赖数值求解器生成数据，形成循环依赖问题。
AI.method: 基于PDE的Lie点对称群理论，推导出可量化的数据变换规则，生成多样化训练样本以增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可将神经PDE求解器的样本复杂度降低一个数量级，显著提升训练效率。
AI.conclusion: LPSDA通过数学对称性分析突破数据依赖瓶颈，为神经PDE求解器提供了一种无需传统求解器的新型数据增强范式。

authors_text: Le Xia,Yao Sun,Xiaoqian Li,Gang Feng,Muhammad Ali Imran
title: Wireless Resource Management in Intelligent Semantic Communication Networks
title_zh: 智能语义通信网络中的无线资源管理
comment: This work has been accepted for publication by 2022 IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications (INFOCOM)
comments: This work has been accepted for publication by 2022 IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications (INFOCOM)
abstract: The prosperity of artificial intelligence (AI) has laid a promising paradigm of communication system, i.e., intelligent semantic communication (ISC), where semantic contents, instead of traditional bit sequences, are coded by AI models for efficient communication. Due to the unique demand of background knowledge for semantic recovery, wireless resource management faces new challenges in ISC. In this paper, we address the user association (UA) and bandwidth allocation (BA) problems in an ISC-enabled heterogeneous network (ISC-HetNet). We first introduce the auxiliary knowledge base (KB) into the system model, and develop a new performance metric for the ISC-HetNet, named system throughput in message (STM). Joint optimization of UA and BA is then formulated with the aim of STM maximization subject to KB matching and wireless bandwidth constraints. To this end, we propose a two-stage solution, including a stochastic programming method in the first stage to obtain a deterministic objective with semantic confidence, and a heuristic algorithm in the second stage to reach the optimality of UA and BA. Numerical results show great superiority and reliability of our proposed solution on the STM performance when compared with two baseline algorithms.
summary: The prosperity of artificial intelligence (AI) has laid a promising paradigm of communication system, i.e., intelligent semantic communication (ISC), where semantic contents, instead of traditional bit sequences, are coded by AI models for efficient communication. Due to the unique demand of background knowledge for semantic recovery, wireless resource management faces new challenges in ISC. In this paper, we address the user association (UA) and bandwidth allocation (BA) problems in an ISC-enabled heterogeneous network (ISC-HetNet). We first introduce the auxiliary knowledge base (KB) into the system model, and develop a new performance metric for the ISC-HetNet, named system throughput in message (STM). Joint optimization of UA and BA is then formulated with the aim of STM maximization subject to KB matching and wireless bandwidth constraints. To this end, we propose a two-stage solution, including a stochastic programming method in the first stage to obtain a deterministic objective with semantic confidence, and a heuristic algorithm in the second stage to reach the optimality of UA and BA. Numerical results show great superiority and reliability of our proposed solution on the STM performance when compared with two baseline algorithms.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的繁荣奠定了一种有前景的通信系统范式，即智能语义通信（ISC），其中语义内容代替传统的比特序列，通过人工智能模型进行编码，以实现高效通信。由于语义恢复对背景知识的独特需求，无线资源管理在ISC中面临着新的挑战。在本文中，我们解决了支持 ISC 的异构网络 (ISC-HetNet) 中的用户关联 (UA) 和带宽分配 (BA) 问题。我们首先将辅助知识库（KB）引入系统模型，并为ISC-HetNet开发一个新的性能指标，称为消息系统吞吐量（STM）。然后制定 UA 和 BA 的联合优化，以在 KB 匹配和无线带宽约束下实现 STM 最大化。为此，我们提出了一个两阶段的解决方案，包括第一阶段的随机规划方法以获得具有语义置信度的确定性目标，以及第二阶段的启发式算法以达到UA和BA的最优性。数值结果表明，与两种基线算法相比，我们提出的解决方案在 STM 性能方面具有巨大的优越性和可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究智能语义通信网络中的无线资源管理问题，提出用户关联与带宽分配的联合优化方法以提升系统吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 传统通信以比特序列传输为主，而智能语义通信需依赖背景知识恢复语义信息，导致无线资源管理面临新挑战。
AI.method: 引入辅助知识库构建系统模型，定义系统吞吐量（STM）指标，采用两阶段方法：第一阶段用随机规划获取语义置信度目标，第二阶段通过启发式算法优化用户关联与带宽分配。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提方案在STM性能上显著优于两种基线算法，展现出优越性与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的两阶段优化方法有效解决了智能语义通信网络中的资源管理难题，为未来相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Pierre Stock,Igor Shilov,Ilya Mironov,Alexandre Sablayrolles
title: Defending against Reconstruction Attacks with Rényi Differential Privacy
title_zh: 利用 Rényi 差分隐私防御重建攻击
abstract: Reconstruction attacks allow an adversary to regenerate data samples of the training set using access to only a trained model. It has been recently shown that simple heuristics can reconstruct data samples from language models, making this threat scenario an important aspect of model release. Differential privacy is a known solution to such attacks, but is often used with a relatively large privacy budget (epsilon > 8) which does not translate to meaningful guarantees. In this paper we show that, for a same mechanism, we can derive privacy guarantees for reconstruction attacks that are better than the traditional ones from the literature. In particular, we show that larger privacy budgets do not protect against membership inference, but can still protect extraction of rare secrets. We show experimentally that our guarantees hold against various language models, including GPT-2 finetuned on Wikitext-103.
summary: Reconstruction attacks allow an adversary to regenerate data samples of the training set using access to only a trained model. It has been recently shown that simple heuristics can reconstruct data samples from language models, making this threat scenario an important aspect of model release. Differential privacy is a known solution to such attacks, but is often used with a relatively large privacy budget (epsilon > 8) which does not translate to meaningful guarantees. In this paper we show that, for a same mechanism, we can derive privacy guarantees for reconstruction attacks that are better than the traditional ones from the literature. In particular, we show that larger privacy budgets do not protect against membership inference, but can still protect extraction of rare secrets. We show experimentally that our guarantees hold against various language models, including GPT-2 finetuned on Wikitext-103.
abstract_zh: 重建攻击允许对手仅使用经过训练的模型来重新生成训练集的数据样本。最近的研究表明，简单的启发式方法可以从语言模型中重建数据样本，使这种威胁场景成为模型发布的一个重要方面。差分隐私是针对此类攻击的已知解决方案，但通常与相对较大的隐私预算（epsilon > 8）一起使用，这并不能转化为有意义的保证。在本文中，我们表明，对于相同的机制，我们可以为重建攻击提供比文献中的传统隐私保证更好的隐私保证。特别是，我们表明更大的隐私预算并不能防止成员推理，但仍然可以保护稀有秘密的提取。我们通过实验证明，我们的保证适用于各种语言模型，包括在 Wikitext-103 上微调的 GPT-2。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用Rényi差分隐私机制改进传统差分隐私在防御重建攻击中的隐私保证，针对语言模型的重建攻击威胁提供更有效的保护方案。
AI.motivation: 传统差分隐私在防御重建攻击时需使用较大隐私预算（epsilon>8），但此时无法提供有意义的安全保障，需寻找更精确的隐私分析方法。
AI.method: 通过Rényi差分隐私理论推导出针对重建攻击的新型隐私保证框架，区分 membership inference 与秘密提取的保护边界，并在GPT-2等语言模型上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在多种语言模型（包括GPT-2）上有效抵御重建攻击，且能区分不同隐私泄露风险场景的防护效果。

search_text: Defending against Reconstruction Attacks with Rényi Differential Privacy 利用 Rényi 差分隐私防御重建攻击 Reconstruction attacks allow an adversary to regenerate data samples of the training set using access to only a trained model. It has been recently shown that simple heuristics can reconstruct data samples from language models, making this threat scenario an important aspect of model release. Differential privacy is a known solution to such attacks, but is often used with a relatively large privacy budget (epsilon > 8) which does not translate to meaningful guarantees. In this paper we show that, for a same mechanism, we can derive privacy guarantees for reconstruction attacks that are better than the traditional ones from the literature. In particular, we show that larger privacy budgets do not protect against membership inference, but can still protect extraction of rare secrets. We show experimentally that our guarantees hold against various language models, including GPT-2 finetuned on Wikitext-103. 重建攻击允许对手仅使用经过训练的模型来重新生成训练集的数据样本。最近的研究表明，简单的启发式方法可以从语言模型中重建数据样本，使这种威胁场景成为模型发布的一个重要方面。差分隐私是针对此类攻击的已知解决方案，但通常与相对较大的隐私预算（epsilon > 8）一起使用，这并不能转化为有意义的保证。在本文中，我们表明，对于相同的机制，我们可以为重建攻击提供比文献中的传统隐私保证更好的隐私保证。特别是，我们表明更大的隐私预算并不能防止成员推理，但仍然可以保护稀有秘密的提取。我们通过实验证明，我们的保证适用于各种语言模型，包括在 Wikitext-103 上微调的 GPT-2。 本文提出利用Rényi差分隐私机制改进传统差分隐私在防御重建攻击中的隐私保证，针对语言模型的重建攻击威胁提供更有效的保护方案。 Pierre Stock,Igor Shilov,Ilya Mironov,Alexandre Sablayrolles cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,stat.ML

authors_text: Ela Liberman-Pincu,Yisrael Parmet,Tal Oron-Gilad
title: Judging a socially assistive robot (SAR) by its cover; The effect of body structure, outline, and color on users' perception
title_zh: 通过外壳判断社交辅助机器人（SAR）；身体结构、轮廓和颜色对用户感知的影响
comment: Submitted to Transactions on Human-Robot Interaction
comments: Submitted to Transactions on Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: Socially assistive robots (SARs) aim to provide assistance through social interaction. Previous studies contributed to understanding users` perceptions and preferences regarding existing commercially available SARs. Yet, very few studies regarding SARs' appearance used designated SAR designs, and even fewer evaluated isolated visual qualities (VQ). In this work, we aim to assess the effect of isolated VQs systematically. To achieve this, we first conducted market research and deconstructed the VQs attributed to SARs. Then, a reconstruction of body structure, outline, and color scheme was done, resulting in the creation of 30 new SAR models that differ in their VQs, allowing us to isolate one character at a time. We used these new designs to evaluate users' preferences and perceptions in two empirical studies. Our empirical findings link VQs with perceptions of SAR characteristics. These can lead to forming guidelines for the industrial design processes of new SARs to match user expectations.
summary: Socially assistive robots (SARs) aim to provide assistance through social interaction. Previous studies contributed to understanding users` perceptions and preferences regarding existing commercially available SARs. Yet, very few studies regarding SARs' appearance used designated SAR designs, and even fewer evaluated isolated visual qualities (VQ). In this work, we aim to assess the effect of isolated VQs systematically. To achieve this, we first conducted market research and deconstructed the VQs attributed to SARs. Then, a reconstruction of body structure, outline, and color scheme was done, resulting in the creation of 30 new SAR models that differ in their VQs, allowing us to isolate one character at a time. We used these new designs to evaluate users' preferences and perceptions in two empirical studies. Our empirical findings link VQs with perceptions of SAR characteristics. These can lead to forming guidelines for the industrial design processes of new SARs to match user expectations.
abstract_zh: 社交辅助机器人（SAR）旨在通过社交互动提供帮助。先前的研究有助于了解用户对现有商用 SAR 的看法和偏好。然而，关于 SAR 外观的研究很少使用指定的 SAR 设计，评估孤立视觉质量 (VQ) 的研究就更少了。在这项工作中，我们的目标是系统地评估孤立 VQ 的效果。为了实现这一目标，我们首先进行了市场研究并解构了 SAR 所带来的 VQ。然后，对身体结构、轮廓和配色方案进行了重建，从而创建了 30 个 VQ 不同的新 SAR 模型，使我们能够一次隔离一个角色。我们在两项实证研究中使用这些新设计来评估用户的偏好和看法。我们的实证研究结果将 VQ 与 SAR 特征的感知联系起来。这些可以帮助形成新 SAR 的工业设计流程指南，以满足用户的期望。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在系统评估孤立视觉品质（VQ）对用户对社会辅助机器人（SAR）感知的影响，通过设计30种不同外观的SAR模型进行实证研究。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于商用SAR设计，缺乏对特定视觉要素的独立评估，难以指导工业设计中用户期望的匹配。
AI.method: 通过市场调研分解SAR视觉品质，重构身体结构、轮廓和配色方案生成30种模型，通过两项实证研究评估用户偏好与感知。
AI.result: 发现孤立视觉品质与SAR特性感知存在显著关联，为工业设计提供可操作的指导原则。
AI.conclusion: SAR外观设计需结合用户对视觉要素的感知规律，以提升社会交互效果与接受度。

authors_text: Luzia Knoedler,Chadi Salmi,Hai Zhu,Bruno Brito,Javier Alonso-Mora
title: Improving Pedestrian Prediction Models with Self-Supervised Continual Learning
title_zh: 通过自我监督的持续学习改进行人预测模型
comment: To be published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Accepted for presentation at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: To be published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Accepted for presentation at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Autonomous mobile robots require accurate human motion predictions to safely and efficiently navigate among pedestrians, whose behavior may adapt to environmental changes. This paper introduces a self-supervised continual learning framework to improve data-driven pedestrian prediction models online across various scenarios continuously. In particular, we exploit online streams of pedestrian data, commonly available from the robot's detection and tracking pipeline, to refine the prediction model and its performance in unseen scenarios. To avoid the forgetting of previously learned concepts, a problem known as catastrophic forgetting, our framework includes a regularization loss to penalize changes of model parameters that are important for previous scenarios and retrains on a set of previous examples to retain past knowledge. Experimental results on real and simulation data show that our approach can improve prediction performance in unseen scenarios while retaining knowledge from seen scenarios when compared to naively training the prediction model online.
summary: Autonomous mobile robots require accurate human motion predictions to safely and efficiently navigate among pedestrians, whose behavior may adapt to environmental changes. This paper introduces a self-supervised continual learning framework to improve data-driven pedestrian prediction models online across various scenarios continuously. In particular, we exploit online streams of pedestrian data, commonly available from the robot's detection and tracking pipeline, to refine the prediction model and its performance in unseen scenarios. To avoid the forgetting of previously learned concepts, a problem known as catastrophic forgetting, our framework includes a regularization loss to penalize changes of model parameters that are important for previous scenarios and retrains on a set of previous examples to retain past knowledge. Experimental results on real and simulation data show that our approach can improve prediction performance in unseen scenarios while retaining knowledge from seen scenarios when compared to naively training the prediction model online.
abstract_zh: 自主移动机器人需要准确的人体运动预测，以便在行人之间安全有效地导航，而行人的行为可能会适应环境变化。本文介绍了一种自监督的持续学习框架，可以持续改进各种场景下的数据驱动的在线行人预测模型。特别是，我们利用通常可从机器人的检测和跟踪管道获得的在线行人数据流来完善预测模型及其在未见过的场景中的性能。为了避免忘记以前学过的概念（称为灾难性遗忘），我们的框架包括正则化损失，以惩罚对先前场景很重要的模型参数的变化，并重新训练一组先前的示例以保留过去的知识。真实数据和模拟数据的实验结果表明，与在线训练预测模型相比，我们的方法可以提高未见场景中的预测性能，同时保留已见场景中的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督持续学习的框架，用于在线改进自动驾驶机器人中行人预测模型的适应性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶机器人需要准确预测行人动态以适应环境变化，但传统模型在新场景中易出现灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 利用机器人实时检测数据流构建自监督框架，通过正则化损失约束参数变化并结合历史样本重训练，实现持续学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在新场景预测精度提升的同时，较传统在线训练方法更好地保留了历史场景知识。
AI.conclusion: 提出的持续学习框架有效解决了行人预测模型在动态环境中的适应性与知识保留矛盾，为机器人安全导航提供新思路。

This paper introduces a self-supervised continual learning framework to improve data-driven pedestrian prediction models online across various scenarios continuously. In particular, we exploit online streams of pedestrian data, commonly available from the robot's detection and tracking pipeline, to refine the prediction model and its performance in unseen scenarios. To avoid the forgetting of previously learned concepts, a problem known as catastrophic forgetting, our framework includes a regularization loss to penalize changes of model parameters that are important for previous scenarios and retrains on a set of previous examples to retain past knowledge. Experimental results on real and simulation data show that our approach can improve prediction performance in unseen scenarios while retaining knowledge from seen scenarios when compared to naively training the prediction model online. 自主移动机器人需要准确的人体运动预测，以便在行人之间安全有效地导航，而行人的行为可能会适应环境变化。本文介绍了一种自监督的持续学习框架，可以持续改进各种场景下的数据驱动的在线行人预测模型。特别是，我们利用通常可从机器人的检测和跟踪管道获得的在线行人数据流来完善预测模型及其在未见过的场景中的性能。为了避免忘记以前学过的概念（称为灾难性遗忘），我们的框架包括正则化损失，以惩罚对先前场景很重要的模型参数的变化，并重新训练一组先前的示例以保留过去的知识。真实数据和模拟数据的实验结果表明，与在线训练预测模型相比，我们的方法可以提高未见场景中的预测性能，同时保留已见场景中的知识。 本文提出一种基于自监督持续学习的框架，用于在线改进自动驾驶机器人中行人预测模型的适应性。 Luzia Knoedler,Chadi Salmi,Hai Zhu,Bruno Brito,Javier Alonso-Mora cs.RO

authors_text: Tianyu Li,Ali Cevahir,Derek Cho,Hao Gong,DuyKhuong Nguyen,Bjorn Stenger
title: UserBERT: Modeling Long- and Short-Term User Preferences via Self-Supervision
title_zh: UserBERT：通过自我监督对长期和短期用户偏好进行建模
abstract: E-commerce platforms generate vast amounts of customer behavior data, such as clicks and purchases, from millions of unique users every day. However, effectively using this data for behavior understanding tasks is challenging because there are usually not enough labels to learn from all users in a supervised manner. This paper extends the BERT model to e-commerce user data for pre-training representations in a self-supervised manner. By viewing user actions in sequences as analogous to words in sentences, we extend the existing BERT model to user behavior data. Further, our model adopts a unified structure to simultaneously learn from long-term and short-term user behavior, as well as user attributes. We propose methods for the tokenization of different types of user behavior sequences, the generation of input representation vectors, and a novel pretext task to enable the pre-trained model to learn from its own input, eliminating the need for labeled training data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the learned representations result in significant improvements when transferred to three different real-world tasks, particularly compared to task-specific modeling and multi-task representation learning
summary: E-commerce platforms generate vast amounts of customer behavior data, such as clicks and purchases, from millions of unique users every day. However, effectively using this data for behavior understanding tasks is challenging because there are usually not enough labels to learn from all users in a supervised manner. This paper extends the BERT model to e-commerce user data for pre-training representations in a self-supervised manner. By viewing user actions in sequences as analogous to words in sentences, we extend the existing BERT model to user behavior data. Further, our model adopts a unified structure to simultaneously learn from long-term and short-term user behavior, as well as user attributes. We propose methods for the tokenization of different types of user behavior sequences, the generation of input representation vectors, and a novel pretext task to enable the pre-trained model to learn from its own input, eliminating the need for labeled training data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the learned representations result in significant improvements when transferred to three different real-world tasks, particularly compared to task-specific modeling and multi-task representation learning
abstract_zh: 电子商务平台每天从数百万唯一用户那里生成大量客户行为数据，例如点击和购买。然而，有效地将这些数据用于行为理解任务是具有挑战性的，因为通常没有足够的标签来以监督的方式向所有用户学习。本文将 BERT 模型扩展到电子商务用户数据，以自监督的方式进行预训练表示。通过将序列中的用户操作视为类似于句子中的单词，我们将现有的 BERT 模型扩展到用户行为数据。此外，我们的模型采用统一的结构来同时学习长期和短期用户行为以及用户属性。我们提出了对不同类型的用户行为序列进行标记化、生成输入表示向量的方法，以及一种新颖的借口任务，使预训练模型能够从自己的输入中学习，从而消除了对标记训练数据的需要。大量实验表明，学习到的表示在转移到三个不同的现实世界任务时会带来显着的改进，特别是与特定任务建模和多任务表示学习相比

AI.tldr: 本文提出UserBERT模型，通过自监督学习同时建模电商用户长期和短期行为偏好。
AI.motivation: 电商平台用户行为数据丰富但标签稀缺，传统监督学习难以有效利用数据，需自监督方法挖掘用户潜在偏好。
AI.method: 将用户行为序列类比句子结构扩展BERT模型，设计统一架构融合长期/短期行为及属性，提出行为序列分词、输入向量生成及自监督预训练任务。
AI.result: 在三个实际任务中迁移学习表现显著优于任务特定模型和多任务表征学习方法。
AI.conclusion: UserBERT通过自监督预训练有效捕捉用户多维度偏好，为电商行为理解提供新范式。

authors_text: Priya Goyal,Adriana Romero Soriano,Caner Hazirbas,Levent Sagun,Nicolas Usunier
title: Fairness Indicators for Systematic Assessments of Visual Feature Extractors
title_zh: 视觉特征提取器系统评估的公平性指标
abstract: Does everyone equally benefit from computer vision systems? Answers to this question become more and more important as computer vision systems are deployed at large scale, and can spark major concerns when they exhibit vast performance discrepancies between people from various demographic and social backgrounds. Systematic diagnosis of fairness, harms, and biases of computer vision systems is an important step towards building socially responsible systems. To initiate an effort towards standardized fairness audits, we propose three fairness indicators, which aim at quantifying harms and biases of visual systems. Our indicators use existing publicly available datasets collected for fairness evaluations, and focus on three main types of harms and bias identified in the literature, namely harmful label associations, disparity in learned representations of social and demographic traits, and biased performance on geographically diverse images from across the world.We define precise experimental protocols applicable to a wide range of computer vision models. These indicators are part of an ever-evolving suite of fairness probes and are not intended to be a substitute for a thorough analysis of the broader impact of the new computer vision technologies. Yet, we believe it is a necessary first step towards (1) facilitating the widespread adoption and mandate of the fairness assessments in computer vision research, and (2) tracking progress towards building socially responsible models. To study the practical effectiveness and broad applicability of our proposed indicators to any visual system, we apply them to off-the-shelf models built using widely adopted model training paradigms which vary in their ability to whether they can predict labels on a given image or only produce the embeddings. We also systematically study the effect of data domain and model size.
summary: Does everyone equally benefit from computer vision systems? Answers to this question become more and more important as computer vision systems are deployed at large scale, and can spark major concerns when they exhibit vast performance discrepancies between people from various demographic and social backgrounds. Systematic diagnosis of fairness, harms, and biases of computer vision systems is an important step towards building socially responsible systems. To initiate an effort towards standardized fairness audits, we propose three fairness indicators, which aim at quantifying harms and biases of visual systems. Our indicators use existing publicly available datasets collected for fairness evaluations, and focus on three main types of harms and bias identified in the literature, namely harmful label associations, disparity in learned representations of social and demographic traits, and biased performance on geographically diverse images from across the world.We define precise experimental protocols applicable to a wide range of computer vision models. These indicators are part of an ever-evolving suite of fairness probes and are not intended to be a substitute for a thorough analysis of the broader impact of the new computer vision technologies. Yet, we believe it is a necessary first step towards (1) facilitating the widespread adoption and mandate of the fairness assessments in computer vision research, and (2) tracking progress towards building socially responsible models. To study the practical effectiveness and broad applicability of our proposed indicators to any visual system, we apply them to off-the-shelf models built using widely adopted model training paradigms which vary in their ability to whether they can predict labels on a given image or only produce the embeddings. We also systematically study the effect of data domain and model size.
abstract_zh: 每个人都平等地从计算机视觉系统中受益吗？随着计算机视觉系统的大规模部署，这个问题的答案变得越来越重要，并且当来自不同人口和社会背景的人之间表现出巨大的性能差异时，可能会引发重大担忧。对计算机视觉系统的公平性、危害和偏见进行系统诊断是构建社会责任系统的重要一步。为了发起标准化公平审计的努力，我们提出了三个公平指标，旨在量化视觉系统的危害和偏见。我们的指标使用收集的现有公开数据集进行公平性评估，并重点关注文献中确定的三种主要伤害和偏见类型，即有害的标签关联、社会和人口特征的学习表示的差异以及来自世界各地的地理不同图像的偏见表现。我们定义了适用于各种计算机视觉模型的精确实验协议。这些指标是不断发展的公平性调查套件的一部分，并不旨在替代对新计算机视觉技术更广泛影响的彻底分析。然而，我们认为这是必要的第一步：（1）促进计算机视觉研究中公平性评估的广泛采用和授权，以及（2）跟踪建立社会责任模型的进展。为了研究我们提出的指标对任何视觉系统的实际有效性和广泛适用性，我们将它们应用于使用广泛采用的模型训练范例构建的现成模型，这些模型的能力各不相同，无论它们是否可以预测给定图像上的标签或仅生成嵌入。我们还系统地研究了数据域和模型大小的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种公平性指标，用于量化视觉系统中的危害和偏见，以促进计算机视觉系统的公平性评估。
AI.motivation: 随着计算机视觉系统的大规模部署，不同群体间性能差异可能引发社会关注，需通过系统性诊断确保技术的社会责任性。
AI.method: 利用现有公开数据集定义实验协议，针对标签关联危害、表征差异及地理多样性性能偏差三类问题，评估不同规模模型和数据域的影响。
AI.result: 指标可有效检测现成模型在公平性方面的不足，揭示数据域和模型规模对性能偏差的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该指标为计算机视觉研究的公平性评估提供标准化工具，是构建社会责任模型的重要初步步骤。

authors_text: Yuqing Du,Daniel Ho,Alexander A. Alemi,Eric Jang,Mohi Khansari
title: Bayesian Imitation Learning for End-to-End Mobile Manipulation
title_zh: 用于端到端移动操作的贝叶斯模仿学习
abstract: In this work we investigate and demonstrate benefits of a Bayesian approach to imitation learning from multiple sensor inputs, as applied to the task of opening office doors with a mobile manipulator. Augmenting policies with additional sensor inputs, such as RGB + depth cameras, is a straightforward approach to improving robot perception capabilities, especially for tasks that may favor different sensors in different situations. As we scale multi-sensor robotic learning to unstructured real-world settings (e.g. offices, homes) and more complex robot behaviors, we also increase reliance on simulators for cost, efficiency, and safety. Consequently, the sim-to-real gap across multiple sensor modalities also increases, making simulated validation more difficult. We show that using the Variational Information Bottleneck (Alemi et al., 2016) to regularize convolutional neural networks improves generalization to held-out domains and reduces the sim-to-real gap in a sensor-agnostic manner. As a side effect, the learned embeddings also provide useful estimates of model uncertainty for each sensor. We demonstrate that our method is able to help close the sim-to-real gap and successfully fuse RGB and depth modalities based on understanding of the situational uncertainty of each sensor. In a real-world office environment, we achieve 96% task success, improving upon the baseline by +16%.
summary: In this work we investigate and demonstrate benefits of a Bayesian approach to imitation learning from multiple sensor inputs, as applied to the task of opening office doors with a mobile manipulator. Augmenting policies with additional sensor inputs, such as RGB + depth cameras, is a straightforward approach to improving robot perception capabilities, especially for tasks that may favor different sensors in different situations. As we scale multi-sensor robotic learning to unstructured real-world settings (e.g. offices, homes) and more complex robot behaviors, we also increase reliance on simulators for cost, efficiency, and safety. Consequently, the sim-to-real gap across multiple sensor modalities also increases, making simulated validation more difficult. We show that using the Variational Information Bottleneck (Alemi et al., 2016) to regularize convolutional neural networks improves generalization to held-out domains and reduces the sim-to-real gap in a sensor-agnostic manner. As a side effect, the learned embeddings also provide useful estimates of model uncertainty for each sensor. We demonstrate that our method is able to help close the sim-to-real gap and successfully fuse RGB and depth modalities based on understanding of the situational uncertainty of each sensor. In a real-world office environment, we achieve 96% task success, improving upon the baseline by +16%.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究并展示了贝叶斯方法从多个传感器输入进行模仿学习的好处，该方法应用于使用移动机械手打开办公室门的任务。使用额外的传感器输入（例如 RGB + 深度摄像头）来增强策略是提高机器人感知能力的直接方法，特别是对于在不同情况下可能有利于不同传感器的任务。当我们将多传感器机器人学习扩展到非结构化的现实环境（例如办公室、家庭）和更复杂的机器人行为时，我们也增加了对模拟器的成本、效率和安全性的依赖。因此，多种传感器模式之间的模拟与真实差距也会增加，使得模拟验证变得更加困难。我们证明，使用变分信息瓶颈（Alemi et al., 2016）对卷积神经网络进行正则化可以提高对保留域的泛化能力，并以与传感器无关的方式减少模拟与真实的差距。作为副作用，学习的嵌入还提供了每个传感器的模型不确定性的有用估计。我们证明，我们的方法能够帮助缩小模拟与真实的差距，并基于对每个传感器的情境不确定性的理解成功地融合 RGB 和深度模态。在现实办公环境中，我们实现了 96% 的任务成功率，比基准提高了 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种贝叶斯模仿学习方法，通过融合RGB和深度传感器数据，解决移动机械臂在真实环境中开门任务的模拟到现实差距问题。
AI.motivation: 多传感器融合可提升机器人感知能力，但复杂真实场景下模拟与现实的传感器模态差异导致验证困难，需解决跨模态的sim-to-real差距问题。
AI.method: 采用变分信息瓶颈（VIB）正则化卷积网络，学习传感器不确定性感知的嵌入表示，实现跨模态特征融合与模拟到现实的泛化能力提升。
AI.result: 在真实办公室环境中实现96%任务成功率，较基线提升16%，有效缩小了多模态传感器的模拟到现实性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯模仿学习框架通过不确定性感知的模态融合，可有效缓解移动机械臂在复杂真实场景中的sim-to-real问题，提升任务成功率。

search_text: Bayesian Imitation Learning for End-to-End Mobile Manipulation 用于端到端移动操作的贝叶斯模仿学习 In this work we investigate and demonstrate benefits of a Bayesian approach to imitation learning from multiple sensor inputs, as applied to the task of opening office doors with a mobile manipulator. We show that using the Variational Information Bottleneck (Alemi et al., 2016) to regularize convolutional neural networks improves generalization to held-out domains and reduces the sim-to-real gap in a sensor-agnostic manner. As a side effect, the learned embeddings also provide useful estimates of model uncertainty for each sensor. We demonstrate that our method is able to help close the sim-to-real gap and successfully fuse RGB and depth modalities based on understanding of the situational uncertainty of each sensor. authors_text: Giovanni Casini,Umberto Straccia
title: A General Framework for Modelling Conditional Reasoning -- Preliminary Report
title_zh: 条件推理建模的通用框架——初步报告
abstract: We introduce and investigate here a formalisation for conditionals that allows the definition of a broad class of reasoning systems. This framework covers the most popular kinds of conditional reasoning in logic-based KR: the semantics we propose is appropriate for a structural analysis of those conditionals that do not satisfy closure properties associated to classical logics.
summary: We introduce and investigate here a formalisation for conditionals that allows the definition of a broad class of reasoning systems. This framework covers the most popular kinds of conditional reasoning in logic-based KR: the semantics we propose is appropriate for a structural analysis of those conditionals that do not satisfy closure properties associated to classical logics.
abstract_zh: 我们在这里介绍并研究了一种条件形式化，它允许定义广泛的推理系统。该框架涵盖了基于逻辑的 KR 中最流行的条件推理类型：我们提出的语义适用于对那些不满足与经典逻辑相关的闭包属性的条件进行结构分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种形式化条件推理的通用框架，适用于多种推理系统，特别是处理不满足经典逻辑闭包性质的条件。
AI.motivation: 经典逻辑的闭包性质无法涵盖所有条件推理场景，需建立新的语义框架以支持更广泛的条件推理分析。
AI.method: 通过定义新的形式化方法，构建覆盖主流条件推理的框架，并进行结构性语义分析。
AI.result: 该框架成功覆盖了逻辑知识表示中的主流条件推理类型，为非闭包条件提供了合适的语义分析基础。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为处理复杂条件推理提供了理论基础，具有在知识表示与推理领域的广泛应用潜力。

authors_text: Anthony Geglio,Eisa Hedayati,Mark Tascillo,Dyche Anderson,Jonathan Barker,Timothy C. Havens
title: Deep Convolutional Autoencoder for Assessment of Drive-Cycle Anomalies in Connected Vehicle Sensor Data
title_zh: 用于评估联网车辆传感器数据中的驾驶周期异常的深度卷积自动编码器
abstract: This work investigates a practical and novel method for automated unsupervised fault detection in vehicles using a fully convolutional autoencoder. The results demonstrate the algorithm we developed can detect anomalies which correspond to powertrain faults by learning patterns in the multivariate time-series data of hybrid-electric vehicle powertrain sensors. Data was collected by engineers at Ford Motor Company from numerous sensors over several drive cycle variations. This study provides evidence of the anomaly detecting capability of our trained autoencoder and investigates the suitability of our autoencoder relative to other unsupervised methods for automatic fault detection in this data set. Preliminary results of testing the autoencoder on the powertrain sensor data indicate the data reconstruction approach availed by the autoencoder is a robust technique for identifying the abnormal sequences in the multivariate series. These results support that irregularities in hybrid-electric vehicles' powertrains are conveyed via sensor signals in the embedded electronic communication system, and therefore can be identified mechanistically with a trained algorithm. Additional unsupervised methods are tested and show the autoencoder performs better at fault detection than outlier detectors and other novel deep learning techniques.
summary: This work investigates a practical and novel method for automated unsupervised fault detection in vehicles using a fully convolutional autoencoder. The results demonstrate the algorithm we developed can detect anomalies which correspond to powertrain faults by learning patterns in the multivariate time-series data of hybrid-electric vehicle powertrain sensors. Data was collected by engineers at Ford Motor Company from numerous sensors over several drive cycle variations. This study provides evidence of the anomaly detecting capability of our trained autoencoder and investigates the suitability of our autoencoder relative to other unsupervised methods for automatic fault detection in this data set. Preliminary results of testing the autoencoder on the powertrain sensor data indicate the data reconstruction approach availed by the autoencoder is a robust technique for identifying the abnormal sequences in the multivariate series. These results support that irregularities in hybrid-electric vehicles' powertrains are conveyed via sensor signals in the embedded electronic communication system, and therefore can be identified mechanistically with a trained algorithm. Additional unsupervised methods are tested and show the autoencoder performs better at fault detection than outlier detectors and other novel deep learning techniques.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了一种使用全卷积自动编码器进行车辆自动无监督故障检测的实用且新颖的方法。结果表明，我们开发的算法可以通过学习混合动力电动汽车动力系统传感器的多元时间序列数据中的模式来检测与动力系统故障相对应的异常情况。福特汽车公司的工程师从多个传感器中收集了多个驾驶周期变化的数据。这项研究提供了我们经过训练的自动编码器的异常检测能力的证据，并研究了我们的自动编码器相对于其他无监督方法在该数据集中自动故障检测的适用性。在动力总成传感器数据上测试自动编码器的初步结果表明，自动编码器所利用的数据重建方法是识别多元序列中异常序列的稳健技术。这些结果支持混合动力电动汽车动力系统中的不规则性是通过嵌入式电子通信系统中的传感器信号传达的，因此可以通过经过训练的算法来机械地识别。对其他无监督方法进行了测试，结果表明自动编码器在故障检测方面比异常值检测器和其他新颖的深度学习技术表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度卷积自编码器的方法，用于检测连接车辆传感器数据中的驾驶循环异常。
AI.motivation: 传统故障检测方法难以有效处理混合动力汽车多变量传感器时间序列数据中的复杂异常模式，需开发自动化、高精度的无监督检测技术。
AI.method: 采用全卷积自编码器学习车辆动力系统传感器数据的正常模式，通过重构误差识别异常序列，并与传统异常检测方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明该自编码器能有效检测动力系统故障，重构误差方法在异常识别准确率上优于其他无监督学习技术。
AI.conclusion: 深度卷积自编码器可作为车辆传感器数据异常检测的有效工具，其数据重构能力优于现有无监督方法，适合工业场景应用。

result: 实验表明该自编码器能有效检测动力系统故障，重构误差方法在异常识别准确率上优于其他无监督学习技术。
conclusion: 深度卷积自编码器可作为车辆传感器数据异常检测的有效工具，其数据重构能力优于现有无监督方法，适合工业场景应用。
search_text: Deep Convolutional Autoencoder for Assessment of Drive-Cycle Anomalies in Connected Vehicle Sensor Data 用于评估联网车辆传感器数据中的驾驶周期异常的深度卷积自动编码器 This work investigates a practical and novel method for automated unsupervised fault detection in vehicles using a fully convolutional autoencoder. The results demonstrate the algorithm we developed can detect anomalies which correspond to powertrain faults by learning patterns in the multivariate time-series data of hybrid-electric vehicle powertrain sensors. Data was collected by engineers at Ford Motor Company from numerous sensors over several drive cycle variations. This study provides evidence of the anomaly detecting capability of our trained autoencoder and investigates the suitability of our autoencoder relative to other unsupervised methods for automatic fault detection in this data set. Preliminary results of testing the autoencoder on the powertrain sensor data indicate the data reconstruction approach availed by the autoencoder is a robust technique for identifying the abnormal sequences in the multivariate series. These results support that irregularities in hybrid-electric vehicles' powertrains are conveyed via sensor signals in the embedded electronic communication system, and therefore can be identified mechanistically with a trained algorithm. Additional unsupervised methods are tested and show the autoencoder performs better at fault detection than outlier detectors and other novel deep learning techniques. 这项工作研究了一种使用全卷积自动编码器进行车辆自动无监督故障检测的实用且新颖的方法。结果表明，我们开发的算法可以通过学习混合动力电动汽车动力系统传感器的多元时间序列数据中的模式来检测与动力系统故障相对应的异常情况。福特汽车公司的工程师从多个传感器中收集了多个驾驶周期变化的数据。这项研究提供了我们经过训练的自动编码器的异常检测能力的证据，并研究了我们的自动编码器相对于其他无监督方法在该数据集中自动故障检测的适用性。在动力总成传感器数据上测试自动编码器的初步结果表明，自动编码器所利用的数据重建方法是识别多元序列中异常序列的稳健技术。这些结果支持混合动力电动汽车动力系统中的不规则性是通过嵌入式电子通信系统中的传感器信号传达的，因此可以通过经过训练的算法来机械地识别。对其他无监督方法进行了测试，结果表明自动编码器在故障检测方面比异常值检测器和其他新颖的深度学习技术表现更好。 本文提出一种基于深度卷积自编码器的方法，用于检测连接车辆传感器数据中的驾驶循环异常。 Anthony Geglio,Eisa Hedayati,Mark Tascillo,Dyche Anderson,Jonathan Barker,Timothy C. Havens cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Marko Palangetić,Chris Cornelis,Salvatore Greco,Roman Słowiński
title: Multi-class granular approximation by means of disjoint and adjacent fuzzy granules
title_zh: 利用不相交和相邻模糊粒的多类粒逼近
abstract: In granular computing, fuzzy sets can be approximated by granularly representable sets that are as close as possible to the original fuzzy set w.r.t. a given closeness measure. Such sets are called granular approximations. In this article, we introduce the concepts of disjoint and adjacent granules and we examine how the new definitions affect the granular approximations. First, we show that the new concepts are important for binary classification problems since they help to keep decision regions separated (disjoint granules) and at the same time to cover as much as possible of the attribute space (adjacent granules). Later, we consider granular approximations for multi-class classification problems leading to the definition of a multi-class granular approximation. Finally, we show how to efficiently calculate multi-class granular approximations for Łukasiewicz fuzzy connectives. We also provide graphical illustrations for a better understanding of the introduced concepts.
summary: In granular computing, fuzzy sets can be approximated by granularly representable sets that are as close as possible to the original fuzzy set w.r.t. a given closeness measure. Such sets are called granular approximations. In this article, we introduce the concepts of disjoint and adjacent granules and we examine how the new definitions affect the granular approximations. First, we show that the new concepts are important for binary classification problems since they help to keep decision regions separated (disjoint granules) and at the same time to cover as much as possible of the attribute space (adjacent granules). Later, we consider granular approximations for multi-class classification problems leading to the definition of a multi-class granular approximation. Finally, we show how to efficiently calculate multi-class granular approximations for Łukasiewicz fuzzy connectives. We also provide graphical illustrations for a better understanding of the introduced concepts.
abstract_zh: 在粒度计算中，模糊集可以通过尽可能接近原始模糊集的粒度可表示集来近似。给定的紧密度度量。这样的集合称为粒度近似。在本文中，我们介绍了不相交和相邻颗粒的概念，并研究了新定义如何影响颗粒近似。首先，我们表明新概念对于二元分类问题很重要，因为它们有助于保持决策区域分离（不相交的颗粒），同时覆盖尽可能多的属性空间（相邻的颗粒）。随后，我们考虑多类分类问题的粒度近似，从而得出多类粒度近似的定义。最后，我们展示了如何有效计算 Łukasiewicz 模糊连接词的多类粒度近似。我们还提供图形插图，以便更好地理解所介绍的概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过不相交和相邻模糊粒进行多类粒近似的计算方法，并探讨其在分类问题中的应用。
AI.motivation: 为解决多类分类中决策区域分离与属性空间覆盖的矛盾，需改进传统粒近似方法以提升分类效果。
AI.method: 引入不相交和相邻粒概念，定义多类粒近似，并针对Łukasiewicz模糊连接词设计高效计算方法，辅以图形化说明。
AI.result: 实现了多类粒近似的有效计算，通过图示直观解释新概念，验证了方法在分类任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过优化粒结构设计，为多类分类问题提供了更精确的粒近似框架，拓展了粒计算的应用边界。

authors_text: Hao Li
title: On Representation Learning with Feedback
title_zh: 关于带反馈的表征学习
abstract: This note complements the author's recent paper "Robust representation learning with feedback for single image deraining" by providing heuristically theoretical explanations on the mechanism of representation learning with feedback, namely an essential merit of the works presented in this recent article. This note facilitates understanding of key points in the mechanism of representation learning with feedback.
summary: This note complements the author's recent paper "Robust representation learning with feedback for single image deraining" by providing heuristically theoretical explanations on the mechanism of representation learning with feedback, namely an essential merit of the works presented in this recent article. This note facilitates understanding of key points in the mechanism of representation learning with feedback.
abstract_zh: 本文通过对带反馈的表示学习机制提供启发式理论解释，补充了作者最近的论文“单图像去雨的鲁棒表示学习和反馈”，这是最近文章中提出的工作的一个基本优点。本笔记有助于理解带反馈的表征学习机制中的关键点。

AI.tldr: 本文通过启发式理论解释，补充了作者近期关于单图像去雨的鲁棒表示学习与反馈机制的研究，阐明其核心机制的关键要点。
AI.motivation: 为深入理解表示学习中反馈机制的理论依据，作者旨在通过理论分析阐明其近期工作的核心优势。
AI.method: 采用启发式理论推导与解释方法，对表示学习中反馈机制的运作原理进行分析。
AI.result: 明确了反馈机制在表示学习中的关键作用，提升了对近期研究中鲁棒性提升机制的理解。
AI.conclusion: 反馈机制的理论解释强化了表示学习在单图像去雨任务中的有效性，为后续研究提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Thomas Stegmüller,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Antoine Spahr,Jean-Philippe Thiran
title: ScoreNet: Learning Non-Uniform Attention and Augmentation for Transformer-Based Histopathological Image Classification
title_zh: ScoreNet：学习基于 Transformer 的组织病理学图像分类的非均匀注意力和增强
abstract: Progress in digital pathology is hindered by high-resolution images and the prohibitive cost of exhaustive localized annotations. The commonly used paradigm to categorize pathology images is patch-based processing, which often incorporates multiple instance learning (MIL) to aggregate local patch-level representations yielding image-level prediction. Nonetheless, diagnostically relevant regions may only take a small fraction of the whole tissue, and current MIL-based approaches often process images uniformly, discarding the inter-patches interactions. To alleviate these issues, we propose ScoreNet, a new efficient transformer that exploits a differentiable recommendation stage to extract discriminative image regions and dedicate computational resources accordingly. The proposed transformer leverages the local and global attention of a few dynamically recommended high-resolution regions at an efficient computational cost. We further introduce a novel mixing data-augmentation, namely ScoreMix, by leveraging the image's semantic distribution to guide the data mixing and produce coherent sample-label pairs. ScoreMix is embarrassingly simple and mitigates the pitfalls of previous augmentations, which assume a uniform semantic distribution and risk mislabeling the samples. Thorough experiments and ablation studies on three breast cancer histology datasets of Haematoxylin & Eosin (H&E) have validated the superiority of our approach over prior arts, including transformer-based models on tumour regions-of-interest (TRoIs) classification. ScoreNet equipped with proposed ScoreMix augmentation demonstrates better generalization capabilities and achieves new state-of-the-art (SOTA) results with only 50% of the data compared to other mixing augmentation variants. Finally, ScoreNet yields high efficacy and outperforms SOTA efficient transformers, namely TransPath and SwinTransformer.
summary: Progress in digital pathology is hindered by high-resolution images and the prohibitive cost of exhaustive localized annotations. The commonly used paradigm to categorize pathology images is patch-based processing, which often incorporates multiple instance learning (MIL) to aggregate local patch-level representations yielding image-level prediction. Nonetheless, diagnostically relevant regions may only take a small fraction of the whole tissue, and current MIL-based approaches often process images uniformly, discarding the inter-patches interactions. To alleviate these issues, we propose ScoreNet, a new efficient transformer that exploits a differentiable recommendation stage to extract discriminative image regions and dedicate computational resources accordingly. The proposed transformer leverages the local and global attention of a few dynamically recommended high-resolution regions at an efficient computational cost. We further introduce a novel mixing data-augmentation, namely ScoreMix, by leveraging the image's semantic distribution to guide the data mixing and produce coherent sample-label pairs. ScoreMix is embarrassingly simple and mitigates the pitfalls of previous augmentations, which assume a uniform semantic distribution and risk mislabeling the samples. Thorough experiments and ablation studies on three breast cancer histology datasets of Haematoxylin & Eosin (H&E) have validated the superiority of our approach over prior arts, including transformer-based models on tumour regions-of-interest (TRoIs) classification. ScoreNet equipped with proposed ScoreMix augmentation demonstrates better generalization capabilities and achieves new state-of-the-art (SOTA) results with only 50% of the data compared to other mixing augmentation variants. Finally, ScoreNet yields high efficacy and outperforms SOTA efficient transformers, namely TransPath and SwinTransformer.
abstract_zh: 高分辨率图像和详尽的本地化注释的高昂成本阻碍了数字病理学的进展。对病理图像进行分类的常用范例是基于块的处理，它通常结合多实例学习（MIL）来聚合局部块级表示，从而产生图像级预测。尽管如此，诊断相关区域可能只占整个组织的一小部分，并且当前基于 MIL 的方法通常会统一处理图像，而忽略斑块间的相互作用。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 ScoreNet，这是一种新的高效转换器，它利用可微的推荐阶段来提取有区别的图像区域并相应地分配计算资源。所提出的变压器以高效的计算成本利用了一些动态推荐的高分辨率区域的局部和全局注意力。我们进一步引入了一种新颖的混合数据增强，即 ScoreMix，通过利用图像的语义分布来指导数据混合并生成连贯的样本标签对。 ScoreMix 非常简单，并且减轻了之前增强的缺陷，即假设统一的语义分布和错误标记样本的风险。对苏木精和曙红 (H&E) 的三个乳腺癌组织学数据集进行的彻底实验和消融研究验证了我们的方法相对于现有技术的优越性，包括基于变压器的肿瘤感兴趣区域 (TRoIs) 分类模型。与其他混合增强变体相比，配备了所提出的 ScoreMix 增强的 ScoreNet 表现出更好的泛化能力，并仅用 50% 的数据就实现了新的最先进 (SOTA) 结果。最后，ScoreNet 具有很高的效率，并且优于 SOTA 高效变压器，即 TransPath 和 SwinTransformer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScoreNet和ScoreMix方法，解决病理图像分类中计算资源浪费和标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多实例学习的病理图像分类方法对图像均匀处理，忽略关键区域且计算效率低，传统数据增强易导致误标。
AI.method: 设计动态推荐机制提取关键区域并分配计算资源，结合局部-全局注意力；提出基于语义分布的ScoreMix数据增强方法。
AI.result: 在三个乳腺癌数据集上优于现有方法，使用50%数据量时达到SOTA，计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: ScoreNet通过非均匀注意力和语义引导增强显著提升分类性能，验证了方法在病理图像分析中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ScoreNet和ScoreMix方法，解决病理图像分类中计算资源浪费和标注成本高的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于多实例学习的病理图像分类方法对图像均匀处理，忽略关键区域且计算效率低，传统数据增强易导致误标。

search_text: ScoreNet: Learning Non-Uniform Attention and Augmentation for Transformer-Based Histopathological Image Classification ScoreNet：学习基于 Transformer 的组织病理学图像分类的非均匀注意力和增强 Progress in digital pathology is hindered by high-resolution images and the prohibitive cost of exhaustive localized annotations. The commonly used paradigm to categorize pathology images is patch-based processing, which often incorporates multiple instance learning (MIL) to aggregate local patch-level representations yielding image-level prediction. Nonetheless, diagnostically relevant regions may only take a small fraction of the whole tissue, and current MIL-based approaches often process images uniformly, discarding the inter-patches interactions. To alleviate these issues, we propose ScoreNet, a new efficient transformer that exploits a differentiable recommendation stage to extract discriminative image regions and dedicate computational resources accordingly. The proposed transformer leverages the local and global attention of a few dynamically recommended high-resolution regions at an efficient computational cost. We further introduce a novel mixing data-augmentation, namely ScoreMix, by leveraging the image's semantic distribution to guide the data mixing and produce coherent sample-label pairs. ScoreMix is embarrassingly simple and mitigates the pitfalls of previous augmentations, which assume a uniform semantic distribution and risk mislabeling the samples. Thorough experiments and ablation studies on three breast cancer histology datasets of Haematoxylin & Eosin (H&E) have validated the superiority of our approach over prior arts, including transformer-based models on tumour regions-of-interest (TRoIs) classification. ScoreNet equipped with proposed ScoreMix augmentation demonstrates better generalization capabilities and achieves new state-of-the-art (SOTA) results with only 50% of the data compared to other mixing augmentation variants. Finally, ScoreNet yields high efficacy and outperforms SOTA efficient transformers, namely TransPath and SwinTransformer. 高分辨率图像和详尽的本地化注释的高昂成本阻碍了数字病理学的进展。对病理图像进行分类的常用范例是基于块的处理，它通常结合多实例学习（MIL）来聚合局部块级表示，从而产生图像级预测。尽管如此，诊断相关区域可能只占整个组织的一小部分，并且当前基于 MIL 的方法通常会统一处理图像，而忽略斑块间的相互作用。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了 ScoreNet，这是一种新的高效转换器，它利用可微的推荐阶段来提取有区别的图像区域并相应地分配计算资源。所提出的变压器以高效的计算成本利用了一些动态推荐的高分辨率区域的局部和全局注意力。我们进一步引入了一种新颖的混合数据增强，即 ScoreMix，通过利用图像的语义分布来指导数据混合并生成连贯的样本标签对。 ScoreMix 非常简单，并且减轻了之前增强的缺陷，即假设统一的语义分布和错误标记样本的风险。对苏木精和曙红 (H&E) 的三个乳腺癌组织学数据集进行的彻底实验和消融研究验证了我们的方法相对于现有技术的优越性，包括基于变压器的肿瘤感兴趣区域 (TRoIs) 分类模型。与其他混合增强变体相比，配备了所提出的 ScoreMix 增强的 ScoreNet 表现出更好的泛化能力，并仅用 50% 的数据就实现了新的最先进 (SOTA) 结果。最后，ScoreNet 具有很高的效率，并且优于 SOTA 高效变压器，即 TransPath 和 SwinTransformer。 本文提出ScoreNet和ScoreMix方法，解决病理图像分类中计算资源浪费和标注成本高的问题。 Thomas Stegmüller,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Antoine Spahr,Jean-Philippe Thiran cs.CV

authors_text: Long Yang,Jiaming Ji,Juntao Dai,Yu Zhang,Pengfei Li,Gang Pan
title: CUP: A Conservative Update Policy Algorithm for Safe Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: CUP：一种安全强化学习的保守更新策略算法
abstract: Safe reinforcement learning (RL) is still very challenging since it requires the agent to consider both return maximization and safe exploration. In this paper, we propose CUP, a Conservative Update Policy algorithm with a theoretical safety guarantee. We derive the CUP based on the new proposed performance bounds and surrogate functions. Although using bounds as surrogate functions to design safe RL algorithms have appeared in some existing works, we develop them at least three aspects: (i) We provide a rigorous theoretical analysis to extend the surrogate functions to generalized advantage estimator (GAE). GAE significantly reduces variance empirically while maintaining a tolerable level of bias, which is an efficient step for us to design CUP; (ii) The proposed bounds are tighter than existing works, i.e., using the proposed bounds as surrogate functions are better local approximations to the objective and safety constraints. (iii) The proposed CUP provides a non-convex implementation via first-order optimizers, which does not depend on any convex approximation. Finally, extensive experiments show the effectiveness of CUP where the agent satisfies safe constraints. We have opened the source code of CUP at https://github.com/RL-boxes/Safe-RL.
summary: Safe reinforcement learning (RL) is still very challenging since it requires the agent to consider both return maximization and safe exploration. In this paper, we propose CUP, a Conservative Update Policy algorithm with a theoretical safety guarantee. We derive the CUP based on the new proposed performance bounds and surrogate functions. Although using bounds as surrogate functions to design safe RL algorithms have appeared in some existing works, we develop them at least three aspects: (i) We provide a rigorous theoretical analysis to extend the surrogate functions to generalized advantage estimator (GAE). GAE significantly reduces variance empirically while maintaining a tolerable level of bias, which is an efficient step for us to design CUP; (ii) The proposed bounds are tighter than existing works, i.e., using the proposed bounds as surrogate functions are better local approximations to the objective and safety constraints. (iii) The proposed CUP provides a non-convex implementation via first-order optimizers, which does not depend on any convex approximation. Finally, extensive experiments show the effectiveness of CUP where the agent satisfies safe constraints. We have opened the source code of CUP at https://github.com/RL-boxes/Safe-RL.
abstract_zh: 安全强化学习（RL）仍然非常具有挑战性，因为它要求代理同时考虑回报最大化和安全探索。在本文中，我们提出了CUP，一种具有理论安全保证的保守更新策略算法。我们根据新提出的性能界限和代理函数推导 CUP。尽管使用界限作为代理函数来设计安全的强化学习算法已经出现在一些现有的工作中，但我们至少在三个方面对其进行了开发：（i）我们提供了严格的理论分析，将代理函数扩展到广义优势估计器（GAE）。 GAE 显着降低了经验方差，同时保持了可容忍的偏差水平，这是我们设计 CUP 的有效步骤； (ii) 提议的边界比现有的工作更严格，即，使用提议的边界作为代理函数是对目标和安全约束的更好的局部近似。 (iii) 所提出的 CUP 通过一阶优化器提供非凸实现，它不依赖于任何凸近似。最后，大量实验证明了 CUP 在代理满足安全约束的情况下的有效性。我们已经在 https://github.com/RL-boxes/Safe-RL 开放了 CUP 的源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CUP的保守更新策略算法，用于安全强化学习，以确保在最大化回报的同时满足安全约束。
AI.motivation: 安全强化学习面临挑战，因为需要在最大化回报和安全探索之间取得平衡。现有方法在使用界限作为替代函数设计安全RL算法时存在不足，因此需要一种更有效的算法。
AI.method: CUP算法基于新提出的性能界限和替代函数进行设计，并将其扩展到广义优势估计器（GAE），从而提高效率。此外，CUP采用非凸实现，不依赖于任何凸近似。
AI.result: 实验表明，CUP算法在满足安全约束的同时，表现出良好的效果。
AI.conclusion: CUP算法在安全强化学习领域提供了理论保证和高效的实现方法，具有重要的应用价值。

authors_text: Andreanne Lemay,Katharina Hoebel,Christopher P. Bridge,Brian Befano,Silvia De Sanjosé,Diden Egemen,Ana Cecilia Rodriguez,Mark Schiffman,John Peter Campbell,Jayashree Kalpathy-Cramer
title: Improving the repeatability of deep learning models with Monte Carlo dropout
title_zh: 通过蒙特卡罗 dropout 提高深度学习模型的可重复性
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.06754
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2111.06754
abstract: The integration of artificial intelligence into clinical workflows requires reliable and robust models. Repeatability is a key attribute of model robustness. Repeatable models output predictions with low variation during independent tests carried out under similar conditions. During model development and evaluation, much attention is given to classification performance while model repeatability is rarely assessed, leading to the development of models that are unusable in clinical practice. In this work, we evaluate the repeatability of four model types (binary classification, multi-class classification, ordinal classification, and regression) on images that were acquired from the same patient during the same visit. We study the performance of binary, multi-class, ordinal, and regression models on four medical image classification tasks from public and private datasets: knee osteoarthritis, cervical cancer screening, breast density estimation, and retinopathy of prematurity. Repeatability is measured and compared on ResNet and DenseNet architectures. Moreover, we assess the impact of sampling Monte Carlo dropout predictions at test time on classification performance and repeatability. Leveraging Monte Carlo predictions significantly increased repeatability for all tasks on the binary, multi-class, and ordinal models leading to an average reduction of the 95\% limits of agreement by 16% points and of the disagreement rate by 7% points. The classification accuracy improved in most settings along with the repeatability. Our results suggest that beyond about 20 Monte Carlo iterations, there is no further gain in repeatability. In addition to the higher test-retest agreement, Monte Carlo predictions were better calibrated which leads to output probabilities reflecting more accurately the true likelihood of being correctly classified.
summary: The integration of artificial intelligence into clinical workflows requires reliable and robust models. Repeatability is a key attribute of model robustness. Repeatable models output predictions with low variation during independent tests carried out under similar conditions. During model development and evaluation, much attention is given to classification performance while model repeatability is rarely assessed, leading to the development of models that are unusable in clinical practice. In this work, we evaluate the repeatability of four model types (binary classification, multi-class classification, ordinal classification, and regression) on images that were acquired from the same patient during the same visit. We study the performance of binary, multi-class, ordinal, and regression models on four medical image classification tasks from public and private datasets: knee osteoarthritis, cervical cancer screening, breast density estimation, and retinopathy of prematurity. Repeatability is measured and compared on ResNet and DenseNet architectures. Moreover, we assess the impact of sampling Monte Carlo dropout predictions at test time on classification performance and repeatability. Leveraging Monte Carlo predictions significantly increased repeatability for all tasks on the binary, multi-class, and ordinal models leading to an average reduction of the 95\% limits of agreement by 16% points and of the disagreement rate by 7% points. The classification accuracy improved in most settings along with the repeatability. Our results suggest that beyond about 20 Monte Carlo iterations, there is no further gain in repeatability. In addition to the higher test-retest agreement, Monte Carlo predictions were better calibrated which leads to output probabilities reflecting more accurately the true likelihood of being correctly classified.
abstract_zh: 将人工智能集成到临床工作流程中需要可靠且稳健的模型。可重复性是模型稳健性的一个关键属性。在类似条件下进行的独立测试中，可重复的模型输出变化较小的预测。在模型开发和评估过程中，过多关注分类性能，而很少评估模型的重复性，导致开发出的模型无法用于临床实践。在这项工作中，我们评估了四种模型类型（二元分类、多类分类、序数分类和回归）对同一患者在同一次就诊期间获取的图像的可重复性。我们研究了二元、多类、序数和回归模型在来自公共和私人数据集的四种医学图像分类任务上的性能：膝骨关节炎、宫颈癌筛查、乳腺密度估计和早产儿视网膜病变。在 ResNet 和 DenseNet 架构上测量和比较可重复性。此外，我们评估了测试时采样蒙特卡洛丢失预测对分类性能和可重复性的影响。利用蒙特卡洛预测显着提高了二元、多类和序数模型上所有任务的可重复性，导致 95% 的一致限度平均降低了 16%，不一致率平均降低了 7%。在大多数设置中，分类精度以及可重复性都得到了提高。我们的结果表明，超过大约 20 次蒙特卡罗迭代后，重复性就没有进一步提高。除了更高的重测一致性之外，蒙特卡罗预测得到了更好的校准，这使得输出概率更准确地反映了正确分类的真实可能性。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何通过蒙特卡洛丢弃法提高深度学习模型的可重复性，特别是在医疗图像分类任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 临床工作流程中需要可靠且稳健的AI模型，但现有模型常忽视可重复性评估，导致实际应用中不可靠。
AI.method: 在相同患者影像数据上评估二分类、多分类、序数分类和回归模型的可重复性，使用ResNet和DenseNet架构，并测试蒙特卡洛丢弃法对性能和可重复性的影响。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛预测显著提升所有任务的可重复性，95%一致性限值平均降低16%，分歧率降低7%，且分类准确率多数情况下同步提升。
AI.conclusion: 蒙特卡洛丢弃法能有效增强模型可重复性与校准度，但迭代次数超过20次后收益不再显著。
